# 01 Current State Inventory

## Scope Reviewed
- Repository identity and public docs: `ui/dzup-ui/README.md:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/CONTRIBUTING.md:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/SECURITY.md:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/CHANGELOG.md:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/CLAUDE.md:1`.
- Workspace/package metadata and scripts: `ui/dzup-ui/package.json:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/.yarnrc.yml:1`, `.changeset/config.json:1`.
- Core build/lint/test config: `ui/dzup-ui/tsconfig.base.json:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/eslint.config.js:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/vitest.config.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/playwright.config.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/bundlesize.config.json:1`.
- CI/release automation: `ui/dzup-ui/.github/workflows/ci.yml:1`, `.github/workflows/release.yml:1`, `.github/workflows/publish-prerelease.yml:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/scripts/release-rehearsal.sh:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/scripts/credential-scan.sh:1`.
- Implementation entrypoints and manifests: `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/src/index.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/src/resolver.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/tokens/src/generate.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/contracts/src/index.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/compat/src/index.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/codemods/src/runner.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/nuxt/src/module.ts:1`.
- Quality tooling/validators: `ui/dzup-ui/packages/tooling/src/validators/import-boundary.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/tooling/scripts/validate-exports.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/tooling/scripts/validate-dts.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/tooling/scripts/validate-peers.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/tooling/src/license-audit.ts:1`.
- Runtime surfaces sampled: `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/src/providers/DzThemeProvider.vue:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/src/composables/useFloating/useFloating.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/src/components/data/DzDataGrid.vue:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/src/components/overlays/DzDialog.vue:1`.
- Test surfaces sampled: `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/tests/ssr/ssr-smoke.spec.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/core/tests/a11y/buttons.a11y.spec.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/e2e/smoke/storybook.spec.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/e2e/a11y/keyboard-nav.spec.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/packages/nuxt/src/module.spec.ts:1`.
- Internal app surfaces sampled: `ui/dzup-ui/apps/sandbox/src/router.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/apps/sandbox/src/App.vue:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/apps/storybook/.storybook/main.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/apps/storybook/.storybook/preview.ts:1`, `ui/dzup-ui/apps/storybook/stories/Introduction.mdx:1`.
- Secondary `out/` artifacts reviewed for drift/context: `out/code-features-current/extracted/ui-dzup-ui.md:1`, `out/code-features-current/scored/ui-dzup-ui.md:1`, `out/code-features-live-sample-3/summaries/repos/ui-dzup-ui.md:1`.

## Repository Overview
- `ui/dzup-ui` is a multi-package UI platform monorepo centered on `@dzup-ui/core`, with support packages for tokens, contracts, migration compatibility, codemods, and Nuxt integration (`package.json:9`, `README.md:53`).
- The repo is tool-heavy and quality-gated: strict TypeScript, linting, unit/contract/a11y/SSR tests, E2E Storybook checks, boundary validation, export validation, peer/license audits, bundle checks, and release rehearsals (`package.json:13`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml:18`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml:96`, `scripts/release-rehearsal.sh:40`).
- Two internal apps (`apps/sandbox`, `apps/storybook`) serve as development and documentation/visual validation environments rather than end-user production apps (`apps/sandbox/package.json:2`, `apps/storybook/package.json:2`).

## Repository Identity
- Product role: open-source Vue 3 component library ecosystem with migration path from legacy dzup-ui APIs (`README.md:3`, `README.md:117`, `packages/compat/src/index.ts:2`, `packages/codemods/package.json:5`).
- Primary users: frontend application teams needing reusable components, design tokens, contract types, and optional Nuxt auto-registration (`README.md:53`, `packages/nuxt/src/module.ts:225`).
- Languages/frameworks: TypeScript + Vue SFCs (`package.json:4`, `README.md:72`), Vite library builds (`packages/core/vite.config.ts:23`), Vitest + Playwright testing (`package.json:18`, `package.json:43`).
- Package manager/runtime: Yarn 4 with Node >=20 (`package.json:5`, `package.json:7`), node-modules linker (`.yarnrc.yml:1`).
- Repository shape: workspaces at `packages/*` and `apps/*` (`package.json:9`), with publishable packages and internal tooling packages (`packages/*/package.json`).

## Implementation Surface
- Core API surface is manifest-driven and generated: `packages/core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json` feeds generated barrel exports in `packages/core/src/index.ts` (`manifest-generator.ts:4`, `manifest-generator.ts:90`, `core/src/index.ts:1`).
- Major component domains are explicit and broad: 11 families (buttons, cards, inputs, forms, layout, media, data, feedback, navigation, overlays, typography) (`core/src/index.ts:9`, `core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:7`).
- Supporting libraries/services:
- `@dzup-ui/tokens` generates CSS variables, TS token types, and Tailwind theme artifacts (`tokens/src/generate.ts:4`, `tokens/src/generate.ts:421`).
- `@dzup-ui/contracts` publishes canonical prop/event/slot taxonomies (`contracts/src/canonical.types.ts:12`, `contracts/src/index.ts:14`).
- `@dzup-ui/compat` wraps legacy props/events and emits deprecation warnings (`compat/src/index.ts:24`, `compat/src/utils/deprecation.ts:20`).
- `@dzup-ui/codemods` provides automated transform runner/CLI (`codemods/bin/dzup-codemod.js:4`, `codemods/src/runner.ts:71`).
- `@dzup-ui/nuxt` injects CSS, transpile config, component auto-imports, and a head theme script (`nuxt/src/module.ts:240`, `nuxt/src/module.ts:252`, `nuxt/src/module.ts:272`).
- Runtime integration complexity is non-trivial: broad `reka-ui` usage, floating positioning, date handling, icons, and theme SSR/FOUC handling (`core/src/components/overlays/DzDialog.vue:3`, `core/src/composables/useFloating/useFloating.ts:11`, `core/src/components/forms/DzDatePicker.vue:24`, `core/src/providers/theme-script.ts:1`).
- Scale signals from local tree scan: `packages/core/src/components` currently contains 160 `.vue` files, overall repo has roughly ~2k files under `packages/`, and test files are dense (229 `*.spec/test*` files across `packages` + `e2e`).
- Large-module signals: highly complex files around data grid and advanced composables/tests, e.g. `useDataGrid.spec.ts` (627 LOC), `useSelect.spec.ts` (513 LOC), `DzDataGrid.vue` (multi-state compound component, context + pagination + selection) (`DzDataGrid.vue:12`).

## Maturity Signals
- Strong production-grade CI gates: typed checks, lint, unit tests across Node 20/22, contract/a11y/SSR test lanes, boundary/token/export/changelog/peer/license checks, build + declaration validation + bundle budgets + pack smoke tests (`ci.yml:18`, `ci.yml:64`, `ci.yml:89`, `ci.yml:91`, `ci.yml:94`, `ci.yml:116`, `ci.yml:177`, `ci.yml:185`).
- Release engineering is structured: Changesets-driven PR/version/publish flow with npm provenance and prerelease workflow (`release.yml:51`, `release.yml:53`, `publish-prerelease.yml:57`).
- Tooling hygiene is advanced for a UI repo: import-boundary validator, declaration parity checks, peer semver checks, and license audit scripts are all custom and integrated (`import-boundary.ts:4`, `validate-dts.ts:4`, `validate-peers.ts:4`, `license-audit.ts:4`).
- Testing breadth is substantial: contract specs, a11y specs, SSR smoke tests, and Playwright Storybook e2e checks exist; Storybook infra tests explicitly check console errors and story rendering health (`package.json:21`, `package.json:22`, `package.json:23`, `e2e/smoke/storybook.spec.ts:15`, `e2e/smoke/storybook.spec.ts:168`).
- Transitional/less-mature indicators:
- Nuxt module tests are mostly smoke-level and do not assert component parity correctness (`packages/nuxt/src/module.spec.ts:11`).
- Some governance docs are stale relative to implementation (details below).
- No backend-style migrations/jobs/workers exist (expected for UI library), so operational maturity is concentrated in frontend package quality gates rather than runtime ops infrastructure.

## Current-State Caveats
- Component-count/documentation drift is material:
- README and Storybook intro still claim 147 foundational components (`README.md:3`, `README.md:13`, `apps/storybook/stories/Introduction.mdx:8`).
- Changelog still references a different historical count and in-repo `@dzup-ui/pro` framing (`CHANGELOG.md:18`, `CHANGELOG.md:19`, `CHANGELOG.md:26`), while README now points pro users to a separate repo (`README.md:9`).
- Live manifest exports indicate a larger and changed component set (e.g. explicit entries for newer names like `DzSearchInput`, `DzTabList`, `DzTransfer`, `DzToastViewport`) (`core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:38`, `core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:93`, `core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:66`, `core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:155`).
- Architecture-doc drift inside repo:
- `CLAUDE.md` states “no `<style scoped>`” and “155 `.vue` files” (`CLAUDE.md:48`, `CLAUDE.md:72`), but current core has many scoped-style components (for example `DzDataGrid.vue:195`, `DzButton.vue:187`, `DzDialogContent.vue:106`) and current file count is higher by local scan.
- Nuxt integration drift risk:
- Nuxt core list still includes names like `DzSearchBox`, `DzTabsList`, `DzTabsTrigger`, `DzFAB`, `DzDrawer` (`nuxt/src/module.ts:31`, `nuxt/src/module.ts:90`, `nuxt/src/module.ts:141`, `nuxt/src/module.ts:152`).
- Core manifest exports now use different/current names (e.g. `DzSearchInput`, `DzTabList`, `DzTabTrigger`) (`core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:38`, `core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:93`, `core/manifests/public-api.manifest.json:94`).
- Export validation currently checks Nuxt as “flat export exists” and does not validate that its component registry matches manifest/core exports (`packages/tooling/scripts/validate-exports.ts:9`, `packages/tooling/scripts/validate-exports.ts:80`).
- Contributing docs mismatch on story location:
- Contribution guide says add stories under `apps/storybook/src/stories/` (`CONTRIBUTING.md:63`).
- Storybook config actually sources component stories from `packages/core/stories/**/*.stories.ts` (`apps/storybook/.storybook/main.ts:12`).
- Secondary `out/` artifacts are stale versus live tree:
- `out/code-features-current/extracted/ui-dzup-ui.md` reports static fallback counts (e.g., “40 components”, “80 test files”) (`out/code-features-current/extracted/ui-dzup-ui.md:9`, `out/code-features-current/extracted/ui-dzup-ui.md:17`, `out/code-features-current/extracted/ui-dzup-ui.md:75`), while current source has materially higher component/test volume.

## Overall Assessment
`dzup-ui` is currently a production-leaning, high-discipline component-platform monorepo with strong CI/release guardrails, substantial test coverage modes, and serious package-boundary/tooling rigor. The highest risk is not implementation immaturity; it is contract/documentation drift across README/changelog/architecture notes/Nuxt registry and static analysis artifacts. In practical terms, maintainers appear to be shipping real code faster than they are keeping all descriptive and integration metadata synchronized.

    "test:ssr": "vitest run --reporter=verbose packages/**/ssr/**/*.spec.ts",
    "build": "yarn workspace @dzup-ui/contracts build && yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens build && yarn workspace @dzup-ui/core build && yarn workspace @dzup-ui/compat build && yarn workspace @dzup-ui/codemods build && yarn workspace @dzup-ui/nuxt build",
    "build:all": "yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run build",
    "tokens:generate": "yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate",
    "generate:exports": "tsx packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts",
    "generate:exports:core": "tsx packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts packages/core",
    "validate:boundaries": "tsx packages/tooling/src/validators/import-boundary.ts",
    "validate:tokens": "tsx packages/tooling/src/token-checks/color-lint.ts",
    "validate:exports": "tsx packages/tooling/scripts/validate-exports.ts",
    "validate:bundle": "tsx packages/tooling/scripts/validate-bundle.ts",
    "validate:bundle-budget": "tsx packages/tooling/src/bundle-budget-check.ts",
    "validate:changelog": "tsx packages/tooling/scripts/validate-changelog.ts",
    "validate:dts": "tsx packages/tooling/scripts/validate-dts.ts",
    "validate:peers": "tsx packages/tooling/scripts/validate-peers.ts",
    "validate:licenses": "tsx packages/tooling/src/license-audit.ts",
    "validate:all": "yarn typecheck && yarn lint && yarn validate:boundaries && yarn validate:tokens && yarn validate:exports && yarn validate:dts && yarn validate:changelog && yarn validate:peers && yarn validate:licenses",
    "validate:tree-shake": "tsx packages/tooling/src/tree-shake-check.ts",
    "report:component-sizes": "tsx packages/tooling/src/component-size-report.ts",
    "report:component-sizes:ci": "tsx packages/tooling/src/component-size-report.ts --ci",
    "test:perf": "vitest run packages/tooling/src/perf-bench.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "test:e2e:update": "playwright test --update-snapshots",
    "storybook": "yarn workspace @dzup-ui/storybook dev",
    "storybook:build": "yarn workspace @dzup-ui/storybook build",
    "changeset": "changeset",
    "version-packages": "changeset version",
    "release": "yarn build && changeset publish",
    "scan:credentials": "bash scripts/credential-scan.sh",
    "rehearse:release": "bash scripts/release-rehearsal.sh"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@antfu/eslint-config": "^4.13.0",
    "@changesets/cli": "^2.30.0",
    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.6.0",
    "@testing-library/vue": "^8.1.0",
    "@types/node": "^22.13.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-vue": "^5.2.0",
    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^3.0.0",
    "@vue/test-utils": "^2.4.6",
    "eslint": "^9.20.0",
    "eslint-plugin-vue": "^9.32.0",
    "jsdom": "^26.0.0",
    "prettier": "^3.5.0",
    "tsx": "^4.19.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vite": "^6.1.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4",
    "vitest": "^3.0.0",
    "vitest-axe": "^0.1.0",
    "vue-tsc": "^2.2.0"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "vue": "^3.5.13"
  }
}

 succeeded in 0ms:
# dzup-ui

**Open-source Vue 3 component library — 147 foundational components.**

![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@dzup-ui/core?label=%40dzup-ui%2Fcore)
![build status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/datazup/dzup-ui/ci.yml?branch=main)
![license](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green)

> Looking for enterprise components? See [@dzup-ui/pro](https://github.com/datazup/dzup-ui-pro).

## Features

- 147 Vue 3 components across 11 families
- TypeScript strict mode with zero `any` types and full type inference
- Tailwind CSS 4 design token system with light/dark/system theming
- Reka UI headless primitives for accessible interactive components
- WCAG AA accessibility with keyboard navigation and ARIA support
- SSR-safe, ESM-only distribution with tree-shaking support

## Quick Start

**1. Install packages**

``\`bash
yarn add @dzup-ui/core @dzup-ui/tokens vue@^3.5.0 reka-ui@^2.0.0
``\`

**2. Import styles**

``\`css
@import "@dzup-ui/tokens/css";
@import "@dzup-ui/core/styles";
``\`

**3. Use components**

``\`vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { DzButton, DzInput, DzThemeProvider } from '@dzup-ui/core'
import { ref } from 'vue'

const name = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <DzThemeProvider default-theme="system">
    <DzInput v-model="name" placeholder="Enter your name" />
    <DzButton tone="primary" @click="submit">Submit</DzButton>
  </DzThemeProvider>
</template>
``\`

## Packages

| Package | Version | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| [`@dzup-ui/core`](./packages/core) | 0.1.0-alpha.0 | 147 foundational components (buttons, inputs, forms, layout, navigation, overlays, feedback, data, media, typography) |
| [`@dzup-ui/tokens`](./packages/tokens) | 0.1.0-alpha.0 | Design tokens — CSS custom properties, Tailwind theme, TypeScript definitions |
| [`@dzup-ui/contracts`](./packages/contracts) | 0.1.0-alpha.0 | Canonical public API contract types (props, events, slots) |
| [`@dzup-ui/compat`](./packages/compat) | 0.0.1 | Migration adapters from old dzup-ui to vNext |
| [`@dzup-ui/codemods`](./packages/codemods) | 0.0.1 | Automated code transforms for migration (CLI: `dzup-codemod`) |
| [`@dzup-ui/nuxt`](./packages/nuxt) | 0.1.0-alpha.0 | Nuxt 3 module for auto-importing Dz* components |

## Component Families

Buttons · Cards · Inputs · Forms · Layout · Navigation · Overlays · Feedback · Data · Media · Typography

## Tech Stack

| Category | Technology |
|----------|------------|
| Framework | Vue 3.5+ with Composition API and `<script setup>` |
| Language | TypeScript 5.6+ (strict mode) |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS 4 with `@theme` directive |
| Variants | tailwind-variants (tv) for type-safe component styling |
| Primitives | Reka UI 2.x for headless interactive components |
| Icons | lucide-vue-next |
| Dates | @internationalized/date |
| Positioning | @floating-ui/vue |
| Testing | Vitest + Playwright |
| Bundler | Vite (library mode, ESM-only) |
| Monorepo | Yarn 4 workspaces |

## Development

``\`bash
# Install dependencies
yarn install

# Type check
yarn typecheck

# Lint
yarn lint

# Run tests
yarn test

# Build all packages
yarn build

# Start Storybook
yarn storybook
``\`

## Enterprise Components

Need Kanban, Gantt, FormBuilder, DashboardBuilder, WorkflowDesigner, and more?
See **[@dzup-ui/pro](https://github.com/datazup/dzup-ui-pro)** — 40 enterprise components available under a commercial license.

## Contributing

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for development workflow and guidelines.

## Migration

Upgrading from old `dzup-ui`? See [`@dzup-ui/compat`](./packages/compat) and [`@dzup-ui/codemods`](./packages/codemods).

## License

MIT — see [LICENSE](./LICENSE) for details.

--- packages/codemods
{
  "name": "@dzup-ui/codemods",
  "type": "module",
  "version": "0.1.0-alpha.0",
  "description": "Code transforms for migrating from old dzup-ui to vNext",
  "license": "MIT",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.js"
    }
  },
  "bin": {
    "dzup-codemod": "./bin/dzup-codemod.js"
  },
  "files": [
    "LICENSE",
    "bin",
    "dist"
  ],
  "publishConfig": {
    "access": "public"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc --project tsconfig.json",
    "postbuild": "chmod +x bin/dzup-codemod.js",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "codemod": "node bin/dzup-codemod.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "glob": "^11.0.0",
    "jscodeshift": "^17.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/jscodeshift": "^0.12.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0"
  }
}

    }
  },
  "main": "./dist/index.js",
  "module": "./dist/index.js",

  ],
  "publishConfig": {
    "access": "public"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "typecheck": "vue-tsc --noEmit",
    "build": "vite build"
  },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "vue": "^3.5.0"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@dzup-ui/contracts": "workspace:*",
    "@dzup-ui/core": "workspace:*"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vite": "^6.1.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.0",
    "vue": "^3.5.13"
  }
}

  "license": "MIT",
  "sideEffects": [
    "*.css"
  ],
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.js"
    },
    "./resolver": {
      "types": "./dist/resolver.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/resolver.js"
    },
    "./styles": "./dist/index.css"
  },
  "main": "./dist/index.js",
  "module": "./dist/index.js",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "files": [
    "LICENSE",
    "README.md",
    "dist"
  ],
  "publishConfig": {
    "access": "public"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "typecheck": "vue-tsc --noEmit",
    "lint": "eslint src/",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "build": "vite build"
  },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "reka-ui": "^2.0.0",
    "vue": "^3.5.0"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@datazup/dzupagent-orchestration-kit": "workspace:*",
    "@dzup-ui/contracts": "workspace:*",
    "@dzup-ui/tokens": "workspace:*",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "tailwind-merge": "^3.0.0",
    "tailwind-variants": "^0.3.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@floating-ui/vue": "^1.1.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-vue": "^5.2.0",
    "lucide-vue-next": "^0.475.0",
    "reka-ui": "^2.0.0",
    "tailwindcss": "^4.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vite": "^6.1.0",
    "vue": "^3.5.13"
  }
}
--- packages/nuxt
{
  "name": "@dzup-ui/nuxt",
  "type": "module",
  "version": "0.1.0-alpha.0",
  "description": "Nuxt module for dzup-ui — auto-imports all Dz* components",
  "license": "MIT",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/module.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/module.js"
    }
  },
  "main": "./dist/module.js",
  "types": "./dist/module.d.ts",

    "LICENSE",

    "access": "public"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc --project tsconfig.json",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "@dzup-ui/core": ">=0.1.0-alpha.0",
    "@dzup-ui/tokens": ">=0.1.0-alpha.0",
    "nuxt": ">=3.0.0"
  },
  "peerDependenciesMeta": {
    "@dzup-ui/pro": {
      "optional": true
    }
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@nuxt/kit": "^3.14.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@dzup-ui/core": "workspace:*",
    "@dzup-ui/tokens": "workspace:*",
    "@nuxt/schema": "^3.14.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0"
  }
}
--- packages/tokens
{
  "name": "@dzup-ui/tokens",
  "type": "module",
  "version": "0.1.0-alpha.0",
  "description": "Design tokens for the dzup-ui component library",
  "license": "MIT",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.js"
    },
    "./css": "./dist/tokens.css",
    "./tailwind": {
      "types": "./dist/tailwind-theme.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/tailwind-theme.js"
    },
    "./utils": {
      "types": "./dist/utils/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/utils/index.js"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "LICENSE",
    "dist"
  ],
  "publishConfig": {
    "access": "public"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "generate": "tsx src/generate.ts",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "build": "tsx src/generate.ts && vite build"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "tsx": "^4.19.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vite": "^6.1.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4"
  }
}
--- packages/tooling
{
  "name": "@dzup-ui/tooling",
  "type": "module",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Validators, boundary checks, and token compliance tools for dzup-ui",
  "scripts": {
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "validate:boundaries": "tsx src/validators/import-boundary.ts",
    "validate:tokens": "tsx src/token-checks/color-lint.ts",
    "validate:exports": "tsx ../scripts/validate-exports.ts",
    "validate:bundle": "tsx ../scripts/validate-bundle.ts",
    "validate:changelog": "tsx scripts/validate-changelog.ts",
    "validate:dts": "tsx scripts/validate-dts.ts",
    "validate:peers": "tsx scripts/validate-peers.ts",
    "generate:exports": "tsx src/manifest-generator.ts",
    "validate:tree-shake": "tsx src/tree-shake-check.ts",
    "test:perf": "vitest run src/perf-bench.spec.ts"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "tsx": "^4.19.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0"
  }
}
--- apps/sandbox
{
  "name": "@dzup-ui/sandbox",
  "type": "module",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Development sandbox for testing dzup-ui components",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@dzup-ui/core": "workspace:*",
    "@dzup-ui/tokens": "workspace:*",
    "vue": "^3.5.13",
    "vue-router": "^4.5.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@vitejs/plugin-vue": "^5.2.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vite": "^6.1.0"
  }
}
--- apps/storybook
{
  "name": "@dzup-ui/storybook",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "type": "module",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Storybook for dzup-ui component library",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "storybook dev -p 6006",
    "build": "storybook build"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@dzup-ui/core": "workspace:*",
    "@dzup-ui/tokens": "workspace:*"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@storybook/addon-a11y": "^10.3.4",
    "@storybook/addon-docs": "^10.3.4",
    "@storybook/addon-themes": "^10.3.4",
    "@storybook/test": "8.6.15",
    "@storybook/vue3-vite": "^10.3.4",
    "@tailwindcss/vite": "^4.0.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-vue": "^5.2.0",
    "storybook": "^10.3.4",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vite": "^6.1.0",
    "vue": "^3.5.13"
  }
}

   117	        run: yarn validate:boundaries
   118	      - name: Token compliance check
   119	        run: yarn validate:tokens
   120	      - name: Export map validation
   121	        run: yarn validate:exports
   122	      - name: Token build artifacts unchanged

   124	          yarn tokens:generate
   125	          git diff --exit-code packages/tokens/dist/

   132	
   133	  # ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   134	  # G1: Merge Gates (main branch)
   135	  # ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   136	
   137	  build:
   138	    name: Build (library mode)
   139	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
   140	    needs: [typecheck, lint, test, validate]
   141	    steps:
   142	      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
   143	      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
   144	        with:
   145	          node-version: 20
   146	      - name: Enable Corepack
   147	        run: corepack enable
   148	      - name: Get yarn cache directory
   149	        id: yarn-cache-dir
   150	        run: echo "dir=$(yarn config get cacheFolder)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
   151	      - uses: actions/cache@v4
   152	        with:
   153	          path: ${{ steps.yarn-cache-dir.outputs.dir }}
   154	          key: yarn-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/yarn.lock') }}
   155	          restore-keys: yarn-${{ runner.os }}-
   156	      - name: Install dependencies
   157	        run: yarn install --immutable
   158	      - name: Build all packages
   159	        run: yarn build
   160	      - name: Verify ESM-only output (no CJS)
   161	        run: |
   162	          # ADR-11: ESM-only distribution
   163	          if find packages/core/dist -name "*.cjs" -o -name "*.cjs.js" | grep -q .; then
   164	            echo "ERROR: CJS output detected — ADR-11 violation"
   165	            exit 1
   166	          fi
   167	          echo "ESM-only output verified"
   168	      - name: Verify dist artifacts exist
   169	        run: |
   170	          test -f packages/contracts/dist/index.js || (echo "contracts/dist/index.js missing" && exit 1)
   171	          test -f packages/tokens/dist/index.js || (echo "tokens/dist/index.js missing" && exit 1)
   172	          test -f packages/core/dist/index.js || (echo "core/dist/index.js missing" && exit 1)
   173	          test -f packages/compat/dist/index.js || (echo "compat/dist/index.js missing" && exit 1)
   174	          test -f packages/codemods/dist/index.js || (echo "codemods/dist/index.js missing" && exit 1)
   175	          test -f packages/nuxt/dist/module.js || (echo "nuxt/dist/module.js missing" && exit 1)
   176	          echo "Build artifacts verified"
   177	      - name: Validate type declarations
   178	        run: yarn validate:dts
   179	      - name: Bundle budget check
   180	        run: yarn validate:bundle
   181	      - name: Bundle budget check (CI report)
   182	        run: npx tsx packages/tooling/src/bundle-budget-check.ts --ci
   183	      - name: Per-component size report
   184	        run: npx tsx packages/tooling/src/component-size-report.ts --top=30
   185	      - name: Pack smoke test (all publishable packages)
   186	        run: |
   187	          for pkg in contracts tokens core compat codemods nuxt; do
   188	            echo "--- packing packages/$pkg ---"
   189	            (cd packages/$pkg && npm pack --dry-run 2>&1) | tee /tmp/pack-$pkg.txt
   190	            if grep -q "link:" /tmp/pack-$pkg.txt; then
   191	              echo "ERROR: link: dependency in packages/$pkg tarball"
   192	              exit 1
   193	            fi
   194	            if grep -q "workspace:" /tmp/pack-$pkg.txt; then
   195	              echo "ERROR: workspace: dependency in packages/$pkg tarball"
   196	              exit 1
   197	            fi
   198	          done
   199	          echo "Pack smoke test passed for all packages"
   200	      - name: Upload build artifacts
   201	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
   202	        with:
   203	          name: dist
   204	          path: |
   205	            packages/core/dist/
   206	          retention-days: 7
   207

   279	        with:
   280	          node-version: 20
   281	      - name: Enable Corepack
   282	        run: corepack enable
   283	      - name: Get yarn cache directory
   284	        id: yarn-cache-dir
   285	        run: echo "dir=$(yarn config get cacheFolder)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
   286	      - uses: actions/cache@v4
   287	        with:
   288	          path: ${{ steps.yarn-cache-dir.outputs.dir }}
   289	          key: yarn-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/yarn.lock') }}
   290	          restore-keys: yarn-${{ runner.os }}-
   291	      - name: Install dependencies
   292	        run: yarn install --immutable
   293	      - name: Run coverage with threshold enforcement
   294	        run: |
   295	          yarn test:coverage -- --coverage.thresholds.lines=80 --coverage.thresholds.functions=80 --coverage.thresholds.branches=80 --coverage.thresholds.statements=80
   296	      - name: Upload coverage
   297	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
   298	        with:
   299	          name: coverage
   300	          path: coverage/
   301	          retention-days: 7

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba /media/ninel/Second/code/datazup/ai-internal-dev/ui/dzup-ui/packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts | sed -n '1,260p'" in /media/ninel/Second/code/datazup/ai-internal-dev
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * Manifest-Driven Export Generator (ADR-01)
     3	 *
     4	 * Reads `manifests/public-api.manifest.json` from a package directory
     5	 * and generates the barrel `src/index.ts` with proper exports.
     6	 *
     7	 * Usage:
     8	 *   tsx packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts <package-dir>
     9	 *
    10	 * Example:
    11	 *   tsx packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts packages/core
    12	 */
    13	
    14	import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    15	import { dirname, relative, resolve } from 'node:path'
    16	import process from 'node:process'
    17	
    18	// --- Types matching actual manifest JSON shape ---
    19	
    20	interface ManifestComponentFamily {
    21	  path: string
    22	  exports: string[]
    23	}
    24	
    25	interface ManifestComposableEntry {
    26	  path: string
    27	  exports: string[]
    28	}
    29	
    30	interface ManifestUtilityEntry {
    31	  path: string
    32	  exports: string[]
    33	}
    34	
    35	interface ManifestProviderEntry {
    36	  path: string
    37	  exports: string[]
    38	}
    39	
    40	interface ManifestExports {
    41	  components: Record<string, ManifestComponentFamily>
    42	  composables: Record<string, ManifestComposableEntry>
    43	  utilities: Record<string, ManifestUtilityEntry>
    44	  providers?: Record<string, ManifestProviderEntry>
    45	  injectionKeys?: string[]
    46	  variants?: string[]
    47	  runtimeExports?: string[]
    48	  types?: string[]
    49	}
    50	
    51	interface Manifest {
    52	  $schema?: string
    53	  package: string
    54	  version: string
    55	  description?: string
    56	  exports: ManifestExports
    57	}
    58	
    59	// --- Constants ---
    60	
    61	const HEADER = `/**
    62	 * AUTO-GENERATED — Do not edit manually.
    63	 * Generated from public-api.manifest.json (ADR-01).
    64	 * Run: tsx packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts <package-dir>
    65	 */
    66	`
    67	
    68	// --- Helpers ---
    69	
    70	/**
    71	 * Converts a manifest path (e.g. "./src/components/buttons/index.ts")
    72	 * to a relative import path from src/index.ts (e.g. "./components/buttons/index.ts").
    73	 */
    74	function toRelativeImport(manifestPath: string): string {
    75	  let cleaned = manifestPath
    76	  if (cleaned.startsWith('./src/')) {
    77	    cleaned = `./${cleaned.slice(6)}`
    78	  }
    79	  else if (cleaned.startsWith('src/')) {
    80	    cleaned = `./${cleaned.slice(4)}`
    81	  }
    82	  else if (!cleaned.startsWith('./')) {
    83	    cleaned = `./${cleaned}`
    84	  }
    85	  return cleaned
    86	}
    87	
    88	// --- Main ---
    89	
    90	function generate(packageDir: string): void {
    91	  const manifestPath = resolve(packageDir, 'manifests/public-api.manifest.json')
    92	
    93	  if (!existsSync(manifestPath)) {
    94	    console.error(`Manifest not found: ${manifestPath}`)
    95	    process.exit(1)
    96	  }
    97	
    98	  const raw = readFileSync(manifestPath, 'utf-8')
    99	  const manifest: Manifest = JSON.parse(raw) as Manifest
   100	  const { exports: me } = manifest
   101	
   102	  const sections: string[] = []
   103	  let componentCount = 0
   104	  let composableCount = 0
   105	  let utilityCount = 0
   106	
   107	  // Components — keyed by family name, each has a path to re-export (sorted alphabetically)
   108	  if (me.components && Object.keys(me.components).length > 0) {
   109	    const lines: string[] = []
   110	    for (const [family, entry] of Object.entries(me.components).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))) {
   111	      const familyLabel = family.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + family.slice(1)
   112	      lines.push(`// ${familyLabel} family`)
   113	      lines.push(`export * from '${toRelativeImport(entry.path)}'`)
   114	      lines.push('')
   115	      componentCount += entry.exports.length
   116	    }
   117	    // Trim trailing empty line from last family entry
   118	    const componentBlock = lines.join('\n').replace(/\n+$/, '')
   119	    sections.push(`// ── Components ──\n\n${componentBlock}`)
   120	  }
   121	
   122	  // Composables — keyed by name, each has a path
   123	  if (me.composables && Object.keys(me.composables).length > 0) {
   124	    const lines: string[] = []
   125	    for (const [, entry] of Object.entries(me.composables).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))) {
   126	      lines.push(`export * from '${toRelativeImport(entry.path)}'`)
   127	      composableCount += entry.exports.length
   128	    }
   129	    sections.push(`// ── Composables ──\n\n${lines.join('\n')}`)
   130	  }
   131	
   132	  // Providers — keyed by name, each has a path to re-export
   133	  if (me.providers && Object.keys(me.providers).length > 0) {
   134	    const lines: string[] = []
   135	    let providerCount = 0
   136	    for (const [, entry] of Object.entries(me.providers).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))) {
   137	      lines.push(`export * from '${toRelativeImport(entry.path)}'`)
   138	      providerCount += entry.exports.length
   139	    }
   140	    sections.push(`// ── Providers ──\n\n${lines.join('\n')}`)
   141	    componentCount += providerCount
   142	  }
   143	
   144	  // Utilities — keyed by name, each has specific exports
   145	  if (me.utilities && Object.keys(me.utilities).length > 0) {
   146	    const lines: string[] = []
   147	    for (const [, entry] of Object.entries(me.utilities).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))) {
   148	      lines.push(`export { ${entry.exports.join(', ')} } from '${toRelativeImport(entry.path)}'`)
   149	      utilityCount += entry.exports.length
   150	    }
   151	    sections.push(`// ── Utilities ──\n\n${lines.join('\n')}`)
   152	  }
   153	
   154	  const body = sections.length > 0 ? sections.join('\n\n') : 'export {}'
   155	  const output = `${HEADER}\n${body}\n`
   156	
   157	  const indexPath = resolve(packageDir, 'src/index.ts')
   158	  const indexDir = dirname(indexPath)
   159	
   160	  if (!existsSync(indexDir)) {
   161	    console.error(`Source directory not found: ${indexDir}`)
   162	    process.exit(1)
   163	  }
   164	
   165	  writeFileSync(indexPath, output, 'utf-8')
   166	
   167	  const relManifest = relative(process.cwd(), manifestPath)
   168	  const relIndex = relative(process.cwd(), indexPath)
   169	  const totalExports = componentCount + composableCount + utilityCount
   170	  console.warn(`Generated ${relIndex} from ${relManifest} (${manifest.package})`)
   171	  console.warn(
   172	    `  ${componentCount} components, `
   173	    + `${composableCount} composables, `
   174	    + `${utilityCount} utilities `
   175	    + `(${totalExports} total exports)`,
   176	  )
   177	}
   178	
   179	// CLI entry
   180	const packageDir = process.argv[2]
   181	if (!packageDir) {
   182	  console.error('Usage: tsx packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts <package-dir>')
   183	  console.error('Example: tsx packages/tooling/src/manifest-generator.ts packages/core')
   184	  process.exit(1)
   185	}
   186	
   187	generate(packageDir)

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * Import Boundary Validator
     3	 *
     4	 * Scans all .ts and .vue files in packages/ and enforces the dependency rules:
     5	 *   - tokens    -> no deps on contracts, core, compat
     6	 *   - contracts -> tokens types only (no core, compat)
     7	 *   - core      -> tokens + contracts only (no compat)
     8	 *   - compat    -> core + contracts + tokens
     9	 *   - No deep imports into other packages (only through public exports)
    10	 *
    11	 * Usage:
    12	 *   tsx packages/tooling/src/validators/import-boundary.ts
    13	 *
    14	 * Exit code 1 if violations found.
    15	 */
    16	
    17	import { readdirSync, readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    18	import { dirname, join, relative, resolve } from 'node:path'
    19	import process from 'node:process'
    20	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'
    21	
    22	// --- Types ---
    23	
    24	interface Violation {
    25	  file: string
    26	  line: number
    27	  importPath: string
    28	  reason: string
    29	}
    30	
    31	// --- Constants ---
    32	
    33	const ROOT = resolve(dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), '../../../../')
    34	const PACKAGES_DIR = resolve(ROOT, 'packages')
    35	
    36	/** Package names that are part of the monorepo */
    37	const PACKAGE_NAMES = ['tokens', 'contracts', 'core', 'compat', 'codemods', 'tooling'] as const
    38	type PackageName = typeof PACKAGE_NAMES[number]
    39	
    40	/**
    41	 * Allowed @dzup-ui/* dependencies for each package.
    42	 * If a package is not listed, it has no allowed cross-package imports.
    43	 */
    44	const ALLOWED_DEPS: Record<PackageName, readonly PackageName[]> = {
    45	  tokens: [],
    46	  contracts: ['tokens'],
    47	  core: ['tokens', 'contracts'],
    48	  compat: ['tokens', 'contracts', 'core'],
    49	  codemods: ['tokens', 'contracts', 'core', 'compat'],
    50	  tooling: [],
    51	}
    52	
    53	/** Regex to match @dzup-ui/ imports, including deep imports */
    54	const DZUP_IMPORT_RE = /(?:from\s|import\s*\(?)['"](@dzup-ui\/[^'"]+)['"]/g
    55	
    56	/** Regex to extract the package name from a @dzup-ui/ path */
    57	const PACKAGE_NAME_RE = /^@dzup-ui\/([\w-]+)/
    58	
    59	/** Deep import pattern: @dzup-ui/pkg/anything-beyond-root */
    60	const DEEP_IMPORT_RE = /^@dzup-ui\/[\w-]+\/.+/
    61	
    62	// --- File scanning ---
    63	
    64	function collectFiles(dir: string, extensions: string[]): string[] {
    65	  const results: string[] = []
    66	
    67	  function walk(currentDir: string): void {
    68	    let entries: string[]
    69	    try {
    70	      entries = readdirSync(currentDir)
    71	    }
    72	    catch {
    73	      return
    74	    }
    75	
    76	    for (const entry of entries) {
    77	      const fullPath = join(currentDir, entry)
    78	
    79	      // Skip node_modules, dist, .git
    80	      if (entry === 'node_modules' || entry === 'dist' || entry === '.git') {
    81	        continue
    82	      }
    83	
    84	      let stat
    85	      try {
    86	        stat = statSync(fullPath)
    87	      }
    88	      catch {
    89	        continue
    90	      }
    91	
    92	      if (stat.isDirectory()) {
    93	        walk(fullPath)
    94	      }
    95	      else if (stat.isFile() && extensions.some(ext => entry.endsWith(ext))) {
    96	        results.push(fullPath)
    97	      }
    98	    }
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  walk(dir)
   102	  return results
   103	}
   104	
   105	function detectPackage(filePath: string): PackageName | undefined {
   106	  const rel = relative(PACKAGES_DIR, filePath)
   107	  const firstSegment = rel.split('/')[0]
   108	  if (PACKAGE_NAMES.includes(firstSegment as PackageName)) {
   109	    return firstSegment as PackageName
   110	  }
   111	  return undefined
   112	}
   113	
   114	// --- Validation ---
   115	
   116	function validateFile(filePath: string): Violation[] {
   117	  const violations: Violation[] = []
   118	  const pkg = detectPackage(filePath)
   119	
   120	  if (pkg === undefined) {
   121	    return violations
   122	  }
   123	
   124	  const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')
   125	  const lines = content.split('\n')
   126	  const allowed = ALLOWED_DEPS[pkg]
   127	
   128	  let inBlockComment = false
   129	
   130	  for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
   131	    const line = lines[i]
   132	    if (line === undefined)
   133	      continue
   134	
   135	    // Track multi-line comment state
   136	    if (inBlockComment) {
   137	      if (line.includes('*/')) {
   138	        inBlockComment = false
   139	      }
   140	      continue
   141	    }
   142	
   143	    // Check for block comment start
   144	    const blockStart = line.indexOf('/*')
   145	    const blockEnd = line.indexOf('*/')
   146	    if (blockStart !== -1 && (blockEnd === -1 || blockEnd < blockStart)) {
   147	      inBlockComment = true
   148	      continue
   149	    }
   150	
   151	    // Skip single-line comments: lines that are just comments
   152	    const trimmed = line.trimStart()
   153	    if (trimmed.startsWith('//') || trimmed.startsWith('*')) {
   154	      continue
   155	    }
   156	
   157	    // Reset regex lastIndex for each line
   158	    DZUP_IMPORT_RE.lastIndex = 0
   159	    let match: RegExpExecArray | null = DZUP_IMPORT_RE.exec(line)
   160	
   161	    while (match !== null) {
   162	      const importPath = match[1]
   163	      if (importPath === undefined) {
   164	        match = DZUP_IMPORT_RE.exec(line)
   165	        continue
   166	      }
   167	
   168	      const pkgMatch = PACKAGE_NAME_RE.exec(importPath)
   169	      if (pkgMatch === null || pkgMatch[1] === undefined) {
   170	        match = DZUP_IMPORT_RE.exec(line)
   171	        continue
   172	      }
   173	
   174	      const importedPkg = pkgMatch[1] as PackageName
   175	
   176	      // Self-imports are allowed (a package can import from itself)
   177	      if (importedPkg === pkg) {
   178	        match = DZUP_IMPORT_RE.exec(line)
   179	        continue
   180	      }
   181	
   182	      // Check: is this an allowed dependency?
   183	      if (!allowed.includes(importedPkg)) {
   184	        violations.push({
   185	          file: relative(ROOT, filePath),
   186	          line: i + 1,
   187	          importPath,
   188	          reason: `Package "${pkg}" cannot import from "@dzup-ui/${importedPkg}". Allowed: ${allowed.length > 0 ? allowed.map(a => `@dzup-ui/${a}`).join(', ') : 'none'}`,
   189	        })
   190	      }
   191	
   192	      // Check: no deep imports into OTHER packages
   193	      if (DEEP_IMPORT_RE.test(importPath)) {
   194	        violations.push({
   195	          file: relative(ROOT, filePath),
   196	          line: i + 1,
   197	          importPath,
   198	          reason: `Deep import into "${importPath}" is forbidden. Import from the package root "@dzup-ui/${importedPkg}" instead.`,
   199	        })
   200	      }
   201	
   202	      match = DZUP_IMPORT_RE.exec(line)
   203	    }
   204	  }
   205	
   206	  return violations
   207	}
   208	
   209	// --- Main ---
   210	
   211	function main(): void {
   212	  const allViolations: Violation[] = []
   213	
   214	  for (const pkgName of PACKAGE_NAMES) {
   215	    const pkgSrcDir = resolve(PACKAGES_DIR, pkgName, 'src')
   216	    const files = collectFiles(pkgSrcDir, ['.ts', '.vue'])
   217	
   218	    for (const file of files) {
   219	      const violations = validateFile(file)
   220	      allViolations.push(...violations)
   221	    }
   222	  }
   223	
   224	  if (allViolations.length === 0) {
   225	    console.warn('Import boundary check passed: 0 violations')
   226	    process.exit(0)
   227	  }
   228	
   229	  console.error(`Import boundary violations found: ${allViolations.length}\n`)
   230	
   231	  for (const v of allViolations) {
   232	    console.error(`  ${v.file}:${v.line}`)
   233	    console.error(`    import: ${v.importPath}`)
   234	    console.error(`    reason: ${v.reason}\n`)
   235	  }
   236	
   237	  process.exit(1)
   238	}
   239	
   240	main()

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	# CLAUDE.md -- dzup-ui Architecture Reference
     2	
     3	> Authoritative reference for all agents in `.claude/agents/`.
     4	> Package scope: `@dzup-ui/*` (NOT @dzip-ui).
     5	
     6	## Packages (dependency order)
     7	
     8	``\`
     9	contracts  -->  (types only, zero runtime deps)
    10	tokens     -->  (no deps)
    11	core       -->  tokens + contracts
    12	compat     -->  never imported by stable core
    13	codemods   -->  migration tooling
    14	nuxt       -->  core integration module
    15	``\`
    16	
    17	**Import boundary rules:**
    18	- `contracts` has NO runtime dependencies on core
    19	- `core` depends on `tokens` + `contracts`
    20	- `compat` is never imported by stable `core`
    21	
    22	## Canonical Types (`@dzup-ui/contracts`)
    23	
    24	``\`ts
    25	type CanonicalSize = 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'
    26	type CanonicalTone = 'neutral' | 'primary' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'
    27	``\`
    28	
    29	**Family variants** (frozen per ADR-02):
    30	
    31	| Type             | Values                                     |
    32	|------------------|--------------------------------------------|
    33	| ButtonVariant    | `solid` `outline` `ghost` `text` `link`    |
    34	| CardVariant      | `elevated` `outlined` `flat`               |
    35	| InputVariant     | `outline` `filled` `underlined`            |
    36	| AlertVariant     | `filled` `outline` `subtle` `ghost`        |
    37	| BadgeVariant     | `solid` `outline` `subtle`                 |
    38	| TabsVariant      | `line` `enclosed` `pills`                  |
    39	| ProgressVariant  | `bar` `circular`                           |
    40	| ChipVariant      | `solid` `outline` `subtle`                 |
    41	
    42	**Base prop interfaces** (in `contracts/src/props.types.ts`):
    43	`BaseAccessibilityProps`, `BaseBehaviorProps`, `BaseAppearanceProps<TSize, TVariant>`,
    44	`BaseValidationProps`, `BaseInteractiveProps<TVariant>`, `BaseFormControlProps<TVariant>`
    45	
    46	## Component Structure
    47	
    48	155 `.vue` files in `packages/core/src/components/` across 11 families:
    49	`buttons`, `cards`, `data`, `feedback`, `forms`, `inputs`, `layout`, `media`,
    50	`navigation`, `overlays`, `typography`
    51	
    52	17 composables in `packages/core/src/composables/`.
    53	
    54	### File layout per component (example: `buttons/DzButton`)
    55	
    56	``\`
    57	packages/core/src/components/buttons/
    58	  DzButton.vue               # <script setup lang="ts"> implementation
    59	  DzButton.types.ts           # Props, emits, slots interfaces (extends contracts)
    60	  DzButton.tokens.ts          # Component-specific token mappings
    61	  DzButton.variants.ts        # tailwind-variants tv() style definitions
    62	  DzButton.contract.spec.ts   # Contract conformance tests
    63	  DzButton.spec.ts            # Unit/behavior tests (vitest)
    64	  index.ts                    # Public exports
    65	``\`
    66	
    67	Stories are NOT colocated -- they live in:
    68	`packages/core/stories/{FAMILY}/DzComponent.stories.ts`
    69	
    70	## Styling: tailwind-variants + Design Tokens (ADR-04)
    71	
    72	Components use `tv()` from `tailwind-variants` in `.variants.ts` files. **No `<style scoped>`, no raw color literals, no hardcoded Tailwind colors.**
    73	
    74	CSS values reference design tokens via `var(--dz-*)`:
    75	
    76	``\`ts
    77	// DzButton.variants.ts (real excerpt)
    78	import { tv } from 'tailwind-variants'
    79	
    80	export const buttonVariants = tv({
    81	  base: 'inline-flex items-center justify-center font-[var(--dz-button-font-weight)]',
    82	  variants: {
    83	    size: {
    84	      md: 'h-[var(--dz-button-md-height)] px-[var(--dz-button-md-padding-x)] text-[length:var(--dz-button-md-font-size)]',
    85	    },
    86	    tone: {
    87	      primary: '',
    88	    },
    89	  },
    90	  compoundVariants: [
    91	    { variant: 'solid', tone: 'primary', class: 'bg-[var(--dz-primary)] text-[var(--dz-primary-foreground)]' },
    92	  ],
    93	  defaultVariants: { variant: 'solid', size: 'md', tone: 'primary' },
    94	})
    95	``\`
    96	
    97	**Token naming**: `--dz-{component}-{property}` (e.g. `--dz-button-md-height`)
    98	**Global tokens**: `--dz-primary`, `--dz-radius-sm`, `--dz-shadow-xs`, etc.
    99	
   100	## Import Patterns
   101	
   102	``\`ts
   103	// Relative imports use .ts extensions
   104	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
   105	
   106	// Types from contracts
   107	import type { ButtonVariant, CanonicalSize } from '@dzup-ui/contracts'
   108	
   109	// Props: withDefaults + defineProps
   110	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzButtonProps>(), {
   111	  variant: 'solid',
   112	  size: 'md',
   113	  tone: 'primary',
   114	  type: 'button',
   115	})
   116	
   117	// Emits: typed
   118	const emit = defineEmits<DzButtonEmits>()
   119	
   120	// Slots: typed
   121	defineSlots<DzButtonSlots>()
   122	
   123	// v-model: defineModel (ADR-16) -- NOT manual prop+emit
   124	const modelValue = defineModel<string>()
   125	``\`
   126	
   127	## Type Definitions Pattern
   128	
   129	``\`ts
   130	// DzButton.types.ts (real excerpt)
   131	import type { BaseAccessibilityProps, ButtonVariant, CanonicalSize, CanonicalTone } from '@dzup-ui/contracts'
   132	
   133	export interface DzButtonProps extends BaseAccessibilityProps {
   134	  variant?: ButtonVariant
   135	  size?: CanonicalSize
   136	  tone?: CanonicalTone
   137	  disabled?: boolean
   138	  loading?: boolean
   139	}
   140	
   141	export interface DzButtonEmits {
   142	  click: [event: MouseEvent]
   143	  focus: [event: FocusEvent]
   144	  blur: [event: FocusEvent]
   145	}
   146	
   147	export interface DzButtonSlots {
   148	  default?: () => unknown
   149	  prefix?: () => unknown
   150	  suffix?: () => unknown
   151	}
   152	``\`
   153	
   154	## Key ADRs
   155	
   156	| ADR    | Topic                                              |
   157	|--------|----------------------------------------------------|
   158	| ADR-02 | Contract-first design (frozen variant taxonomies)  |
   159	| ADR-04 | Token-only styling (no raw colors)                 |
   160	| ADR-07 | Reka UI for headless primitives                    |
   161	| ADR-12 | Committed dist artifacts                           |
   162	| ADR-15 | FOUC prevention                                    |
   163	| ADR-16 | `defineModel` for v-model                          |
   164	
   165	## Tooling
   166	
   167	| Tool         | Purpose                                  |
   168	|--------------|------------------------------------------|
   169	| Vite         | Build                                    |
   170	| Vitest       | Unit + contract tests                    |
   171	| vue-tsc      | Type checking                            |
   172	| ESLint v9    | Flat config linting                      |
   173	| Storybook 10 | `@storybook/vue3-vite` dev environment   |
   174	| Reka UI      | Headless accessible primitives           |
   175	| Changesets   | Versioning and changelogs                |
   176	
   177	## Quality Gates
   178	
   179	All PRs must pass:
   180	- `yarn typecheck` -- 0 errors
   181	- `yarn lint` -- 0 errors
   182	- 80%+ test coverage
   183	- Contract Spec v1 conformance (`.contract.spec.ts`)
   184	- WCAG AA accessibility
   185	
   186	## Quick Rules for Agents
   187	
   188	1. **Never use raw colors** -- always `var(--dz-*)` tokens inside Tailwind classes
   189	2. **Never use `<style scoped>`** -- use `tv()` in `.variants.ts`
   190	3. **Always extend contracts** -- props interfaces extend `Base*Props` from `@dzup-ui/contracts`
   191	4. **Use `defineModel`** for v-model, not manual prop+emit (ADR-16)
   192	5. **Use `.ts` extensions** in all relative imports
   193	6. **Stories live separately** -- `packages/core/stories/{family}/`
   194	7. **Respect import boundaries** -- contracts has no runtime deps, compat never imported by core

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * Canonical type definitions shared across all component contracts.
     3	 * These enforce Contract Spec v1 taxonomy.
     4	 *
     5	 * @module @dzup-ui/contracts/canonical
     6	 */
     7	
     8	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     9	// Size & Tone
    10	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    11	
    12	/** Canonical size values -- every sized component must use this exact union */
    13	export type CanonicalSize = 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'
    14	
    15	/** Canonical semantic tone values */
    16	export type CanonicalTone = 'neutral' | 'primary' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'
    17	
    18	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19	// Per-family variant taxonomies (frozen per ADR-02)
    20	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21	
    22	/** Button-like family: DzButton, DzIconButton, DzToggleButton */
    23	export type ButtonVariant = 'solid' | 'outline' | 'ghost' | 'text' | 'link'
    24	
    25	/** Surface / Card-like family: DzCard */
    26	export type CardVariant = 'elevated' | 'outlined' | 'flat'
    27	
    28	/** Field-like family: DzInput, DzTextarea, DzSelect */
    29	export type InputVariant = 'outline' | 'filled' | 'underlined'
    30	
    31	/** Alert-like family: DzAlert, DzCallout */
    32	export type AlertVariant = 'filled' | 'outline' | 'subtle' | 'ghost'
    33	
    34	/** Badge-like family: DzBadge, DzTag */
    35	export type BadgeVariant = 'solid' | 'outline' | 'subtle'
    36	
    37	/** Tabs family: DzTabs */
    38	export type TabsVariant = 'line' | 'enclosed' | 'pills'
    39	
    40	/** Progress family: DzProgress */
    41	export type ProgressVariant = 'bar' | 'circular'
    42	
    43	/** Chip family: DzChip */
    44	export type ChipVariant = 'solid' | 'outline' | 'subtle'
    45	
    46	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    47	// Union helpers
    48	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    49	
    50	/**
    51	 * Union of every family variant type.
    52	 * Useful for generic utilities that accept any variant string.
    53	 */
    54	export type AnyVariant
    55	  = | ButtonVariant
    56	    | CardVariant
    57	    | InputVariant
    58	    | AlertVariant
    59	    | BadgeVariant
    60	    | TabsVariant
    61	    | ProgressVariant
    62	    | ChipVariant

     1	/**
     2	 * @dzup-ui/contracts
     3	 *
     4	 * Canonical public API contracts (types, events, slots) for all dzup-ui
     5	 * components. Every public component MUST conform to these interfaces.
     6	 *
     7	 * This package is types-only with one exception: {@link assertNever} is a
     8	 * tiny runtime helper for exhaustive switch checking.
     9	 *
    10	 * Dependency: `vue` (for `Ref`, `InjectionKey` types only).
    11	 * Does NOT depend on `@dzup-ui/tokens` at runtime.
    12	 */
    13	
    14	// Canonical taxonomies & variant enums
    15	export type {
    16	  AlertVariant,
    17	  AnyVariant,
    18	  BadgeVariant,
    19	  ButtonVariant,
    20	  CanonicalSize,
    21	  CanonicalTone,
    22	  CardVariant,
    23	  ChipVariant,
    24	  InputVariant,
    25	  ProgressVariant,
    26	  TabsVariant,
    27	} from './canonical.types'
    28	
    29	// Compound component context types
    30	export type {
    31	  CompoundContext,
    32	  CompoundRegistration,
    33	} from './compound.types'
    34	
    35	// Data attribute types
    36	export type {
    37	  DataAttributes,
    38	  DataState,
    39	} from './data-attributes.types'
    40	
    41	// Event interfaces
    42	export type {
    43	  BaseEvents,
    44	  ChangeEvents,
    45	  ChangeMetadata,
    46	  InputEvents,
    47	  OpenableEvents,
    48	  SelectEvents,
    49	  SelectOpenableEvents,
    50	} from './events.types'
    51	
    52	// Base prop interfaces
    53	export type {
    54	  BaseAccessibilityProps,
    55	  BaseAppearanceProps,
    56	  BaseBehaviorProps,
    57	  BaseFormControlProps,
    58	  BaseInteractiveProps,
    59	  BaseValidationProps,
    60	} from './props.types'
    61	
    62	// Slot prop interfaces
    63	export type {
    64	  ActionsSlotProps,
    65	  AffixSlotProps,
    66	  DefaultSlotProps,
    67	  DescriptionSlotProps,
    68	  EmptySlotProps,
    69	  FooterSlotProps,
    70	  HeaderSlotProps,
    71	  ItemSlotProps,
    72	  LabelSlotProps,
    73	  TriggerSlotProps,
    74	} from './slots.types'
    75	
    76	// Utility types
    77	export type {
    78	  Branded,
    79	  EmitPayload,
    80	  OptionalProps,
    81	  Prettify,
    82	  RequireProps,
    83	} from './utility.types'
    84	
    85	// Runtime exports
    86	export { assertNever } from './utility.types'

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * Token Generation Script
     3	 *
     4	 * Reads all token definitions and generates:
     5	 * - dist/tokens.css       — All CSS custom properties
     6	 * - dist/tokens.d.ts      — TypeScript type definitions
     7	 * - dist/tailwind-theme.js — Tailwind CSS 4 theme extension
     8	 * - dist/tailwind-theme.d.ts — Types for the Tailwind theme
     9	 *
    10	 * Run via: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
    11	 */
    12	
    13	import { mkdirSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    14	import { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
    15	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'
    16	
    17	import { APPSHELL_TOKENS } from './component/appshell.js'
    18	import { BADGE_TOKENS } from './component/badge.js'
    19	// Component
    20	import { BUTTON_TOKENS } from './component/button.js'
    21	import { CARD_TOKENS } from './component/card.js'
    22	import { CONTROL_TOKENS } from './component/control.js'
    23	import { DIALOG_TOKENS } from './component/dialog.js'
    24	import { INPUT_TOKENS } from './component/input.js'
    25	import { SIDEBAR_TOKENS } from './component/sidebar.js'
    26	import { generateBreakpointCssVars } from './primitives/breakpoints.js'
    27	// Primitives
    28	import { generateColorCssVars } from './primitives/colors.js'
    29	import { generateRadiusCssVars } from './primitives/radius.js'
    30	
    31	import { generateShadowCssVars, generateShadowDarkCssVars } from './primitives/shadows.js'
    32	import { generateSpacingCssVars } from './primitives/spacing.js'
    33	
    34	import { generateTransitionCssVars } from './primitives/transitions.js'
    35	import { generateTypographyCssVars } from './primitives/typography.js'
    36	import { generateZIndexCssVars } from './primitives/z-index.js'
    37	import { DARK_SEMANTIC_TOKENS } from './semantic/dark.js'
    38	// Semantic
    39	import { LIGHT_SEMANTIC_TOKENS } from './semantic/light.js'
    40	
    41	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42	// Helpers
    43	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44	
    45	const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
    46	const DIST_DIR = resolve(__dirname, '..', 'dist')
    47	
    48	function formatVars(vars: Record<string, string>, indent: string = '  '): string {
    49	  return Object.entries(vars)
    50	    .map(([key, value]) => `${indent}${key}: ${value};`)
    51	    .join('\n')
    52	}
    53	
    54	function extractTokenNames(vars: Record<string, string>): string[] {
    55	  return Object.keys(vars)
    56	}
    57	
    58	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59	// CSS Generation
    60	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61	
    62	function generateCss(): string {
    63	  const primitiveColors = generateColorCssVars()
    64	  const spacing = generateSpacingCssVars()
    65	  const typography = generateTypographyCssVars()
    66	  const radius = generateRadiusCssVars()
    67	  const shadows = generateShadowCssVars()
    68	  const shadowsDark = generateShadowDarkCssVars()
    69	  const transitions = generateTransitionCssVars()
    70	  const zIndex = generateZIndexCssVars()
    71	  const breakpoints = generateBreakpointCssVars()
    72	
    73	  const componentTokens = {
    74	    ...BUTTON_TOKENS,
    75	    ...CONTROL_TOKENS,
    76	    ...INPUT_TOKENS,
    77	    ...CARD_TOKENS,
    78	    ...BADGE_TOKENS,
    79	    ...DIALOG_TOKENS,
    80	    ...SIDEBAR_TOKENS,
    81	    ...APPSHELL_TOKENS,
    82	  }
    83	
    84	  return `/**
    85	 * @dzup-ui/tokens — Generated CSS Custom Properties
    86	 *
    87	 * DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
    88	 * Generated by: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
    89	 * Source: packages/tokens/src/
    90	 *
    91	 * Three-tier token system:
    92	 *   Tier 1 — Primitive: raw palette and scale values
    93	 *   Tier 2 — Semantic: intent-based mappings (light/dark)
    94	 *   Tier 3 — Component: per-component overrides
    95	 *
    96	 * All token declarations are wrapped in @layer dz-tokens so that
    97	 * consumer utilities (unlayered) can override them without !important.
    98	 * The layer order is declared in packages/core/src/styles/base.css:
    99	 *   @layer dz-tokens, dz-base, dz-components;
   100	 */
   101	
   102	@layer dz-tokens {
   103	
   104	/* ==========================================================================
   105	   Tier 1: Primitive Tokens
   106	   ========================================================================== */
   107	
   108	:root {
   109	  /* ── Colors (OKLCH) ── */
   110	${formatVars(primitiveColors)}
   111	
   112	  /* ── Spacing ── */
   113	${formatVars(spacing)}
   114	
   115	  /* ── Typography ── */
   116	${formatVars(typography)}
   117	
   118	  /* ── Border Radius ── */
   119	${formatVars(radius)}
   120	
   121	  /* ── Shadows ── */
   122	${formatVars(shadows)}
   123	
   124	  /* ── Transitions ── */
   125	${formatVars(transitions)}
   126	
   127	  /* ── Z-Index ── */
   128	${formatVars(zIndex)}
   129	
   130	  /* ── Breakpoints ── */
   131	${formatVars(breakpoints)}
   132	}
   133	
   134	/* ==========================================================================
   135	   Tier 2: Semantic Tokens — Light Theme (default)
   136	   ========================================================================== */
   137	
   138	:root, [data-theme="light"] {
   139	${formatVars(LIGHT_SEMANTIC_TOKENS)}
   140	}
   141	
   142	/* ==========================================================================
   143	   Tier 2: Semantic Tokens — Dark Theme
   144	   ========================================================================== */
   145	
   146	[data-theme="dark"] {
   147	${formatVars(DARK_SEMANTIC_TOKENS)}
   148	
   149	  /* ── Dark mode shadow overrides (increased opacity) ── */
   150	${formatVars(shadowsDark)}
   151	}
   152	
   153	/* ==========================================================================
   154	   System preference fallback (when no data-theme is set explicitly)
   155	   ========================================================================== */
   156	
   157	@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
   158	  :root:not([data-theme="light"]) {
   159	${formatVars(DARK_SEMANTIC_TOKENS, '    ')}
   160	
   161	    /* ── Dark mode shadow overrides ── */
   162	${formatVars(shadowsDark, '    ')}
   163	  }
   164	}
   165	
   166	/* ==========================================================================
   167	   Tier 3: Component Tokens
   168	   ========================================================================== */
   169	
   170	:root {
   171	${formatVars(componentTokens)}
   172	}
   173	
   174	} /* end @layer dz-tokens */
   175	
   176	/* ==========================================================================
   177	   Reduced Motion
   178	   Kept outside @layer — these safety overrides must always win.
   179	   ========================================================================== */
   180	
   181	@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
   182	  *, *::before, *::after {
   183	    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
   184	    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
   185	    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
   186	  }
   187	}
   188	`
   189	}
   190	
   191	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   192	// TypeScript Types Generation
   193	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   194	
   195	function generateTypes(): string {
   196	  const allPrimitiveVars = {
   197	    ...generateColorCssVars(),
   198	    ...generateSpacingCssVars(),
   199	    ...generateTypographyCssVars(),
   200	    ...generateRadiusCssVars(),
   201	    ...generateShadowCssVars(),
   202	    ...generateTransitionCssVars(),
   203	    ...generateZIndexCssVars(),
   204	    ...generateBreakpointCssVars(),
   205	  }
   206	
   207	  const componentTokens = {
   208	    ...BUTTON_TOKENS,
   209	    ...CONTROL_TOKENS,
   210	    ...INPUT_TOKENS,
   211	    ...CARD_TOKENS,
   212	    ...BADGE_TOKENS,
   213	    ...DIALOG_TOKENS,
   214	    ...SIDEBAR_TOKENS,
   215	    ...APPSHELL_TOKENS,
   216	  }
   217	
   218	  const primitiveNames = extractTokenNames(allPrimitiveVars)
   219	  const semanticNames = extractTokenNames(LIGHT_SEMANTIC_TOKENS)
   220	  const componentNames = extractTokenNames(componentTokens)
   221	
   222	  function toUnionType(names: string[]): string {
   223	    return names.map(n => `  | '${n}'`).join('\n')
   224	  }
   225	
   226	  return `/**
   227	 * @dzup-ui/tokens — Generated TypeScript Definitions
   228	 *
   229	 * DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
   230	 * Generated by: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
   231	 */
   232	
   233	/** All primitive token CSS custom property names */
   234	export type PrimitiveToken =
   235	${toUnionType(primitiveNames)};
   236	
   237	/** All semantic token CSS custom property names */
   238	export type SemanticToken =
   239	${toUnionType(semanticNames)};
   240	
   241	/** All component token CSS custom property names */
   242	export type ComponentToken =
   243	${toUnionType(componentNames)};
   244	
   245	/** Union of all design token CSS custom property names */
   246	export type DesignToken = PrimitiveToken | SemanticToken | ComponentToken;
   247	
   248	/** Theme mode */
   249	export type ThemeMode = 'light' | 'dark' | 'system';
   250	
   251	/** Resolved theme (no 'system') */
   252	export type ResolvedTheme = 'light' | 'dark';
   253	`
   254	}
   255	
   256	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   257	// Tailwind CSS 4 Theme Generation
   258	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   259	
   260	function generateTailwindTheme(): string {
   261	  const colorVars = generateColorCssVars()
   262	  const spacing = generateSpacingCssVars()
   263	  const radius = generateRadiusCssVars()
   264	  const shadows = generateShadowCssVars()
   265	
   266	  // Build color entries: primary-50 through primary-950, etc.
   267	  const colorEntries: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {}
   268	  for (const key of Object.keys(colorVars)) {
   269	    // --dz-colors-{palette}-{shade} -> palette, shade
   270	    const match = key.match(/^--dz-colors-(\w+)-(\d+)$/)
   271	    if (match) {
   272	      const palette = match[1] ?? ''
   273	      const shade = match[2] ?? ''
   274	      if (!colorEntries[palette]) {
   275	        colorEntries[palette] = {}
   276	      }
   277	      const paletteObj = colorEntries[palette]
   278	      if (paletteObj) {
   279	        paletteObj[shade] = `var(${key})`
   280	      }
   281	    }
   282	  }
   283	
   284	  // Semantic color mappings for Tailwind
   285	  const semanticColors: Record<string, string | Record<string, string>> = {
   286	    background: 'var(--dz-background)',
   287	    foreground: 'var(--dz-foreground)',
   288	    surface: 'var(--dz-surface)',
   289	    muted: {
   290	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-muted)',
   291	      foreground: 'var(--dz-muted-foreground)',
   292	    },
   293	    border: 'var(--dz-border)',
   294	    ring: 'var(--dz-ring)',
   295	    primary: {
   296	      ...colorEntries.primary,
   297	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-primary)',
   298	      foreground: 'var(--dz-primary-foreground)',
   299	    },
   300	    secondary: {

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * Theme Initialization Script (FOUC Prevention)
     3	 *
     4	 * This script must be placed in the `<head>` of the HTML document
     5	 * BEFORE any content renders. It reads the user's theme preference
     6	 * from localStorage and sets the `data-theme` attribute on `<html>`
     7	 * immediately, preventing a flash of unstyled/wrong-theme content.
     8	 *
     9	 * ADR-15: Theme persistence and FOUC prevention.
    10	 *
    11	 * Usage:
    12	 *   import { themeScript } from '@dzup-ui/tokens/utils'
    13	 *
    14	 *   // In your HTML template or SSR head:
    15	 *   `<script>${themeScript}</script>`
    16	 */
    17	
    18	/**
    19	 * Inline script string for `<head>`.
    20	 * Reads `localStorage('dz-theme')`, resolves 'system' to actual preference,
    21	 * and sets `data-theme` on `document.documentElement`.
    22	 */
    23	export const themeScript = `(function(){try{var t=localStorage.getItem('dz-theme');if(t==='light'||t==='dark'){document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',t)}else{var d=window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches?'dark':'light';document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',d)}}catch(e){}})();`
    24	
    25	/**
    26	 * The localStorage key used for theme persistence.
    27	 * Must match the key used in DzThemeProvider.
    28	 */
    29	export const THEME_STORAGE_KEY = 'dz-theme'

   386	 *
   387	 * Usage in tailwind.config:
   388	 *   import { dzTokens } from '@dzup-ui/tokens/tailwind'
   389	 *   export default { theme: { extend: dzTokens } }
   390	 *
   391	 * Or with Tailwind CSS 4 @theme directive, import tokens.css directly.
   392	 */
   393	
   394	/** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config['theme']} */
   395	export const dzTokens = ${JSON.stringify(theme, null, 2)};
   396	
   397	export default dzTokens;
   398	`
   399	}
   400	
   401	function generateTailwindThemeTypes(): string {
   402	  return `/**
   403	 * @dzup-ui/tokens — Tailwind Theme Type Definitions
   404	 *
   405	 * DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.

   413	export default dzTokens;
   414	`
   415	}
   416	
   417	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   418	// Main
   419	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   420	
   421	function main(): void {

   423	
   424	  const css = generateCss()
   425	  const types = generateTypes()
   426	  const tailwindTheme = generateTailwindTheme()
   427	  const tailwindThemeTypes = generateTailwindThemeTypes()

   442	  /* eslint-enable no-console */
   443	}
   444	
   445	main()

     1	<!--
     2	  DzThemeProvider — Provides theme context to the component tree.
     3	
     4	  Uses provide() with DZ_THEME_KEY (ADR-08) to expose the minimal
     5	  useTheme API (ADR-09): theme, resolvedTheme, setTheme, toggleTheme.
     6	
     7	  Persists to localStorage key (default 'dz-theme') and sets a data
     8	  attribute on document.documentElement (ADR-15).
     9	
    10	  SSR-safe: all window/document access is deferred to onMounted().
    11	
    12	  @module @dzup-ui/core/providers/DzThemeProvider
    13	-->
    14	
    15	<script setup lang="ts">
    16	import type { DzThemeProviderProps, ResolvedTheme, ThemePreference } from './DzThemeProvider.types'
    17	import { computed, onMounted, onUnmounted, provide, ref, watch } from 'vue'
    18	import { DZ_THEME_KEY } from './DzThemeProvider.types'
    19	
    20	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21	// Props
    22	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    23	
    24	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzThemeProviderProps>(), {
    25	  defaultTheme: 'system',
    26	  storageKey: 'dz-theme',
    27	  attribute: 'data-theme',
    28	})
    29	
    30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31	// Helpers
    32	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    33	
    34	/** Check if code is running in a browser environment */
    35	function isBrowser(): boolean {
    36	  return typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof document !== 'undefined'
    37	}
    38	
    39	/** Read persisted theme from localStorage (returns null if unavailable) */
    40	function readPersistedTheme(): ThemePreference | null {
    41	  if (!isBrowser())
    42	    return null
    43	  try {
    44	    const stored = localStorage.getItem(props.storageKey)
    45	    if (stored === 'light' || stored === 'dark' || stored === 'system') {
    46	      return stored
    47	    }
    48	  }
    49	  catch {
    50	    // localStorage may throw in restricted contexts (e.g. iframe sandboxes)
    51	  }
    52	  return null
    53	}
    54	
    55	/** Persist theme to localStorage */
    56	function persistTheme(value: ThemePreference): void {
    57	  if (!isBrowser())
    58	    return
    59	  try {
    60	    localStorage.setItem(props.storageKey, value)
    61	  }
    62	  catch {
    63	    // Silently ignore storage errors
    64	  }
    65	}
    66	
    67	/** Apply the theme attribute to document.documentElement */
    68	function applyAttribute(resolved: ResolvedTheme): void {
    69	  if (!isBrowser())
    70	    return
    71	  document.documentElement.setAttribute(props.attribute, resolved)
    72	}
    73	
    74	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    75	// Reactive state
    76	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    77	
    78	const theme = ref<ThemePreference>(readPersistedTheme() ?? props.defaultTheme)
    79	const systemPrefersDark = ref(false)
    80	
    81	/** Resolved theme: converts 'system' to actual light/dark */
    82	const resolvedTheme = computed<ResolvedTheme>(() => {
    83	  if (theme.value === 'system') {
    84	    return systemPrefersDark.value ? 'dark' : 'light'
    85	  }
    86	  return theme.value
    87	})
    88	
    89	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    90	// Media query listener
    91	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    92	
    93	let mediaQuery: MediaQueryList | null = null
    94	
    95	function handleMediaChange(event: MediaQueryListEvent): void {
    96	  systemPrefersDark.value = event.matches
    97	}
    98	
    99	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100	// Watchers
   101	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   102	
   103	// Sync resolved theme to DOM attribute
   104	watch(resolvedTheme, (resolved) => {
   105	  applyAttribute(resolved)
   106	})
   107	
   108	// Persist preference changes to localStorage
   109	watch(theme, (value) => {
   110	  persistTheme(value)
   111	})
   112	
   113	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   114	// SSR-safe lifecycle (ADR-15)
   115	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   116	
   117	onMounted(() => {
   118	  if (!isBrowser())
   119	    return
   120	
   121	  mediaQuery = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
   122	  systemPrefersDark.value = mediaQuery.matches
   123	
   124	  mediaQuery.addEventListener('change', handleMediaChange)
   125	
   126	  // Apply initial theme attribute
   127	  applyAttribute(resolvedTheme.value)
   128	})
   129	
   130	onUnmounted(() => {
   131	  if (mediaQuery) {
   132	    mediaQuery.removeEventListener('change', handleMediaChange)
   133	    mediaQuery = null
   134	  }
   135	})
   136	
   137	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   138	// Public API (ADR-09 minimal)
   139	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   140	
   141	/** Set the theme preference */
   142	function setTheme(value: ThemePreference): void {
   143	  theme.value = value
   144	}
   145	
   146	/** Toggle between light and dark (if 'system', resolves to opposite of current) */
   147	function toggleTheme(): void {
   148	  theme.value = resolvedTheme.value === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'
   149	}
   150	
   151	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   152	// Provide context (ADR-08)
   153	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   154	
   155	provide(DZ_THEME_KEY, {
   156	  theme,
   157	  resolvedTheme,
   158	  setTheme,
   159	  toggleTheme,
   160	})
   161	</script>
   162	
   163	<template>
   164	  <slot />
   165	</template>

     1	/**
