 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * useDataGridPagination — Pagination logic extracted from useDataGrid.
     3	 *
     4	 * Handles page state, page size, and slicing of sorted data for display.
     5	 *
     6	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/composables/useDataGrid
     7	 */
     8	
     9	import type { ComputedRef, Ref } from 'vue'
    10	import type { PaginationConfig } from '../../components/data/DzDataGrid.types.ts'
    11	import { computed, ref } from 'vue'
    12	
    13	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14	// Options
    15	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16	
    17	/** Options for the useDataGridPagination composable */
    18	export interface UseDataGridPaginationOptions<T> {
    19	  /** Sorted (pre-pagination) data */
    20	  sortedData: ComputedRef<T[]>
    21	  /** Pagination configuration (false = disabled) */
    22	  paginationConfig: Readonly<Ref<boolean | PaginationConfig>>
    23	  /** Initial page size override */
    24	  initialPageSize?: number
    25	  /** Callback when page changes */
    26	  onPageChange?: (page: number) => void
    27	  /** Callback when page size changes */
    28	  onPageSizeChange?: (pageSize: number) => void
    29	}
    30	
    31	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32	// Return type
    33	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34	
    35	/** Return value of the useDataGridPagination composable */
    36	export interface UseDataGridPaginationReturn<T> {
    37	  /** Paginated data for current view */
    38	  displayData: ComputedRef<T[]>
    39	  /** Total number of rows (before pagination) */
    40	  totalRows: ComputedRef<number>
    41	  /** Current page (1-based) */
    42	  currentPage: Ref<number>
    43	  /** Current page size */
    44	  pageSize: Ref<number>
    45	  /** Total number of pages */
    46	  totalPages: ComputedRef<number>
    47	  /** Go to a specific page */
    48	  goToPage: (page: number) => void
    49	  /** Change page size */
    50	  changePageSize: (size: number) => void
    51	  /** Reset page to 1 (used by sort/filter changes) */
    52	  resetPage: () => void
    53	}
    54	
    55	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    56	// Composable
    57	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58	
    59	/**
    60	 * Manages pagination state and data slicing for the data grid.
    61	 *
    62	 * @typeParam T - Row data type
    63	 */
    64	export function useDataGridPagination<T>(
    65	  options: UseDataGridPaginationOptions<T>,
    66	): UseDataGridPaginationReturn<T> {
    67	  const currentPage = ref(1)
    68	
    69	  const defaultPageSize = (() => {
    70	    if (options.initialPageSize !== undefined)
    71	      return options.initialPageSize
    72	    const config = options.paginationConfig.value
    73	    if (typeof config === 'object')
    74	      return config.pageSize
    75	    return 10
    76	  })()
    77	
    78	  const pageSize = ref<number>(defaultPageSize)
    79	
    80	  // ── Total rows ──
    81	  const totalRows = computed(() => options.sortedData.value.length)
    82	
    83	  // ── Total pages ──
    84	  const totalPages = computed(() => {
    85	    if (!options.paginationConfig.value)
    86	      return 1
    87	    return Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalRows.value / pageSize.value))
    88	  })
    89	
    90	  // ── Display data (sorted + paginated) ──
    91	  const displayData = computed<T[]>(() => {
    92	    const sorted = options.sortedData.value
    93	    if (!options.paginationConfig.value)
    94	      return sorted
    95	
    96	    const start = (currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value
    97	    const end = start + pageSize.value
    98	    return sorted.slice(start, end)
    99	  })
   100	
   101	  // ── Actions ──
   102	  function goToPage(page: number): void {
   103	    const clamped = Math.max(1, Math.min(page, totalPages.value))
   104	    currentPage.value = clamped
   105	    options.onPageChange?.(clamped)
   106	  }
   107	
   108	  function changePageSize(size: number): void {
   109	    pageSize.value = size
   110	    currentPage.value = 1
   111	    options.onPageSizeChange?.(size)
   112	  }
   113	
   114	  function resetPage(): void {
   115	    currentPage.value = 1
   116	  }
   117	
   118	  return {
   119	    displayData,
   120	    totalRows,
   121	    currentPage,
   122	    pageSize,
   123	    totalPages,
   124	    goToPage,
   125	    changePageSize,
   126	    resetPage,
   127	  }
   128	}

   102	  toggleAllSelection: grid.toggleAllSelection,

   104	  isAllSelected: grid.isAllSelected,

   107	
   108	provide(DZ_DATA_GRID_KEY, context)

   110	const styles = computed(() =>

   112	)
   113	
   114	const rootClasses = computed(() =>
   115	  cn(styles.value.root(), attrs.class as string | undefined),
   116	)
   117	
   118	const pageSizeOptions = computed<number[]>(() => {
   119	  if (typeof props.pagination === 'object') {
   120	    return (props.pagination as PaginationConfig).pageSizeOptions ?? [10, 25, 50, 100]
   121	  }
   122	  return [10, 25, 50, 100]
   123	})
   124	
   125	function handleRowClick(row: Record<string, unknown>, index: number): void {
   126	  emit('rowClick', row as T, index)
   127	}
   128	</script>

   130	<script lang="ts">
   131	export default {

   181	      :page="grid.currentPage.value"
   182	      :page-size="grid.pageSize.value"
   183	      :total="grid.totalRows.value"

     1	<script setup lang="ts">
     2	import type { ColumnDef } from './DzDataGrid.types.ts'
     3	/**
     4	 * DzDataGridBody — Internal body sub-part for DzDataGrid.
     5	 *
     6	 * Renders data rows with selection and cell rendering.
     7	 * Injects DzDataGrid context (ADR-08).
     8	 */
     9	import { computed, inject } from 'vue'
    10	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
    11	import { DZ_DATA_GRID_KEY } from './DzDataGrid.types.ts'
    12	import { dataGridVariants } from './DzDataGrid.variants.ts'
    13	
    14	defineProps<{
    15	  /** Key field for row identity */
    16	  rowKey?: string
    17	}>()
    18	
    19	const emit = defineEmits<{
    20	  rowClick: [row: Record<string, unknown>, index: number]
    21	}>()
    22	
    23	const ctx = inject(DZ_DATA_GRID_KEY, null)
    24	if (!ctx) {
    25	  if (import.meta.env?.DEV) {
    26	    console.warn('[DzDataGridBody] must be used inside a <DzDataGrid> parent.')
    27	  }
    28	}
    29	
    30	const styles = computed(() =>
    31	  dataGridVariants({
    32	    size: ctx!.size.value,
    33	    density: ctx!.density.value,
    34	  }),
    35	)
    36	
    37	function getAlignClass(align?: 'left' | 'center' | 'right'): string {
    38	  if (align === 'center')
    39	    return 'text-center'
    40	  if (align === 'right')
    41	    return 'text-right'
    42	  return 'text-left'
    43	}
    44	
    45	function getColumnStyle(col: ColumnDef<Record<string, unknown>>): string | undefined {
    46	  if (!col.width)
    47	    return undefined
    48	  const w = typeof col.width === 'number' ? `${col.width}px` : col.width
    49	  return `width: ${w}; min-width: ${w}`
    50	}
    51	
    52	function handleRowClick(row: Record<string, unknown>, index: number): void {
    53	  emit('rowClick', row, index)
    54	  if (ctx!.selectable.value) {
    55	    ctx!.toggleRowSelection(row)
    56	  }
    57	}
    58	</script>
    59	
    60	<script lang="ts">
    61	export default {
    62	  inheritAttrs: false,
    63	}
    64	</script>
    65	
    66	<template>
    67	  <tbody :class="styles.body()">
    68	    <tr
    69	      v-for="(row, index) in ctx!.data.value"
    70	      :key="rowKey ? String(row[rowKey]) : index"
    71	      :class="cn(styles.row(), ctx!.isRowSelected(row) ? 'bg-[var(--dz-primary-muted)]' : '')"
    72	      :aria-selected="ctx!.isRowSelected(row) || undefined"
    73	      :data-state="ctx!.isRowSelected(row) ? 'selected' : undefined"
    74	      role="row"
    75	      @click="handleRowClick(row, index)"
    76	    >
    77	      <td
    78	        v-if="ctx!.selectable.value === 'multiple'"
    79	        :class="cn(styles.cell(), 'w-[var(--dz-spacing-10)]')"
    80	        role="gridcell"
    81	      >
    82	        <input
    83	          type="checkbox"
    84	          :class="styles.checkbox()"
    85	          :checked="ctx!.isRowSelected(row)"
    86	          :aria-label="`Select row ${index + 1}`"
    87	          @click.stop
    88	          @change="ctx!.toggleRowSelection(row)"
    89	        >
    90	      </td>
    91	      <td
    92	        v-for="col in ctx!.columns.value"
    93	        :key="col.field"
    94	        :class="cn(styles.cell(), getAlignClass(col.align))"
    95	        :style="getColumnStyle(col)"
    96	        role="gridcell"
    97	      >
    98	        <slot name="cell" :row="row" :column="col" :value="row[col.field]">
    99	          {{ row[col.field] }}
   100	        </slot>
   101	      </td>
   102	    </tr>
   103	  </tbody>
   104	</template>

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba packages/core/src/composables/useDataGridHeader/useDataGridHeader.ts | sed -n '1,320p'" in /media/ninel/Second/code/datazup/ai-internal-dev/ui/dzup-ui
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * useDataGridHeader — Extracted header logic for DzDataGridHeader.
     3	 *
     4	 * Manages filter popover state, column alignment/styling helpers,
     5	 * keyboard navigation, and filter input/operator handling.
     6	 *
     7	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/composables/useDataGridHeader
     8	 */
     9	
    10	import type { Ref } from 'vue'
    11	import type {
    12	  ColumnDef,
    13	  DzDataGridContext,
    14	  FilterOperator,
    15	} from '../../components/data/DzDataGrid.types.ts'
    16	import { ref } from 'vue'
    17	
    18	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19	// Options
    20	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21	
    22	/** Options for the useDataGridHeader composable */
    23	export interface UseDataGridHeaderOptions {
    24	  /** Injected DzDataGrid context (ADR-08) */
    25	  ctx: DzDataGridContext
    26	}
    27	
    28	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29	// Return type
    30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31	
    32	/** Return value of the useDataGridHeader composable */
    33	export interface UseDataGridHeaderReturn {
    34	  /** Which column's filter popover is currently open (null = none) */
    35	  openFilterField: Ref<string | null>
    36	  /** Get text-alignment class for a column */
    37	  getAlignClass: (align?: 'left' | 'center' | 'right') => string
    38	  /** Get inline style for column width */
    39	  getColumnStyle: (col: ColumnDef<Record<string, unknown>>) => string | undefined
    40	  /** Handle keyboard sort trigger on header cell */
    41	  handleHeaderKeyDown: (event: KeyboardEvent, field: string) => void
    42	  /** Check if a column supports filtering */
    43	  isColumnFilterable: (col: ColumnDef<Record<string, unknown>>) => boolean
    44	  /** Check if a column has an active filter */
    45	  hasActiveFilter: (field: string) => boolean
    46	  /** Get the current filter value for a column */
    47	  getFilterValue: (field: string) => string | number
    48	  /** Get the current filter operator for a column */
    49	  getFilterOperator: (field: string) => FilterOperator
    50	  /** Toggle a column's filter popover open/closed */
    51	  toggleFilterPopover: (event: Event, field: string) => void
    52	  /** Handle text/number filter input changes */
    53	  handleFilterInput: (field: string, value: string, col: ColumnDef<Record<string, unknown>>) => void
    54	  /** Handle filter operator selection changes */
    55	  handleOperatorChange: (field: string, operator: FilterOperator) => void
    56	  /** Handle keyboard events within the filter popover (Escape to close) */
    57	  handleFilterKeyDown: (event: KeyboardEvent) => void
    58	  /** Handle clearing a column's filter */
    59	  handleClearFilter: (event: Event, field: string) => void
    60	}
    61	
    62	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63	// Composable
    64	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    65	
    66	/**
    67	 * Extracts header interaction logic from DzDataGridHeader.
    68	 *
    69	 * Keeps the component file as a thin rendering layer while
    70	 * this composable owns all stateful logic and event handlers.
    71	 */
    72	export function useDataGridHeader(
    73	  options: UseDataGridHeaderOptions,
    74	): UseDataGridHeaderReturn {
    75	  const { ctx } = options
    76	
    77	  /** Track which column's filter popover is open */
    78	  const openFilterField = ref<string | null>(null)
    79	
    80	  function getAlignClass(align?: 'left' | 'center' | 'right'): string {
    81	    if (align === 'center')
    82	      return 'text-center'
    83	    if (align === 'right')
    84	      return 'text-right'
    85	    return 'text-left'
    86	  }
    87	
    88	  function getColumnStyle(col: ColumnDef<Record<string, unknown>>): string | undefined {
    89	    if (!col.width)
    90	      return undefined
    91	    const w = typeof col.width === 'number' ? `${col.width}px` : col.width
    92	    return `width: ${w}; min-width: ${w}`
    93	  }
    94	
    95	  function handleHeaderKeyDown(event: KeyboardEvent, field: string): void {
    96	    if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
    97	      event.preventDefault()
    98	      ctx.sort(field)
    99	    }
   100	  }
   101	
   102	  function isColumnFilterable(col: ColumnDef<Record<string, unknown>>): boolean {
   103	    return ctx.filterable.value && col.filterable !== false
   104	  }
   105	
   106	  function hasActiveFilter(field: string): boolean {
   107	    return ctx.filters.value.some(f => f.column === field)
   108	  }
   109	
   110	  function getFilterValue(field: string): string | number {
   111	    const filter = ctx.filters.value.find(f => f.column === field)
   112	    return filter?.value ?? ''
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  function getFilterOperator(field: string): FilterOperator {
   116	    const filter = ctx.filters.value.find(f => f.column === field)
   117	    return filter?.operator ?? 'contains'
   118	  }
   119	
   120	  function toggleFilterPopover(event: Event, field: string): void {
   121	    event.stopPropagation()
   122	    openFilterField.value = openFilterField.value === field ? null : field
   123	  }
   124	
   125	  function handleFilterInput(
   126	    field: string,
   127	    value: string,
   128	    col: ColumnDef<Record<string, unknown>>,
   129	  ): void {
   130	    const filterType = col.filterType ?? 'text'
   131	    const operator: FilterOperator
   132	      = filterType === 'number'
   133	        ? getFilterOperator(field)
   134	        : filterType === 'select'
   135	          ? 'equals'
   136	          : 'contains'
   137	
   138	    if (value === '') {
   139	      ctx.clearFilter(field)
   140	      return
   141	    }
   142	
   143	    const filterValue = filterType === 'number' ? Number(value) : value
   144	    ctx.setFilter(field, { column: field, value: filterValue, operator })
   145	  }
   146	
   147	  function handleOperatorChange(field: string, operator: FilterOperator): void {
   148	    const currentValue = getFilterValue(field)
   149	    if (currentValue === '' || currentValue === undefined)
   150	      return
   151	    ctx.setFilter(field, { column: field, value: currentValue, operator })
   152	  }
   153	
   154	  function handleFilterKeyDown(event: KeyboardEvent): void {
   155	    if (event.key === 'Escape') {
   156	      openFilterField.value = null
   157	    }
   158	  }
   159	
   160	  function handleClearFilter(event: Event, field: string): void {
   161	    event.stopPropagation()
   162	    ctx.clearFilter(field)
   163	  }
   164	
   165	  return {
   166	    openFilterField,
   167	    getAlignClass,
   168	    getColumnStyle,
   169	    handleHeaderKeyDown,
   170	    isColumnFilterable,
   171	    hasActiveFilter,
   172	    getFilterValue,
   173	    getFilterOperator,
   174	    toggleFilterPopover,
   175	    handleFilterInput,
   176	    handleOperatorChange,
   177	    handleFilterKeyDown,
   178	    handleClearFilter,
   179	  }
   180	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	<script setup lang="ts">
     2	import type {
     3	  DzTreeContext,
     4	  DzTreeEmits,
     5	  DzTreeProps,
     6	  DzTreeSlots,
     7	  TreeNode,
     8	} from './DzTree.types.ts'
     9	/**
    10	 * DzTree — Hierarchical tree view with expand/collapse, selection, and checkboxes.
    11	 *
    12	 * Built from scratch (not Reka UI). Provides context to DzTreeItem
    13	 * children via inject (ADR-08). v-model for expandedKeys and selectedKeys (ADR-16).
    14	 *
    15	 * @example
    16	 * ``\`vue
    17	 * <DzTree
    18	 *   :items="treeData"
    19	 *   v-model:expanded-keys="expanded"
    20	 *   v-model:selected-keys="selected"
    21	 *   selectable
    22	 * />
    23	 * ``\`
    24	 */
    25	import { computed, provide, toRef, useAttrs } from 'vue'
    26	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
    27	import { DZ_TREE_KEY } from './DzTree.types.ts'
    28	import { treeVariants } from './DzTree.variants.ts'
    29	import DzTreeItem from './DzTreeItem.vue'
    30	
    31	const expandedKeys = defineModel<string[]>('expandedKeys', { default: () => [] })
    32	
    33	const selectedKeys = defineModel<string[]>('selectedKeys', { default: () => [] })
    34	
    35	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzTreeProps>(), {
    36	  selectable: false,
    37	  checkable: false,
    38	  draggable: false,
    39	  size: 'md',
    40	  disabled: false,
    41	  loading: false,
    42	})
    43	
    44	const emit = defineEmits<DzTreeEmits>()
    45	defineSlots<DzTreeSlots>()
    46	
    47	const attrs = useAttrs()
    48	
    49	/** Find a node by key in the tree structure */
    50	function findNode(nodes: TreeNode[], key: string): TreeNode | undefined {
    51	  for (const node of nodes) {
    52	    if (node.key === key)
    53	      return node
    54	    if (node.children) {
    55	      const found = findNode(node.children, key)
    56	      if (found)
    57	        return found
    58	    }
    59	  }
    60	  return undefined
    61	}
    62	
    63	function toggleExpand(key: string): void {
    64	  const node = findNode(props.items, key)
    65	  if (!node)
    66	    return
    67	
    68	  const index = expandedKeys.value.indexOf(key)
    69	  if (index >= 0) {
    70	    expandedKeys.value = expandedKeys.value.filter(k => k !== key)
    71	    emit('nodeCollapse', node)
    72	  }
    73	  else {
    74	    expandedKeys.value = [...expandedKeys.value, key]
    75	    emit('nodeExpand', node)
    76	  }
    77	}
    78	
    79	function toggleSelect(key: string): void {
    80	  const node = findNode(props.items, key)
    81	  if (!node)
    82	    return
    83	
    84	  const index = selectedKeys.value.indexOf(key)
    85	  if (index >= 0) {
    86	    selectedKeys.value = selectedKeys.value.filter(k => k !== key)
    87	  }
    88	  else {
    89	    selectedKeys.value = [...selectedKeys.value, key]
    90	  }
    91	
    92	  emit('nodeClick', node)
    93	}
    94	
    95	const context: DzTreeContext = {
    96	  size: toRef(() => props.size),
    97	  expandedKeys,
    98	  selectedKeys,
    99	  selectable: toRef(() => props.selectable),
   100	  checkable: toRef(() => props.checkable),
   101	  toggleExpand,
   102	  toggleSelect,
   103	}
   104

     2	import type { DzTreeItemProps, DzTreeItemSlots, TreeNode } from './DzTree.types.ts'
     3	/**
     4	 * DzTreeItem — Single node in a DzTree hierarchy.
     5	 *
     6	 * Injects context from parent DzTree via DZ_TREE_KEY (ADR-08).
     7	 * Recursively renders children for nested tree structures.
     8	 */
     9	import { computed, inject, useAttrs } from 'vue'
    10	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
    11	import { DZ_TREE_KEY } from './DzTree.types.ts'
    12	import { treeVariants } from './DzTree.variants.ts'
    13	
    14	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzTreeItemProps>(), {
    15	  level: 0,
    16	})
    17	
    18	defineSlots<DzTreeItemSlots>()
    19	
    20	const attrs = useAttrs()
    21	const treeContext = inject(DZ_TREE_KEY, null)
    22	
    23	const hasChildren = computed(() =>
    24	  Array.isArray(props.node.children) && props.node.children.length > 0,
    25	)
    26	
    27	const isExpanded = computed(() =>
    28	  treeContext?.expandedKeys.value.includes(props.node.key) ?? false,
    29	)
    30	
    31	const isSelected = computed(() =>
    32	  treeContext?.selectedKeys.value.includes(props.node.key) ?? false,
    33	)
    34	
    35	const styles = computed(() =>
    36	  treeVariants({ size: treeContext?.size.value ?? 'md' }),
    37	)
    38	
    39	const itemClasses = computed(() =>
    40	  cn(
    41	    styles.value.item(),
    42	    isSelected.value ? styles.value.itemSelected() : '',
    43	    attrs.class as string | undefined,
    44	  ),
    45	)
    46	
    47	function handleClick(node: TreeNode): void {
    48	  if (node.disabled)
    49	    return
    50	
    51	  if (hasChildren.value) {
    52	    treeContext?.toggleExpand(node.key)
    53	  }
    54	
    55	  if (treeContext?.selectable.value) {
    56	    treeContext.toggleSelect(node.key)
    57	  }
    58	}
    59	
    60	function handleKeydown(event: KeyboardEvent, node: TreeNode): void {
    61	  if (node.disabled)
    62	    return
    63	
    64	  switch (event.key) {
    65	    case 'Enter':
    66	    case ' ':
    67	      event.preventDefault()
    68	      handleClick(node)
    69	      break
    70	    case 'ArrowRight':
    71	      if (hasChildren.value && !isExpanded.value) {

    74	      }
    75	      break
    76	    case 'ArrowLeft':
    77	      if (hasChildren.value && isExpanded.value) {
    78	        event.preventDefault()
    79	        treeContext?.toggleExpand(node.key)
    80	      }
    81	      break
    82	  }
    83	}
    84	</script>
    85	
    86	<script lang="ts">
    87	export default {
    88	  name: 'DzTreeItem',
    89	  inheritAttrs: false,
    90	}
    91	</script>
    92	
    93	<template>
    94	  <li
    95	    role="treeitem"
    96	    :aria-expanded="hasChildren ? isExpanded : undefined"
    97	    :aria-selected="treeContext?.selectable.value ? isSelected : undefined"
    98	    :aria-disabled="node.disabled || undefined"
    99	    :data-state="isExpanded ? 'open' : 'closed'"
   100	    :data-disabled="node.disabled ? '' : undefined"
   101	  >
   102	    <div
   103	      :class="itemClasses"
   104	      :tabindex="node.disabled ? -1 : 0"
   105	      v-bind="{ ...$attrs, class: undefined }"
   106	      @click="handleClick(node)"
   107	      @keydown="handleKeydown($event, node)"
   108	    >
   109	      <!-- Expand/collapse indicator -->
   110	      <svg
   111	        v-if="hasChildren"
   112	        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
   113	        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   114	        fill="none"
   115	        stroke="currentColor"
   116	        stroke-width="2"
   117	        stroke-linecap="round"
   118	        stroke-linejoin="round"
   119	        :class="cn(styles.expandIcon(), isExpanded ? styles.expandIconOpen() : '')"
   120	        aria-hidden="true"
   121	      >
   122	        <polyline points="9 6 15 12 9 18" />
   123	      </svg>
   124	      <span v-else :class="styles.expandIcon()" aria-hidden="true" />
   125	
   126	      <!-- Checkbox (if checkable) -->
   127	      <span
   128	        v-if="treeContext?.checkable.value"
   129	        :class="styles.checkbox()"
   130	        :data-state="isSelected ? 'checked' : 'unchecked'"
   131	        role="checkbox"
   132	        :aria-checked="isSelected"
   133	      />
   134	
   135	      <!-- Node icon -->
   136	      <component
   137	        :is="node.icon"
   138	        v-if="node.icon"
   139	        class="h-4 w-4 shrink-0"
   140	        aria-hidden="true"
   141	      />
   142	
   143	      <!-- Node content -->
   144	      <slot :node="node" :level="level" :expanded="isExpanded" :selected="isSelected">
   145	        <span :class="styles.nodeContent()">{{ node.label }}</span>
   146	      </slot>
   147	    </div>
   148	
   149	    <!-- Recursive children -->
   150	    <ul
   151	      v-if="hasChildren && isExpanded"
   152	      role="group"
   153	      :class="styles.children()"
   154	    >
   155	      <DzTreeItem
   156	        v-for="child in node.children"

   158	        :node="child"
   159	        :level="level + 1"

   161	        <template v-if="$slots.default" #default="slotProps">
   162	          <slot v-bind="slotProps" />
   163	        </template>
   164	      </DzTreeItem>
   165	    </ul>
   166	  </li>
   167	</template>

    21	 *
    22	 * @example

   100	// -- Search state -----------------------------------------------------------
   101	
   102	const searchQuery = ref('')

   105	/** Default filter: case-insensitive label match */
   106	function defaultFilter(option: { label: string, value: string, disabled?: boolean }, query: string): boolean {

   108	}
   109	
   110	const filteredItems = computed(() => {
   111	  if (!props.searchable || !searchQuery.value.trim()) {
   112	    return props.items
   113	  }
   114	  const filterFn = props.filterFn ?? defaultFilter
   115	  return props.items.filter(item => filterFn(item, searchQuery.value))
   116	})
   117	
   118	function handleSearchInput(event: Event): void {
   119	  const target = event.target as HTMLInputElement
   120	  searchQuery.value = target.value
   121	}
   122	
   123	function handleValueChange(value: string): void {
   124	  const external = toExternal(value)
   125	  model.value = external
   126	  emit('change', external)
   127	  emit('select', external)
   128	}
   129	
   130	function handleOpenChange(open: boolean): void {
   131	  if (open) {
   132	    emit('open')
   133	    if (props.searchable) {
   134	      void nextTick(() => {
   135	        searchInputRef.value?.focus()
   136	      })
   137	    }
   138	  }
   139	  else {
   140	    searchQuery.value = ''
   141	    emit('close')
   142	  }
   143	}
   144	
   145	function handleFocus(event: FocusEvent): void {
   146	  emit('focus', event)
   147	}
   148	
   149	function handleBlur(event: FocusEvent): void {
   150	  emit('blur', event)
   151	}
   152	
   153	const triggerClasses = computed(() =>
   154	  cn(styles.value.trigger(), attrs.class as string | undefined),
   155	)
   156	</script>
   157	
   158	<script lang="ts">
   159	export default {
   160	  inheritAttrs: false,
   161	}
   162	</script>
   163	
   164	<template>
   165	  <SelectRoot
   166	    :model-value="toInternal(model)"
   167	    :disabled="resolvedDisabled"
   168	    :name="name"
   169	    :required="required || fieldContext?.isRequired.value"
   170	    :default-open="defaultOpen"
   171	    @update:model-value="handleValueChange"
   172	    @update:open="handleOpenChange"

   174	    <SelectTrigger

   177	      :aria-labelledby="ariaLabelledby"
   178	      :aria-describedby="ariaDescribedby ?? fieldContext?.ariaDescribedby.value"
   179	      :aria-invalid="ariaInvalid ?? (resolvedInvalid || undefined)"

   182	      :data-tone="undefined"
   183	      :data-disabled="resolvedDisabled ? '' : undefined"
   184	      :data-invalid="resolvedInvalid ? '' : undefined"
   185	      style="contain: layout style"
   186	      v-bind="{ ...$attrs, class: undefined }"
   187	      @focus="handleFocus"
   188	      @blur="handleBlur"
   189	    >
   190	      <SelectValue :placeholder="placeholder" />
   191	      <SelectIcon as-child>
   192	        <ChevronDown :class="styles.icon()" aria-hidden="true" />
   193	      </SelectIcon>
   194	    </SelectTrigger>
   195	
   196	    <SelectContent :class="styles.content()" position="popper" :side-offset="4">
   197	      <SelectViewport :class="styles.viewport()">
   198	        <div
   199	          v-if="searchable"
   200	          :class="styles.searchWrapper()"
   201	          @pointerdown.stop
   202	        >
   203	          <input

   206	            :value="searchQuery"
   207	            :placeholder="searchPlaceholder"
   208	            :class="styles.searchInput()"

   211	            data-dz-search-input
   212	            @input="handleSearchInput"
   213	            @keydown.stop
   214	          >
   215	        </div>
   216	        <template v-if="filteredItems.length > 0">
   217	          <SelectItem
   218	            v-for="item in filteredItems"
   219	            :key="toInternal(item.value)"
   220	            :value="toInternal(item.value)"
   221	            :disabled="item.disabled"
   222	            :class="styles.item()"
   223	          >
   224	            <SelectItemIndicator class="absolute left-1 flex items-center justify-center">
   225	              <Check :class="styles.checkIcon()" aria-hidden="true" />
   226	            </SelectItemIndicator>
   227	            <SelectItemText class="pl-6">
   228	              {{ item.label }}
   229	            </SelectItemText>
   230	          </SelectItem>
   231	        </template>
   232	        <div
   233	          v-else-if="searchable && searchQuery.trim()"

   235	          data-dz-no-results
   236	        >
   237	          {{ noResultsText }}

   239	        <div

   242	        >
   243	          <slot name="empty">
   244	            No options available
   245	          </slot>
   246	        </div>
   247	      </SelectViewport>
   248	    </SelectContent>
   249	  </SelectRoot>

     1	<script setup lang="ts">
     2	import type {
     3	  DzMultiSelectEmits,

     7	import { Check, ChevronDown, X } from 'lucide-vue-next'

    19	/**
    20	 * DzMultiSelect -- Multi-value select using Reka UI Combobox (ADR-07).
    21	 *
    22	 * Uses ComboboxRoot in multiple mode with searchable input.
    23	 * v-model via defineModel<string[]>() (ADR-16).
    24	 *
    25	 * @example
    26	 * ``\`vue
    27	 * <DzMultiSelect
    28	 *   v-model="selected"

    35	import { computed, ref, useAttrs, useId } from 'vue'

    37	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
    38	import { multiSelectVariants } from './DzMultiSelect.variants.ts'
    39	
    40	const model = defineModel<string[]>({ default: () => [] })
    41	
    42	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzMultiSelectProps>(), {
    43	  placeholder: undefined,
    44	  disabled: false,
    45	  size: 'md',
    46	  variant: 'outline',
    47	  name: undefined,
    48	  maxSelections: undefined,
    49	  invalid: false,

    51	  required: false,

    54	  ariaLabelledby: undefined,
    55	  ariaDescribedby: undefined,
    56	  ariaInvalid: undefined,
    57	})
    58	
    59	const emit = defineEmits<DzMultiSelectEmits>()
    60	defineSlots<DzMultiSelectSlots>()
    61	
    62	const attrs = useAttrs()
    63	const autoId = useId()
    64	const fieldContext = useFormFieldContext()
    65	const searchQuery = ref('')
    66	
    67	/** Resolved element ID — prop overrides field context, falls back to auto-generated */
    68	const resolvedId = computed(() => props.id ?? fieldContext?.fieldId ?? autoId)
    69	
    70	const resolvedDisabled = computed(
    71	  () => props.disabled || (fieldContext?.isDisabled.value ?? false),
    72	)
    73	
    74	const resolvedInvalid = computed(
    75	  () => props.invalid || !!props.error || (fieldContext?.isInvalid.value ?? false),
    76	)
    77	
    78	const styles = computed(() =>
    79	  multiSelectVariants({
    80	    variant: props.variant,
    81	    size: props.size,
    82	    invalid: resolvedInvalid.value || undefined,
    83	  }),
    84	)
    85	
    86	/** Whether max selections has been reached */
    87	const isMaxReached = computed(() =>
    88	  props.maxSelections !== undefined && model.value.length >= props.maxSelections,
    89	)
    90	
    91	/** Filtered items based on search query */
    92	const filteredItems = computed(() => {
    93	  if (!searchQuery.value)
    94	    return props.items
    95	  const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase()
    96	  return props.items.filter(item =>
    97	    item.label.toLowerCase().includes(query),
    98	  )
    99	})
   100	
   101	/** Get label for a selected value */
   102	function getLabelForValue(value: string): string {
   103	  const item = props.items.find(i => i.value === value)
   104	  return item?.label ?? value
   105	}
   106	
   107	/** Remove a specific value from the selection */
   108	function removeValue(value: string): void {
   109	  model.value = model.value.filter(v => v !== value)
   110	  emit('change', model.value)
   111	}
   112	
   113	function handleValueChange(raw: unknown): void {
   114	  const value = raw as string[]
   115	  if (props.maxSelections !== undefined && value.length > props.maxSelections) {
   116	    return
   117	  }
   118	  model.value = value
   119	  emit('change', value)
   120	  emit('select', value)

   122	}
   123	
   124	function handleOpenChange(open: boolean): void {
   125	  if (open) {
   126	    emit('open')
   127	  }
   128	  else {

   130	    searchQuery.value = ''
   131	  }
   132	}
   133

   135	  emit('focus', event)
   136	}
   137	
   138	function handleBlur(event: FocusEvent): void {
   139	  emit('blur', event)
   140	}
   141	
   142	function handleClear(): void {
   143	  model.value = []
   144	  emit('clear')
   145	  emit('change', [])
   146	}
   147	
   148	const rootClasses = computed(() =>
   149	  cn(styles.value.root(), attrs.class as string | undefined),
   150	)
   151	</script>
   152	
   153	<script lang="ts">

   156	}

   158	
   159	<template>
   160	  <ComboboxRoot
   161	    :model-value="model"
   162	    :disabled="resolvedDisabled"
   163	    :name="name"
   164	    multiple
   165	    @update:model-value="handleValueChange"
   166	    @update:open="handleOpenChange"
   167	  >

   174	      v-bind="{ ...$attrs, class: undefined }"
   175	    >

   177	      <span

   179	        :key="value"
   180	        :class="styles.tag()"

     1	<script setup lang="ts">
     2	import type {
     3	  CommandItem,
     4	  DzCommandPaletteEmits,
     5	  DzCommandPaletteProps,
     6	  DzCommandPaletteSlots,
     7	} from './DzCommandPalette.types.ts'
     8	import {
     9	  ComboboxContent,
    10	  ComboboxEmpty,
    11	  ComboboxGroup,
    12	  ComboboxInput,
    13	  ComboboxItem,
    14	  ComboboxLabel,
    15	  ComboboxRoot,
    16	  DialogContent,
    17	  DialogDescription,
    18	  DialogOverlay,
    19	  DialogPortal,
    20	  DialogRoot,
    21	  DialogTitle,
    22	} from 'reka-ui'
    23	/**
    24	 * DzCommandPalette — A combined command palette with search, items, and groups.
    25	 *
    26	 * Uses Reka UI Dialog for the overlay and Combobox for the search/selection.
    27	 * Opens with Ctrl+K / Cmd+K by default.
    28	 *
    29	 * @example
    30	 * ``\`vue
    31	 * <DzCommandPalette
    32	 *   v-model:open="isOpen"
    33	 *   :items="commands"
    34	 *   :groups="groups"
    35	 *   @select="handleSelect"
    36	 * />
    37	 * ``\`
    38	 */
    39	import { computed, onMounted, onUnmounted, ref, useAttrs, useId, watch } from 'vue'
    40	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
    41	import { commandPaletteVariants } from './DzCommandPalette.variants.ts'
    42	
    43	const open = defineModel<boolean>('open', { default: false })
    44	
    45	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzCommandPaletteProps>(), {
    46	  placeholder: 'Type a command or search...',
    47	  items: () => [],
    48	  groups: () => [],
    49	  enableGlobalShortcut: true,
    50	  id: undefined,
    51	  ariaLabel: 'Command palette',
    52	  ariaLabelledby: undefined,
    53	  ariaDescribedby: undefined,
    54	  ariaInvalid: undefined,
    55	})
    56	
    57	const emit = defineEmits<DzCommandPaletteEmits>()
    58	defineSlots<DzCommandPaletteSlots>()
    59	
    60	const attrs = useAttrs()
    61	const autoId = useId()
    62	const searchQuery = ref('')
    63	const searchModel = ref<string>('')
    64	
    65	const styles = computed(() => commandPaletteVariants())
    66	
    67	const fallbackDescriptionId = computed(() => `${props.id ?? autoId}-description`)
    68	const resolvedAriaDescribedby = computed(() => props.ariaDescribedby ?? fallbackDescriptionId.value)
    69	
    70	const contentClasses = computed(() =>
    71	  cn(styles.value.content(), attrs.class as string | undefined),
    72	)
    73	
    74	/** Items filtered by search query */
    75	const filteredItems = computed(() => {
    76	  const query = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase().trim()
    77	  if (!query)
    78	    return props.items
    79	  return props.items.filter(item =>
    80	    item.label.toLowerCase().includes(query),
    81	  )
    82	})
    83	
    84	/** Group items by their group id */
    85	const groupedItems = computed(() => {
    86	  if (props.groups.length === 0)
    87	    return null
    88	  const map = new Map<string, CommandItem[]>()
    89	  for (const item of filteredItems.value) {
    90	    const groupId = item.group ?? '__ungrouped'
    91	    if (!map.has(groupId))
    92	      map.set(groupId, [])
    93	    map.get(groupId)!.push(item)
    94	  }
    95	  return map
    96	})
    97	
    98	watch(searchQuery, (query) => {
    99	  emit('search', query)
   100	})
   101	
   102	function handleSelect(item: CommandItem): void {
   103	  emit('select', item)
   104	  open.value = false
   105	}
   106	
   107	function handleSearchInput(value: string): void {
   108	  searchQuery.value = value
   109	}
   110	
   111	/** Global keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+K / Cmd+K) */
   112	function handleKeydown(event: KeyboardEvent): void {
   113	  if ((event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey) && event.key === 'k') {
   114	    event.preventDefault()
   115	    open.value = !open.value
   116	  }
   117	}
   118	
   119	onMounted(() => {
   120	  if (props.enableGlobalShortcut) {
   121	    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown)
   122	  }
   123	})
   124	
   125	onUnmounted(() => {
   126	  if (props.enableGlobalShortcut) {
   127	    document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown)
   128	  }
   129	})
   130	
   131	/** Reset search when dialog closes */
   132	watch(open, (isOpen) => {
   133	  if (!isOpen) {
   134	    searchQuery.value = ''
   135	    searchModel.value = ''
   136	  }
   137	})
   138	</script>
   139	
   140	<script lang="ts">
   141	export default {
   142	  inheritAttrs: false,
   143	}
   144	</script>
   145	
   146	<template>
   147	  <DialogRoot v-model:open="open">
   148	    <DialogPortal>
   149	      <DialogOverlay :class="styles.overlay()" />
   150	      <DialogContent
   151	        :id="id"
   152	        :class="contentClasses"

   154	        :aria-describedby="resolvedAriaDescribedby"

   162	        <DialogDescription v-if="!ariaDescribedby" :id="fallbackDescriptionId" class="sr-only">
   163	          Search commands, then use arrow keys to move through results and Enter to select.
   164	        </DialogDescription>
   165	        <ComboboxRoot
   166	          v-model="searchModel"
   167	          v-model:search-term="searchQuery"
   168	          open
   169	          :filter-function="() => filteredItems"
   170	        >
   171	          <!-- Search input -->
   172	          <div :class="styles.inputWrapper()">
   173	            <svg
   174	              :class="styles.inputIcon()"
   175	              xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
   176	              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   177	              fill="none"
   178	              stroke="currentColor"
   179	              stroke-width="2"
   180	              stroke-linecap="round"
   181	              stroke-linejoin="round"
   182	              aria-hidden="true"
   183	            >
   184	              <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8" />
   185	              <path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3" />
   186	            </svg>
   187	            <ComboboxInput
   188	              :class="styles.input()"
   189	              :placeholder="placeholder"
   190	              auto-focus
   191	              @update:model-value="handleSearchInput"
   192	            />
   193	          </div>
   194	
   195	          <!-- Items list -->
   196	          <ComboboxContent :class="styles.list()" :dismiss-able="false">
   197	            <!-- Grouped rendering -->
   198	            <template v-if="groupedItems">
   199	              <template v-for="groupDef in groups" :key="groupDef.id">
   200	                <ComboboxGroup v-if="groupedItems.get(groupDef.id)?.length">
   201	                  <ComboboxLabel :class="styles.groupHeading()">
   202	                    {{ groupDef.label }}
   203	                  </ComboboxLabel>
   204	                  <ComboboxItem
   205	                    v-for="item in groupedItems.get(groupDef.id)"
   206	                    :key="item.id"
   207	                    :value="item.id"
   208	                    :disabled="item.disabled"
   209	                    :class="styles.item()"
   210	                    @select.prevent="handleSelect(item)"
   211	                  >
   212	                    <slot name="item" :item="item">
   213	                      <component

   215	                        v-if="item.icon"
   216	                        :class="styles.itemIcon()"
   217	                        aria-hidden="true"

   219	                      <span :class="styles.itemLabel()">{{ item.label }}</span>

   224	                        {{ item.shortcut }}

   226	                    </slot>
   227	                  </ComboboxItem>
   228	                </ComboboxGroup>
   229	              </template>
   230	
   231	              <!-- Ungrouped items -->
   232	              <template v-if="groupedItems.get('__ungrouped')?.length">
   233	                <ComboboxItem
   234	                  v-for="item in groupedItems.get('__ungrouped')"
   235	                  :key="item.id"
   236	                  :value="item.id"
   237	                  :disabled="item.disabled"
   238	                  :class="styles.item()"
   239	                  @select.prevent="handleSelect(item)"
   240	                >

   248	                    <span :class="styles.itemLabel()">{{ item.label }}</span>

   255	                  </slot>
   256	                </ComboboxItem>
   257	              </template>
   258	            </template>
   259	
   260	            <!-- Flat rendering (no groups) -->
   261	            <template v-else>
   262	              <ComboboxItem
   263	                v-for="item in filteredItems"
   264	                :key="item.id"
   265	                :value="item.id"
   266	                :disabled="item.disabled"
   267	                :class="styles.item()"
   268	                @select.prevent="handleSelect(item)"
   269	              >
   270	                <slot name="item" :item="item">
   271	                  <component
   272	                    :is="item.icon"
   273	                    v-if="item.icon"
   274	                    :class="styles.itemIcon()"
   275	                    aria-hidden="true"
   276	                  />
   277	                  <span :class="styles.itemLabel()">{{ item.label }}</span>
   278	                  <span
   279	                    v-if="item.shortcut"
   280	                    :class="styles.itemShortcut()"
   281	                  >
   282	                    {{ item.shortcut }}
   283	                  </span>
   284	                </slot>
   285	              </ComboboxItem>
   286	            </template>
   287	
   288	            <!-- Empty state -->
   289	            <ComboboxEmpty :class="styles.empty()">
   290	              <slot name="empty">
   291	                No results found.
   292	              </slot>
   293	            </ComboboxEmpty>
   294	          </ComboboxContent>
   295	        </ComboboxRoot>
   296	      </DialogContent>
   297	    </DialogPortal>
   298	  </DialogRoot>
   299	</template>

     2	import type { DzToastContext, DzToastProviderProps, DzToastProviderSlots, ToastItem } from './DzToast.types.ts'
     3	import { ToastProvider } from 'reka-ui'
     4	/**
     5	 * DzToastProvider -- Provides toast context to the component tree.
     6	 *
     7	 * Wraps Reka UI ToastProvider (ADR-07) and manages toast state
     8	 * via provide/inject (ADR-08).
     9	 *
    10	 * @example
    11	 * ``\`vue
    12	 * <DzToastProvider :duration="5000">
    13	 *   <App />
    14	 *   <DzToastViewport />
    15	 * </DzToastProvider>
    16	 * ``\`
    17	 */
    18	import { provide, ref } from 'vue'
    19	import {
    20	  DZ_TOAST_KEY,
    21	
    22	} from './DzToast.types.ts'
    23	
    24	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzToastProviderProps>(), {
    25	  duration: 5000,
    26	  maxToasts: 5,
    27	  swipeDirection: 'right',
    28	})
    29	
    30	defineSlots<DzToastProviderSlots>()
    31	
    32	const toasts = ref<ToastItem[]>([])
    33	
    34	let counter = 0
    35	
    36	/** Generate a unique toast ID */
    37	function generateId(): string {
    38	  counter += 1
    39	  return `dz-toast-${counter}-${Date.now()}`
    40	}
    41	
    42	/** Add a new toast notification */
    43	function add(toast: Omit<ToastItem, 'id'>): string {
    44	  const id = generateId()
    45	  const item: ToastItem = {
    46	    ...toast,
    47	    id,
    48	    duration: toast.duration ?? props.duration,
    49	  }
    50	
    51	  toasts.value = [item, ...toasts.value]
    52	
    53	  // Enforce max visible toasts
    54	  if (toasts.value.length > props.maxToasts) {
    55	    toasts.value = toasts.value.slice(0, props.maxToasts)
    56	  }
    57	
    58	  return id
    59	}
    60	
    61	/** Remove a toast by its ID */
    62	function remove(id: string): void {
    63	  toasts.value = toasts.value.filter(t => t.id !== id)
    64	}
    65	
    66	/** Remove all active toasts */
    67	function clear(): void {
    68	  toasts.value = []
    69	}
    70	
    71	const context: DzToastContext = {
    72	  toasts,
    73	  add,
    74	  remove,
    75	  clear,
    76	}
    77	
    78	provide(DZ_TOAST_KEY, context)
    79	</script>
    80	
    81	<script lang="ts">
    82	export default {
    83	  inheritAttrs: false,
    84	}
    85	</script>
    86	
    87	<template>
    88	  <ToastProvider :swipe-direction="swipeDirection" :duration="duration">
    89	    <slot />
    90	  </ToastProvider>
    91	</template>

     1	<script setup lang="ts">
     2	import type {
     3	  DzCarouselContext,

     7	} from './DzCarousel.types.ts'
     8	/**
     9	 * DzCarousel — Image/content carousel with autoplay and navigation.
    10	 *
    11	 * Built from scratch. Provides context to child components via
    12	 * DZ_CAROUSEL_KEY injection (ADR-08). v-model via defineModel (ADR-16).
    13	 *
    14	 * @example
    15	 * ``\`vue
    16	 * <DzCarousel v-model="activeSlide" autoplay :interval="3000" loop>
    17	 *   <DzCarouselSlide>Slide 1</DzCarouselSlide>
    18	 *   <DzCarouselSlide>Slide 2</DzCarouselSlide>
    19	 *   <DzCarouselPrevious />
    20	 *   <DzCarouselNext />
    21	 *   <DzCarouselDots />
    22	 * </DzCarousel>
    23	 * ``\`
    24	 */
    25	import { computed, onBeforeUnmount, onMounted, provide, ref, toRef, useAttrs, watch } from 'vue'
    26	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
    27	import { DZ_CAROUSEL_KEY } from './DzCarousel.types.ts'
    28	import { carouselVariants } from './DzCarousel.variants.ts'
    29	
    30	const model = defineModel<number>({ default: 0 })
    31	
    32	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzCarouselProps>(), {
    33	  orientation: 'horizontal',
    34	  autoplay: false,
    35	  interval: 5000,
    36	  loop: false,
    37	  size: 'md',
    38	  disabled: false,
    39	})
    40	
    41	const emit = defineEmits<DzCarouselEmits>()
    42	defineSlots<DzCarouselSlots>()
    43	
    44	const attrs = useAttrs()
    45	const slideCount = ref(0)
    46	let autoplayTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null
    47	
    48	const canPrev = computed(() => props.loop || model.value > 0)
    49	const canNext = computed(() => props.loop || model.value < slideCount.value - 1)
    50	
    51	function goTo(index: number): void {
    52	  if (props.disabled)
    53	    return
    54	  let resolved = index
    55	  if (props.loop) {
    56	    if (resolved < 0)
    57	      resolved = slideCount.value - 1
    58	    if (resolved >= slideCount.value)
    59	      resolved = 0
    60	  }
    61	  else {
    62	    resolved = Math.max(0, Math.min(resolved, slideCount.value - 1))
    63	  }
    64	  model.value = resolved
    65	  emit('slideChange', resolved)
    66	}
    67	
    68	function prev(): void {
    69	  goTo(model.value - 1)
    70	}
    71	
    72	function next(): void {
    73	  goTo(model.value + 1)
    74	}
    75	
    76	function registerSlide(): () => void {
    77	  slideCount.value++
    78	  return () => {
    79	    slideCount.value--
    80	  }
    81	}
    82	
    83	function startAutoplay(): void {
    84	  stopAutoplay()
    85	  if (props.autoplay && props.interval > 0) {
    86	    autoplayTimer = setInterval(() => next(), props.interval)
    87	  }
    88	}
    89	
    90	function stopAutoplay(): void {
    91	  if (autoplayTimer !== null) {
    92	    clearInterval(autoplayTimer)
    93	    autoplayTimer = null
    94	  }
    95	}
    96	
    97	watch(() => props.autoplay, (val) => {
    98	  if (val)
    99	    startAutoplay()
   100	  else stopAutoplay()
   101	})
   102	
   103	onMounted(() => {
   104	  if (props.autoplay)
   105	    startAutoplay()
   106	})
   107	
   108	onBeforeUnmount(() => {
   109	  stopAutoplay()
   110	})
   111	
   112	const context: DzCarouselContext = {
   113	  slideCount,
   114	  activeIndex: model,
   115	  orientation: toRef(() => props.orientation),
   116	  size: toRef(() => props.size),
   117	  loop: toRef(() => props.loop),
   118	  goTo,
   119	  prev,
   120	  next,
   121	  registerSlide,
   122	  canPrev,
   123	  canNext,
   124	}
   125	
   126	provide(DZ_CAROUSEL_KEY, context)
   127	
   128	const styles = computed(() =>
   129	  carouselVariants({ orientation: props.orientation, size: props.size }),
   130	)
   131	
   132	const rootClasses = computed(() =>
   133	  cn(styles.value.root(), attrs.class as string | undefined),
   134	)
   135	</script>
   136	
   137	<script lang="ts">
   138	export default {
   139	  inheritAttrs: false,
   140	}
   141	</script>
   142	
   143	<template>
   144	  <div
   145	    :id="id"
   146	    :class="rootClasses"
   147	    :aria-label="ariaLabel ?? 'Carousel'"
   148	    :aria-labelledby="ariaLabelledby"
   149	    :aria-describedby="ariaDescribedby"
   150	    aria-roledescription="carousel"
   151	    role="region"
   152	    :data-disabled="disabled ? '' : undefined"
   153	    :data-state="slideCount > 0 ? 'ready' : 'empty'"
   154	    style="contain: layout style"
   155	    v-bind="{ ...$attrs, class: undefined }"
   156	    @mouseenter="stopAutoplay"
   157	    @mouseleave="autoplay ? startAutoplay() : undefined"

   160	      <div
   161	        :class="styles.container()"

   168	        <slot />
   169	      </div>

     1	<!--
     2	  DzThemeProvider — Provides theme context to the component tree.
     3	
     4	  Uses provide() with DZ_THEME_KEY (ADR-08) to expose the minimal
     5	  useTheme API (ADR-09): theme, resolvedTheme, setTheme, toggleTheme.
     6	
     7	  Persists to localStorage key (default 'dz-theme') and sets a data
     8	  attribute on document.documentElement (ADR-15).
     9	
    10	  SSR-safe: all window/document access is deferred to onMounted().
    11	
    12	  @module @dzup-ui/core/providers/DzThemeProvider
    13	-->
    14	
    15	<script setup lang="ts">
    16	import type { DzThemeProviderProps, ResolvedTheme, ThemePreference } from './DzThemeProvider.types'
    17	import { computed, onMounted, onUnmounted, provide, ref, watch } from 'vue'
    18	import { DZ_THEME_KEY } from './DzThemeProvider.types'
    19	
    20	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21	// Props
    22	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    23	
    24	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzThemeProviderProps>(), {
    25	  defaultTheme: 'system',
    26	  storageKey: 'dz-theme',
    27	  attribute: 'data-theme',
    28	})
    29	
    30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31	// Helpers
    32	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    33	
    34	/** Check if code is running in a browser environment */
    35	function isBrowser(): boolean {
    36	  return typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof document !== 'undefined'
    37	}
    38	
    39	/** Read persisted theme from localStorage (returns null if unavailable) */
    40	function readPersistedTheme(): ThemePreference | null {
    41	  if (!isBrowser())
    42	    return null
    43	  try {
    44	    const stored = localStorage.getItem(props.storageKey)
    45	    if (stored === 'light' || stored === 'dark' || stored === 'system') {
    46	      return stored
    47	    }
    48	  }
    49	  catch {
    50	    // localStorage may throw in restricted contexts (e.g. iframe sandboxes)
    51	  }
    52	  return null
    53	}
    54	
    55	/** Persist theme to localStorage */
    56	function persistTheme(value: ThemePreference): void {
    57	  if (!isBrowser())
    58	    return
    59	  try {
    60	    localStorage.setItem(props.storageKey, value)
    61	  }
    62	  catch {
    63	    // Silently ignore storage errors
    64	  }
    65	}
    66	
    67	/** Apply the theme attribute to document.documentElement */
    68	function applyAttribute(resolved: ResolvedTheme): void {
    69	  if (!isBrowser())
    70	    return
    71	  document.documentElement.setAttribute(props.attribute, resolved)
    72	}
    73	
    74	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    75	// Reactive state
    76	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    77	
    78	const theme = ref<ThemePreference>(readPersistedTheme() ?? props.defaultTheme)
    79	const systemPrefersDark = ref(false)
    80	
    81	/** Resolved theme: converts 'system' to actual light/dark */
    82	const resolvedTheme = computed<ResolvedTheme>(() => {
    83	  if (theme.value === 'system') {
    84	    return systemPrefersDark.value ? 'dark' : 'light'
    85	  }
    86	  return theme.value
    87	})
    88	
    89	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    90	// Media query listener
    91	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    92	
    93	let mediaQuery: MediaQueryList | null = null
    94	
    95	function handleMediaChange(event: MediaQueryListEvent): void {
    96	  systemPrefersDark.value = event.matches
    97	}
    98	
    99	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100	// Watchers
   101	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   102	
   103	// Sync resolved theme to DOM attribute
   104	watch(resolvedTheme, (resolved) => {
   105	  applyAttribute(resolved)
   106	})
   107	
   108	// Persist preference changes to localStorage
   109	watch(theme, (value) => {
   110	  persistTheme(value)
   111	})
   112	
   113	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   114	// SSR-safe lifecycle (ADR-15)
   115	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   116	
   117	onMounted(() => {
   118	  if (!isBrowser())
   119	    return
   120	
   121	  mediaQuery = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
   122	  systemPrefersDark.value = mediaQuery.matches
   123	
   124	  mediaQuery.addEventListener('change', handleMediaChange)
   125	
   126	  // Apply initial theme attribute
   127	  applyAttribute(resolvedTheme.value)
   128	})
   129	
   130	onUnmounted(() => {
   131	  if (mediaQuery) {
   132	    mediaQuery.removeEventListener('change', handleMediaChange)
   133	    mediaQuery = null
   134	  }
   135	})
   136	
   137	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   138	// Public API (ADR-09 minimal)
   139	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   140	
   141	/** Set the theme preference */
   142	function setTheme(value: ThemePreference): void {
   143	  theme.value = value
   144	}
   145	
   146	/** Toggle between light and dark (if 'system', resolves to opposite of current) */
   147	function toggleTheme(): void {
   148	  theme.value = resolvedTheme.value === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'
   149	}
   150	
   151	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   152	// Provide context (ADR-08)
   153	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   154	
   155	provide(DZ_THEME_KEY, {
   156	  theme,
   157	  resolvedTheme,
   158	  setTheme,
   159	  toggleTheme,
   160	})
   161	</script>
   162	
   163	<template>
   164	  <slot />
   165	</template>

I confirmed key frontend hotspots and a few existing safeguards. I’m checking supporting composables/tooling next (DataGrid header helpers, perf budget checks, token generation, Nuxt registration) to cover build-time and scalability constraints beyond runtime rendering.

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import { mount } from '@vue/test-utils'
     2	/**
     3	 * Performance benchmarks for complex components.
     4	 *
     5	 * Measures mount time for data-heavy components to establish baselines.
     6	 * Each benchmark runs 5 iterations and reports the average.
     7	 *
     8	 * Usage: npx vitest run packages/tooling/src/perf-bench.spec.ts
     9	 *
    10	 * @module @dzup-ui/tooling/perf-bench
    11	 */
    12	import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
    13	import { defineComponent, h } from 'vue'
    14	
    15	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16	// Mock data generators
    17	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18	
    19	interface GridRow {
    20	  id: number
    21	  name: string
    22	  email: string
    23	  role: string
    24	  status: string
    25	}
    26	
    27	function generateGridRows(count: number): GridRow[] {
    28	  return Array.from({ length: count }, (_, i) => ({
    29	    id: i + 1,
    30	    name: `User ${i + 1}`,
    31	    email: `user${i + 1}@example.com`,
    32	    role: i % 3 === 0 ? 'Admin' : i % 3 === 1 ? 'Editor' : 'Viewer',
    33	    status: i % 2 === 0 ? 'Active' : 'Inactive',
    34	  }))
    35	}
    36	
    37	function generateGridColumns() {
    38	  return [
    39	    { field: 'id' as const, header: 'ID', sortable: true, width: 80 },
    40	    { field: 'name' as const, header: 'Name', sortable: true },
    41	    { field: 'email' as const, header: 'Email', sortable: true },
    42	    { field: 'role' as const, header: 'Role', sortable: true },
    43	    { field: 'status' as const, header: 'Status', sortable: true },
    44	  ]
    45	}
    46	
    47	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    48	// Benchmark helpers
    49	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50	
    51	const ITERATIONS = 5
    52	
    53	/** Mount threshold in ms — complex compound components */
    54	const COMPLEX_THRESHOLD_MS = 500
    55	
    56	interface BenchResult {
    57	  times: number[]
    58	  average: number
    59	  min: number
    60	  max: number
    61	}
    62	
    63	async function benchmark(
    64	  mountFn: () => ReturnType<typeof mount>,
    65	): Promise<BenchResult> {
    66	  const times: number[] = []
    67	
    68	  for (let i = 0; i < ITERATIONS; i++) {
    69	    const start = performance.now()
    70	    const wrapper = mountFn()
    71	    const elapsed = performance.now() - start
    72	    times.push(elapsed)
    73	    wrapper.unmount()
    74	  }
    75	
    76	  const average = times.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / times.length
    77	  const min = Math.min(...times)
    78	  const max = Math.max(...times)
    79	
    80	  return { times, average, min, max }
    81	}
    82	
    83	function logResult(name: string, result: BenchResult): void {
    84	  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
    85	  console.log(
    86	    `  ${name}: avg=${result.average.toFixed(2)}ms `
    87	    + `min=${result.min.toFixed(2)}ms max=${result.max.toFixed(2)}ms`,
    88	  )
    89	}
    90	
    91	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    92	// Tests
    93	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    94	
    95	describe('performance Benchmarks', { timeout: 30_000 }, () => {
    96	  it('dzDataGrid with 100 rows x 5 columns mounts under threshold', async () => {
    97	    const { default: DzDataGrid } = await import(
    98	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/data/DzDataGrid.vue'
    99	    )
   100	
   101	    const rows = generateGridRows(100)
   102	    const columns = generateGridColumns()
   103	
   104	    const result = await benchmark(() =>
   105	      mount(DzDataGrid, {
   106	        props: {
   107	          data: rows,
   108	          columns,
   109	          sortable: true,
   110	          size: 'md',
   111	        },
   112	        global: { stubs: { teleport: true } },
   113	      }),
   114	    )
   115	
   116	    logResult('DzDataGrid (100x5)', result)
   117	    expect(result.average).toBeLessThan(COMPLEX_THRESHOLD_MS)
   118	  })
   119	
   120	  it('dzAccordion with 20 items mounts under threshold', async () => {
   121	    const { default: DzAccordion } = await import(
   122	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/data/DzAccordion.vue'
   123	    )
   124	    const { default: DzAccordionItem } = await import(
   125	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/data/DzAccordionItem.vue'
   126	    )
   127	    const { default: DzAccordionTrigger } = await import(
   128	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/data/DzAccordionTrigger.vue'
   129	    )
   130	    const { default: DzAccordionContent } = await import(
   131	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/data/DzAccordionContent.vue'
   132	    )
   133	
   134	    const items = Array.from({ length: 20 }, (_, i) => ({
   135	      value: `item-${i}`,
   136	      label: `Accordion Item ${i + 1}`,
   137	      content: `Content for item ${i + 1}. `.repeat(5),
   138	    }))
   139	
   140	    // Wrap in a host component so we can render 20 items in slots
   141	    const Host = defineComponent({
   142	      setup() {
   143	        return () =>
   144	          h(
   145	            DzAccordion,
   146	            { type: 'single' as const, collapsible: true },
   147	            {
   148	              default: () =>
   149	                items.map(item =>
   150	                  h(DzAccordionItem, { value: item.value, key: item.value }, {
   151	                    default: () => [
   152	                      h(DzAccordionTrigger, null, { default: () => item.label }),
   153	                      h(DzAccordionContent, null, { default: () => item.content }),
   154	                    ],
   155	                  }),
   156	                ),
   157	            },
   158	          )
   159	      },
   160	    })
   161	
   162	    const result = await benchmark(() =>
   163	      mount(Host, { global: { stubs: { teleport: true } } }),
   164	    )
   165	
   166	    logResult('DzAccordion (20 items)', result)
   167	    // Accordion is a compound component with 20 × 3 sub-nodes — use the
   168	    // compound threshold, not the simple one.  The assertion is intentionally
   169	    // generous; it gates catastrophic regressions rather than enforcing a
   170	    // tight budget (CI machines vary widely).
   171	    expect(result.average).toBeLessThan(COMPLEX_THRESHOLD_MS)
   172	  })
   173	
   174	  it('dzTabs with 10 tabs mounts under threshold', async () => {
   175	    const { default: DzTabs } = await import(
   176	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/navigation/DzTabs.vue'
   177	    )
   178	    const { default: DzTabList } = await import(
   179	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/navigation/DzTabList.vue'
   180	    )
   181	    const { default: DzTabTrigger } = await import(
   182	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/navigation/DzTabTrigger.vue'
   183	    )
   184	    const { default: DzTabContent } = await import(
   185	      '@dzup-ui/core/components/navigation/DzTabContent.vue'
   186	    )
   187	
   188	    const tabs = Array.from({ length: 10 }, (_, i) => ({
   189	      value: `tab-${i}`,
   190	      label: `Tab ${i + 1}`,
   191	      content: `Panel content for tab ${i + 1}`,
   192	    }))
   193	
   194	    const Host = defineComponent({
   195	      setup() {
   196	        return () =>
   197	          h(
   198	            DzTabs,
   199	            { modelValue: 'tab-0' },
   200	            {
   201	              default: () => [
   202	                h(DzTabList, null, {
   203	                  default: () =>
   204	                    tabs.map(tab =>
   205	                      h(DzTabTrigger, { value: tab.value, key: tab.value }, {
   206	                        default: () => tab.label,
   207	                      }),
   208	                    ),
   209	                }),
   210	                ...tabs.map(tab =>
   211	                  h(DzTabContent, { value: tab.value, key: tab.value }, {
   212	                    default: () => tab.content,
   213	                  }),
   214	                ),
   215	              ],
   216	            },
   217	          )
   218	      },
   219	    })
   220	
   221	    const result = await benchmark(() =>
   222	      mount(Host, { global: { stubs: { teleport: true } } }),
   223	    )
   224	
   225	    logResult('DzTabs (10 tabs)', result)
   226	    expect(result.average).toBeLessThan(COMPLEX_THRESHOLD_MS)
   227	  })
   228	})

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba packages/tooling/src/bundle-budget-check.ts | sed -n '1,320p'" in /media/ninel/Second/code/datazup/ai-internal-dev/ui/dzup-ui

     7	    },
     8	    {
     9	      "path": "packages/core/dist/index.css",
    10	      "maxSize": "50 kB",

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/* eslint-disable no-console */
     2	/**
     3	 * Bundle Budget Check
     4	 *
     5	 * Reads `bundlesize.config.json` from the repo root and validates each
     6	 * file's gzipped size against the declared maxSize budget.
     7	 *
     8	 * Features:
     9	 * - Gzip compression measurement via `node:zlib`
    10	 * - Human-readable size parsing and formatting
    11	 * - `--ci` flag for machine-readable JSON output
    12	 * - Non-zero exit code when any budget is exceeded
    13	 *
    14	 * Usage:
    15	 *   npx tsx packages/tooling/src/bundle-budget-check.ts
    16	 *   npx tsx packages/tooling/src/bundle-budget-check.ts --ci
    17	 *
    18	 * @module @dzup-ui/tooling/bundle-budget-check
    19	 */
    20	
    21	import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    22	import { relative, resolve } from 'node:path'
    23	import process from 'node:process'
    24	import { gzipSync } from 'node:zlib'
    25	
    26	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27	// Types
    28	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29	
    30	export interface BudgetEntry {
    31	  /** Relative path from repo root to the file */
    32	  path: string
    33	  /** Human-readable max size, e.g. "150 kB", "1.5 MB", "500 B" */
    34	  maxSize: string
    35	  /** Compression algorithm (currently only "gzip" supported) */
    36	  compression?: 'gzip' | 'none'
    37	}
    38	
    39	export interface BundleSizeConfig {
    40	  files: BudgetEntry[]
    41	}
    42	
    43	export interface CheckResult {
    44	  path: string
    45	  maxSizeBytes: number
    46	  maxSizeLabel: string
    47	  actualSizeBytes: number
    48	  actualSizeLabel: string
    49	  passed: boolean
    50	  exists: boolean
    51	}
    52	
    53	export interface CheckSummary {
    54	  results: CheckResult[]
    55	  passed: number
    56	  failed: number
    57	  skipped: number
    58	  allPassed: boolean
    59	}
    60	
    61	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    62	// Size Parsing & Formatting
    63	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    64	
    65	const SIZE_REGEX = /^([\d.]+)\s*(B|kB|MB)$/i
    66	
    67	/**
    68	 * Parses a human-readable size string into bytes.
    69	 *
    70	 * @example
    71	 * parseSizeToBytes("150 kB") // 153600
    72	 * parseSizeToBytes("1.5 MB") // 1572864
    73	 * parseSizeToBytes("500 B")  // 500
    74	 */
    75	export function parseSizeToBytes(sizeStr: string): number {
    76	  const match = SIZE_REGEX.exec(sizeStr.trim())
    77	
    78	  if (match === null || match[1] === undefined || match[2] === undefined) {
    79	    throw new Error(
    80	      `Invalid size format: "${sizeStr}". Expected format like "150 kB", "1.5 MB", or "500 B".`,
    81	    )
    82	  }
    83	
    84	  const value = Number.parseFloat(match[1])
    85	
    86	  if (Number.isNaN(value) || value < 0) {
    87	    throw new Error(`Invalid size value: "${match[1]}" — must be a non-negative number.`)
    88	  }
    89	
    90	  const unit = match[2].toLowerCase()
    91	
    92	  switch (unit) {
    93	    case 'b':
    94	      return Math.round(value)
    95	    case 'kb':
    96	      return Math.round(value * 1024)
    97	    case 'mb':
    98	      return Math.round(value * 1024 * 1024)
    99	    default:
   100	      throw new Error(`Unsupported size unit: "${unit}"`)
   101	  }
   102	}
   103	
   104	/**
   105	 * Formats bytes into a human-readable string.
   106	 *
   107	 * @example
   108	 * formatBytes(500)     // "500 B"
   109	 * formatBytes(4331)    // "4.23 kB"
   110	 * formatBytes(1572864) // "1.50 MB"
   111	 */
   112	export function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
   113	  if (bytes < 1024) {
   114	    return `${bytes} B`
   115	  }
   116	  if (bytes < 1024 * 1024) {
   117	    return `${(bytes / 1024).toFixed(2)} kB`
   118	  }
   119	  return `${(bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2)} MB`
   120	}
   121	
   122	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   123	// Gzip Measurement
   124	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   125	
   126	/**
   127	 * Computes the gzipped size of a file in bytes.
   128	 * Uses maximum compression level (9) for consistent measurement.
   129	 */
   130	export function getGzippedSize(filePath: string): number {
   131	  const content = readFileSync(filePath)
   132	  const gzipped = gzipSync(content, { level: 9 })
   133	  return gzipped.length
   134	}
   135	
   136	/**
   137	 * Gets the raw file size in bytes (no compression).
   138	 */
   139	export function getRawSize(filePath: string): number {
   140	  const content = readFileSync(filePath)
   141	  return content.length
   142	}
   143	
   144	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   145	// Core Check Logic
   146	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   147	
   148	/**
   149	 * Loads and parses bundlesize.config.json from the given root directory.
   150	 */
   151	export function loadConfig(rootDir: string): BundleSizeConfig {
   152	  const configPath = resolve(rootDir, 'bundlesize.config.json')
   153	
   154	  if (!existsSync(configPath)) {
   155	    throw new Error(
   156	      `Bundle size config not found: ${relative(rootDir, configPath)}\n`
   157	      + 'Expected bundlesize.config.json at repo root.',
   158	    )
   159	  }
   160	
   161	  const raw = readFileSync(configPath, 'utf-8')
   162	  const config = JSON.parse(raw) as BundleSizeConfig
   163	
   164	  if (!Array.isArray(config.files) || config.files.length === 0) {
   165	    throw new Error('bundlesize.config.json has no files entries.')
   166	  }
   167	
   168	  return config
   169	}
   170	
   171	/**
   172	 * Checks a single budget entry against its actual file size.
   173	 */
   174	export function checkEntry(rootDir: string, entry: BudgetEntry): CheckResult {
   175	  const filePath = resolve(rootDir, entry.path)
   176	  const relPath = relative(rootDir, filePath)
   177	  const maxSizeBytes = parseSizeToBytes(entry.maxSize)
   178	
   179	  if (!existsSync(filePath)) {
   180	    return {
   181	      path: relPath,
   182	      maxSizeBytes,
   183	      maxSizeLabel: entry.maxSize,
   184	      actualSizeBytes: 0,
   185	      actualSizeLabel: 'N/A',
   186	      passed: false,
   187	      exists: false,
   188	    }
   189	  }
   190	
   191	  const useGzip = entry.compression !== 'none'
   192	  const actualSizeBytes = useGzip ? getGzippedSize(filePath) : getRawSize(filePath)
   193	  const passed = actualSizeBytes <= maxSizeBytes
   194	
   195	  return {
   196	    path: relPath,
   197	    maxSizeBytes,
   198	    maxSizeLabel: entry.maxSize,
   199	    actualSizeBytes,
   200	    actualSizeLabel: formatBytes(actualSizeBytes),
   201	    passed,
   202	    exists: true,
   203	  }
   204	}
   205	
   206	/**
   207	 * Runs the full bundle budget check against all configured entries.
   208	 */
   209	export function runBudgetCheck(rootDir: string): CheckSummary {
   210	  const config = loadConfig(rootDir)
   211	  const results: CheckResult[] = config.files.map(entry => checkEntry(rootDir, entry))
   212	
   213	  const passed = results.filter(r => r.exists && r.passed).length
   214	  const failed = results.filter(r => r.exists && !r.passed).length
   215	  const skipped = results.filter(r => !r.exists).length
   216	
   217	  return {
   218	    results,
   219	    passed,
   220	    failed,
   221	    skipped,
   222	    allPassed: failed === 0,
   223	  }
   224	}
   225	
   226	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   227	// Output Formatting
   228	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   229	
   230	/**
   231	 * Prints results in human-readable format.
   232	 */
   233	function printHumanReport(summary: CheckSummary): void {
   234	  console.log('\n=== Bundle Budget Check ===\n')
   235	
   236	  const maxPathLen = Math.max(...summary.results.map(r => r.path.length))
   237	
   238	  for (const result of summary.results) {
   239	    const paddedPath = result.path.padEnd(maxPathLen + 2)
   240	
   241	    if (!result.exists) {
   242	      console.log(`  SKIP  ${paddedPath} (file not found — build first)`)
   243	      continue
   244	    }
   245	
   246	    const status = result.passed ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'
   247	    const arrow = result.passed ? '<=' : '> '
   248	    const pct = ((result.actualSizeBytes / result.maxSizeBytes) * 100).toFixed(1)
   249	    console.log(
   250	      `  ${status}  ${paddedPath} ${result.actualSizeLabel} ${arrow} ${result.maxSizeLabel} (${pct}% of budget)`,
   251	    )
   252	  }
   253	
   254	  console.log(`\n${'='.repeat(60)}`)
   255	  console.log(
   256	    `Results: ${summary.passed} passed, ${summary.failed} failed, ${summary.skipped} skipped`,
   257	  )
   258	
   259	  if (summary.failed > 0) {
   260	    console.error(`\nBundle budget EXCEEDED for ${summary.failed} file(s)`)
   261	  }
   262	  else if (summary.skipped > 0) {
   263	    console.log(`\nNote: ${summary.skipped} file(s) not found — run yarn build first.`)
   264	  }
   265	  else {
   266	    console.log('\nAll bundle budgets within limits.')
   267	  }
   268	}
   269	
   270	/**
   271	 * Prints results in machine-readable JSON format for CI pipelines.
   272	 */
   273	function printCiReport(summary: CheckSummary): void {
   274	  const output = {
   275	    status: summary.allPassed ? 'pass' : 'fail',
   276	    summary: {
   277	      passed: summary.passed,
   278	      failed: summary.failed,
   279	      skipped: summary.skipped,
   280	    },
   281	    entries: summary.results.map(r => ({
   282	      path: r.path,
   283	      exists: r.exists,
   284	      passed: r.passed,
   285	      actualBytes: r.actualSizeBytes,
   286	      actualLabel: r.actualSizeLabel,
   287	      budgetBytes: r.maxSizeBytes,
   288	      budgetLabel: r.maxSizeLabel,
   289	      usagePercent: r.exists ? Number(((r.actualSizeBytes / r.maxSizeBytes) * 100).toFixed(1)) : 0,
   290	    })),
   291	  }
   292	
   293	  console.log(JSON.stringify(output, null, 2))
   294	}
   295	
   296	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   297	// CLI Entry Point
   298	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   299	
   300	function main(): void {
   301	  const args = process.argv.slice(2)
   302	  const ciMode = args.includes('--ci')
   303	  const rootDir = resolve(import.meta.dirname, '..', '..', '..')
   304	
   305	  try {
   306	    const summary = runBudgetCheck(rootDir)
   307	
   308	    if (ciMode) {
   309	      printCiReport(summary)
   310	    }
   311	    else {
   312	      printHumanReport(summary)
   313	    }
   314	
   315	    process.exit(summary.failed > 0 ? 1 : 0)
   316	  }
   317	  catch (error: unknown) {
   318	    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
   319	    console.error(`Bundle budget check failed: ${message}`)
   320	    process.exit(1)
