/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba packages/tokens/src/generate.ts | sed -n '1,320p'" in /media/ninel/Second/code/datazup/ai-internal-dev/ui/dzup-ui
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * Token Generation Script
     3	 *
     4	 * Reads all token definitions and generates:
     5	 * - dist/tokens.css       — All CSS custom properties
     6	 * - dist/tokens.d.ts      — TypeScript type definitions
     7	 * - dist/tailwind-theme.js — Tailwind CSS 4 theme extension
     8	 * - dist/tailwind-theme.d.ts — Types for the Tailwind theme
     9	 *
    10	 * Run via: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
    11	 */
    12	
    13	import { mkdirSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    14	import { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
    15	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'
    16	
    17	import { APPSHELL_TOKENS } from './component/appshell.js'
    18	import { BADGE_TOKENS } from './component/badge.js'
    19	// Component
    20	import { BUTTON_TOKENS } from './component/button.js'
    21	import { CARD_TOKENS } from './component/card.js'
    22	import { CONTROL_TOKENS } from './component/control.js'
    23	import { DIALOG_TOKENS } from './component/dialog.js'
    24	import { INPUT_TOKENS } from './component/input.js'
    25	import { SIDEBAR_TOKENS } from './component/sidebar.js'
    26	import { generateBreakpointCssVars } from './primitives/breakpoints.js'
    27	// Primitives
    28	import { generateColorCssVars } from './primitives/colors.js'
    29	import { generateRadiusCssVars } from './primitives/radius.js'
    30	
    31	import { generateShadowCssVars, generateShadowDarkCssVars } from './primitives/shadows.js'
    32	import { generateSpacingCssVars } from './primitives/spacing.js'
    33	
    34	import { generateTransitionCssVars } from './primitives/transitions.js'
    35	import { generateTypographyCssVars } from './primitives/typography.js'
    36	import { generateZIndexCssVars } from './primitives/z-index.js'
    37	import { DARK_SEMANTIC_TOKENS } from './semantic/dark.js'
    38	// Semantic
    39	import { LIGHT_SEMANTIC_TOKENS } from './semantic/light.js'
    40	
    41	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42	// Helpers
    43	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44	
    45	const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
    46	const DIST_DIR = resolve(__dirname, '..', 'dist')
    47	
    48	function formatVars(vars: Record<string, string>, indent: string = '  '): string {
    49	  return Object.entries(vars)
    50	    .map(([key, value]) => `${indent}${key}: ${value};`)
    51	    .join('\n')
    52	}
    53	
    54	function extractTokenNames(vars: Record<string, string>): string[] {
    55	  return Object.keys(vars)
    56	}
    57	
    58	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59	// CSS Generation
    60	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61	
    62	function generateCss(): string {
    63	  const primitiveColors = generateColorCssVars()
    64	  const spacing = generateSpacingCssVars()
    65	  const typography = generateTypographyCssVars()
    66	  const radius = generateRadiusCssVars()
    67	  const shadows = generateShadowCssVars()
    68	  const shadowsDark = generateShadowDarkCssVars()
    69	  const transitions = generateTransitionCssVars()
    70	  const zIndex = generateZIndexCssVars()
    71	  const breakpoints = generateBreakpointCssVars()
    72	
    73	  const componentTokens = {
    74	    ...BUTTON_TOKENS,
    75	    ...CONTROL_TOKENS,
    76	    ...INPUT_TOKENS,
    77	    ...CARD_TOKENS,
    78	    ...BADGE_TOKENS,
    79	    ...DIALOG_TOKENS,
    80	    ...SIDEBAR_TOKENS,
    81	    ...APPSHELL_TOKENS,
    82	  }
    83	
    84	  return `/**
    85	 * @dzup-ui/tokens — Generated CSS Custom Properties
    86	 *
    87	 * DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
    88	 * Generated by: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
    89	 * Source: packages/tokens/src/
    90	 *
    91	 * Three-tier token system:
    92	 *   Tier 1 — Primitive: raw palette and scale values
    93	 *   Tier 2 — Semantic: intent-based mappings (light/dark)
    94	 *   Tier 3 — Component: per-component overrides
    95	 *
    96	 * All token declarations are wrapped in @layer dz-tokens so that
    97	 * consumer utilities (unlayered) can override them without !important.
    98	 * The layer order is declared in packages/core/src/styles/base.css:
    99	 *   @layer dz-tokens, dz-base, dz-components;
   100	 */
   101	
   102	@layer dz-tokens {
   103	
   104	/* ==========================================================================
   105	   Tier 1: Primitive Tokens
   106	   ========================================================================== */
   107	
   108	:root {
   109	  /* ── Colors (OKLCH) ── */
   110	${formatVars(primitiveColors)}
   111	
   112	  /* ── Spacing ── */
   113	${formatVars(spacing)}
   114	
   115	  /* ── Typography ── */
   116	${formatVars(typography)}
   117	
   118	  /* ── Border Radius ── */
   119	${formatVars(radius)}
   120	
   121	  /* ── Shadows ── */
   122	${formatVars(shadows)}
   123	
   124	  /* ── Transitions ── */
   125	${formatVars(transitions)}
   126	
   127	  /* ── Z-Index ── */
   128	${formatVars(zIndex)}
   129	
   130	  /* ── Breakpoints ── */
   131	${formatVars(breakpoints)}
   132	}
   133	
   134	/* ==========================================================================
   135	   Tier 2: Semantic Tokens — Light Theme (default)
   136	   ========================================================================== */
   137	
   138	:root, [data-theme="light"] {
   139	${formatVars(LIGHT_SEMANTIC_TOKENS)}
   140	}
   141	
   142	/* ==========================================================================
   143	   Tier 2: Semantic Tokens — Dark Theme
   144	   ========================================================================== */
   145	
   146	[data-theme="dark"] {
   147	${formatVars(DARK_SEMANTIC_TOKENS)}
   148	
   149	  /* ── Dark mode shadow overrides (increased opacity) ── */
   150	${formatVars(shadowsDark)}
   151	}
   152	
   153	/* ==========================================================================
   154	   System preference fallback (when no data-theme is set explicitly)
   155	   ========================================================================== */
   156	
   157	@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
   158	  :root:not([data-theme="light"]) {
   159	${formatVars(DARK_SEMANTIC_TOKENS, '    ')}
   160	
   161	    /* ── Dark mode shadow overrides ── */
   162	${formatVars(shadowsDark, '    ')}
   163	  }
   164	}
   165	
   166	/* ==========================================================================
   167	   Tier 3: Component Tokens
   168	   ========================================================================== */
   169	
   170	:root {
   171	${formatVars(componentTokens)}
   172	}
   173	
   174	} /* end @layer dz-tokens */
   175	
   176	/* ==========================================================================
   177	   Reduced Motion
   178	   Kept outside @layer — these safety overrides must always win.
   179	   ========================================================================== */
   180	
   181	@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
   182	  *, *::before, *::after {
   183	    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
   184	    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
   185	    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
   186	  }
   187	}
   188	`
   189	}
   190	
   191	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   192	// TypeScript Types Generation
   193	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   194	
   195	function generateTypes(): string {
   196	  const allPrimitiveVars = {
   197	    ...generateColorCssVars(),
   198	    ...generateSpacingCssVars(),
   199	    ...generateTypographyCssVars(),
   200	    ...generateRadiusCssVars(),
   201	    ...generateShadowCssVars(),
   202	    ...generateTransitionCssVars(),
   203	    ...generateZIndexCssVars(),
   204	    ...generateBreakpointCssVars(),
   205	  }
   206	
   207	  const componentTokens = {
   208	    ...BUTTON_TOKENS,
   209	    ...CONTROL_TOKENS,
   210	    ...INPUT_TOKENS,
   211	    ...CARD_TOKENS,
   212	    ...BADGE_TOKENS,
   213	    ...DIALOG_TOKENS,
   214	    ...SIDEBAR_TOKENS,
   215	    ...APPSHELL_TOKENS,
   216	  }
   217	
   218	  const primitiveNames = extractTokenNames(allPrimitiveVars)
   219	  const semanticNames = extractTokenNames(LIGHT_SEMANTIC_TOKENS)
   220	  const componentNames = extractTokenNames(componentTokens)
   221	
   222	  function toUnionType(names: string[]): string {
   223	    return names.map(n => `  | '${n}'`).join('\n')
   224	  }
   225	
   226	  return `/**
   227	 * @dzup-ui/tokens — Generated TypeScript Definitions
   228	 *
   229	 * DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
   230	 * Generated by: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
   231	 */
   232	
   233	/** All primitive token CSS custom property names */
   234	export type PrimitiveToken =
   235	${toUnionType(primitiveNames)};
   236	
   237	/** All semantic token CSS custom property names */
   238	export type SemanticToken =
   239	${toUnionType(semanticNames)};
   240	
   241	/** All component token CSS custom property names */
   242	export type ComponentToken =
   243	${toUnionType(componentNames)};
   244	
   245	/** Union of all design token CSS custom property names */
   246	export type DesignToken = PrimitiveToken | SemanticToken | ComponentToken;
   247	
   248	/** Theme mode */
   249	export type ThemeMode = 'light' | 'dark' | 'system';
   250	
   251	/** Resolved theme (no 'system') */
   252	export type ResolvedTheme = 'light' | 'dark';
   253	`
   254	}
   255	
   256	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   257	// Tailwind CSS 4 Theme Generation
   258	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   259	
   260	function generateTailwindTheme(): string {
   261	  const colorVars = generateColorCssVars()
   262	  const spacing = generateSpacingCssVars()
   263	  const radius = generateRadiusCssVars()
   264	  const shadows = generateShadowCssVars()
   265	
   266	  // Build color entries: primary-50 through primary-950, etc.
   267	  const colorEntries: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {}
   268	  for (const key of Object.keys(colorVars)) {
   269	    // --dz-colors-{palette}-{shade} -> palette, shade
   270	    const match = key.match(/^--dz-colors-(\w+)-(\d+)$/)
   271	    if (match) {
   272	      const palette = match[1] ?? ''
   273	      const shade = match[2] ?? ''
   274	      if (!colorEntries[palette]) {
   275	        colorEntries[palette] = {}
   276	      }
   277	      const paletteObj = colorEntries[palette]
   278	      if (paletteObj) {
   279	        paletteObj[shade] = `var(${key})`
   280	      }
   281	    }
   282	  }
   283	
   284	  // Semantic color mappings for Tailwind
   285	  const semanticColors: Record<string, string | Record<string, string>> = {
   286	    background: 'var(--dz-background)',
   287	    foreground: 'var(--dz-foreground)',
   288	    surface: 'var(--dz-surface)',
   289	    muted: {
   290	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-muted)',
   291	      foreground: 'var(--dz-muted-foreground)',
   292	    },
   293	    border: 'var(--dz-border)',
   294	    ring: 'var(--dz-ring)',
   295	    primary: {
   296	      ...colorEntries.primary,
   297	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-primary)',
   298	      foreground: 'var(--dz-primary-foreground)',
   299	    },
   300	    secondary: {
   301	      ...colorEntries.secondary,
   302	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-secondary)',
   303	      foreground: 'var(--dz-secondary-foreground)',
   304	    },
   305	    destructive: {
   306	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-destructive)',
   307	      foreground: 'var(--dz-destructive-foreground)',
   308	    },
   309	    success: {
   310	      ...colorEntries.success,
   311	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-success)',
   312	      foreground: 'var(--dz-success-foreground)',
   313	    },
   314	    warning: {
   315	      ...colorEntries.warning,
   316	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-warning)',
   317	      foreground: 'var(--dz-warning-foreground)',
   318	    },
   319	    danger: {
   320	      ...colorEntries.danger,

   321	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-danger)',

   325	      ...colorEntries.info,
   326	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-info)',
   327	      foreground: 'var(--dz-info-foreground)',
   328	    },
   329	    accent: {
   330	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-accent)',
   331	      foreground: 'var(--dz-accent-foreground)',
   332	    },
   333	    card: {
   334	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-card)',

   342	      DEFAULT: 'var(--dz-input-bg)',
   343	      border: 'var(--dz-input-border)',
   344	    },
   345	  }
   346	
   347	  // Add neutral palette shades
   348	  if (colorEntries.neutral) {
   349	    semanticColors.neutral = colorEntries.neutral
   350	  }
   351	
   352	  // Spacing entries
   353	  const spacingEntries: Record<string, string> = {}
   354	  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(spacing)) {
   355	    // --dz-spacing-{step} -> step
   356	    const step = key.replace('--dz-spacing-', '').replace('_', '.')
   357	    spacingEntries[step] = value
   358	  }
   359	
   360	  // Radius entries
   361	  const radiusEntries: Record<string, string> = {}
   362	  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(radius)) {
   363	    const step = key.replace('--dz-radius-', '')
   364	    radiusEntries[step] = value
   365	  }
   366	
   367	  // Shadow entries
   368	  const shadowEntries: Record<string, string> = {}
   369	  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(shadows)) {
   370	    const step = key.replace('--dz-shadow-', '')
   371	    shadowEntries[step] = value
   372	  }
   373	
   374	  const theme = {
   375	    colors: semanticColors,
   376	    spacing: spacingEntries,
   377	    borderRadius: radiusEntries,
   378	    boxShadow: shadowEntries,
   379	  }
   380	
   381	  return `/**
   382	 * @dzup-ui/tokens — Tailwind CSS 4 Theme Extension
   383	 *
   384	 * DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
   385	 * Generated by: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
   386	 *
   387	 * Usage in tailwind.config:
   388	 *   import { dzTokens } from '@dzup-ui/tokens/tailwind'
   389	 *   export default { theme: { extend: dzTokens } }
   390	 *
   391	 * Or with Tailwind CSS 4 @theme directive, import tokens.css directly.
   392	 */
   393	
   394	/** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config['theme']} */
   395	export const dzTokens = ${JSON.stringify(theme, null, 2)};
   396	
   397	export default dzTokens;
   398	`
   399	}
   400	
   401	function generateTailwindThemeTypes(): string {
   402	  return `/**
   403	 * @dzup-ui/tokens — Tailwind Theme Type Definitions
   404	 *
   405	 * DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
   406	 * Generated by: yarn workspace @dzup-ui/tokens generate
   407	 */
   408	
   409	import type { Config } from 'tailwindcss';
   410	
   411	/** Tailwind theme extension with all dzup-ui design tokens */
   412	export declare const dzTokens: NonNullable<Config['theme']>;
   413	export default dzTokens;
   414	`
   415	}
   416	
   417	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   418	// Main
   419	// --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   420	
   421	function main(): void {
   422	  mkdirSync(DIST_DIR, { recursive: true })
   423	
   424	  const css = generateCss()
   425	  const types = generateTypes()
   426	  const tailwindTheme = generateTailwindTheme()
   427	  const tailwindThemeTypes = generateTailwindThemeTypes()
   428	
   429	  writeFileSync(resolve(DIST_DIR, 'tokens.css'), css, 'utf-8')
   430	  writeFileSync(resolve(DIST_DIR, 'tokens.d.ts'), types, 'utf-8')
   431	  writeFileSync(resolve(DIST_DIR, 'tailwind-theme.js'), tailwindTheme, 'utf-8')
   432	  writeFileSync(resolve(DIST_DIR, 'tailwind-theme.d.ts'), tailwindThemeTypes, 'utf-8')
   433	
   434	  const lineCount = css.split('\n').length
   435	  const tokenCount = css.match(/--dz-/g)?.length ?? 0
   436	
   437	  /* eslint-disable no-console */
   438	  console.log('[tokens] Generated dist/tokens.css (%d lines, %d token declarations)', lineCount, tokenCount)
   439	  console.log('[tokens] Generated dist/tokens.d.ts')
   440	  console.log('[tokens] Generated dist/tailwind-theme.js')
   441	  console.log('[tokens] Generated dist/tailwind-theme.d.ts')
   442	  /* eslint-enable no-console */
   443	}
   444	
   445	main()

     1	/**
     2	 * Theme initialization script for FOUC prevention (ADR-15).
     3	 *
     4	 * This string contains inline JavaScript meant to be injected into the
     5	 * `<head>` of the HTML document BEFORE any rendering occurs. It reads the
     6	 * persisted theme from `localStorage` and sets the `data-theme` attribute
     7	 * on `<html>` so that the correct CSS variables are active on first paint.
     8	 *
     9	 * Usage in an HTML template or SSR framework:
    10	 *
    11	 * ``\`html
    12	 * <head>
    13	 *   <script>{{ themeScript }}</script>
    14	 * </head>
    15	 * ``\`
    16	 *
    17	 * Or with a bundler / SSR helper:
    18	 *
    19	 * ``\`ts
    20	 * import { getThemeScript } from '@dzup-ui/core/providers'
    21	 *
    22	 * // Custom storage key and attribute
    23	 * const script = getThemeScript({ storageKey: 'my-theme', attribute: 'data-mode' })
    24	 * ``\`
    25	 *
    26	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/providers/theme-script
    27	 */
    28	
    29	/** Options for generating the theme initialization script */
    30	export interface ThemeScriptOptions {
    31	  /** localStorage key (default: 'dz-theme') */
    32	  storageKey?: string
    33	  /** HTML attribute name (default: 'data-theme') */
    34	  attribute?: string
    35	  /** Default theme when nothing is persisted (default: 'system') */
    36	  defaultTheme?: 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'
    37	}
    38	
    39	/**
    40	 * Generate a theme initialization script string with custom options.
    41	 *
    42	 * @param options - Script generation options
    43	 * @returns Inline JavaScript string for `<head>` injection
    44	 */
    45	export function getThemeScript(options: ThemeScriptOptions = {}): string {
    46	  const {
    47	    storageKey = 'dz-theme',
    48	    attribute = 'data-theme',
    49	    defaultTheme = 'system',
    50	  } = options
    51	
    52	  return `(function(){try{var s=localStorage.getItem(${JSON.stringify(storageKey)});var t=s==='light'||s==='dark'?s:s==='system'||!s?null:null;if(!t){var d=${JSON.stringify(defaultTheme)};t=d==='system'?window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme:dark)').matches?'dark':'light':d}document.documentElement.setAttribute(${JSON.stringify(attribute)},t)}catch(e){}})()`
    53	}
    54	
    55	/**
    56	 * Pre-built inline script using default options (ADR-15).
    57	 *
    58	 * Reads `localStorage` key `dz-theme` and sets `data-theme` on `<html>`.
    59	 * Falls back to system preference detection via `matchMedia`.
    60	 *
    61	 * Inject in `<head>` before any stylesheets or body content:
    62	 *
    63	 * ``\`html
    64	 * <script>{{ themeScript }}</script>
    65	 * ``\`
    66	 */
    67	export const themeScript: string = getThemeScript()

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * Theme Initialization Script (FOUC Prevention)
     3	 *
     4	 * This script must be placed in the `<head>` of the HTML document
     5	 * BEFORE any content renders. It reads the user's theme preference
     6	 * from localStorage and sets the `data-theme` attribute on `<html>`
     7	 * immediately, preventing a flash of unstyled/wrong-theme content.
     8	 *
     9	 * ADR-15: Theme persistence and FOUC prevention.
    10	 *
    11	 * Usage:
    12	 *   import { themeScript } from '@dzup-ui/tokens/utils'
    13	 *
    14	 *   // In your HTML template or SSR head:
    15	 *   `<script>${themeScript}</script>`
    16	 */
    17	
    18	/**
    19	 * Inline script string for `<head>`.
    20	 * Reads `localStorage('dz-theme')`, resolves 'system' to actual preference,
    21	 * and sets `data-theme` on `document.documentElement`.
    22	 */
    23	export const themeScript = `(function(){try{var t=localStorage.getItem('dz-theme');if(t==='light'||t==='dark'){document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',t)}else{var d=window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches?'dark':'light';document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',d)}}catch(e){}})();`
    24	
    25	/**
    26	 * The localStorage key used for theme persistence.
    27	 * Must match the key used in DzThemeProvider.
    28	 */
    29	export const THEME_STORAGE_KEY = 'dz-theme'

     1	/**
     2	 * useTransfer — Composable for dual-list transfer logic.
     3	 *
     4	 * Extracted from DzTransfer.vue to keep the component under 300 lines.
     5	 * Manages source/target filtering, selection toggling, and item movement.
     6	 *
     7	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/composables/useTransfer
     8	 */
     9	
    10	import type { ComputedRef, Ref } from 'vue'
    11	import type { TransferItem } from '../../components/forms/DzTransfer.types.ts'
    12	import { computed, ref } from 'vue'
    13	
    14	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15	// Options
    16	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17	
    18	/** Options for the useTransfer composable */
    19	export interface UseTransferOptions {
    20	  /** All available source items */
    21	  source: Ref<TransferItem[]>
    22	  /** Model value: array of keys currently in the target list */
    23	  modelValue: Ref<string[]>
    24	  /** Whether search is enabled */
    25	  searchable: Ref<boolean>
    26	}
    27	
    28	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29	// Return type
    30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31	
    32	/** Return value of the useTransfer composable */
    33	export interface UseTransferReturn {
    34	  /** Search query for source list */
    35	  sourceSearch: Ref<string>
    36	  /** Search query for target list */
    37	  targetSearch: Ref<string>
    38	  /** Set of selected keys in source list */
    39	  sourceSelected: Ref<Set<string>>
    40	  /** Set of selected keys in target list */
    41	  targetSelected: Ref<Set<string>>
    42	  /** Source items (those NOT in model) */
    43	  sourceItems: ComputedRef<TransferItem[]>
    44	  /** Target items (those IN model) */
    45	  targetItems: ComputedRef<TransferItem[]>
    46	  /** Filtered source items by search */
    47	  filteredSourceItems: ComputedRef<TransferItem[]>
    48	  /** Filtered target items by search */
    49	  filteredTargetItems: ComputedRef<TransferItem[]>
    50	  /** Toggle selection of a source item */
    51	  toggleSourceItem: (item: TransferItem) => void
    52	  /** Toggle selection of a target item */
    53	  toggleTargetItem: (item: TransferItem) => void
    54	  /** Move selected source items to target, returns new model value */
    55	  moveToTarget: () => string[]
    56	  /** Move selected target items back to source, returns new model value */
    57	  moveToSource: () => string[]
    58	}
    59	
    60	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61	// Composable
    62	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63	
    64	/**
    65	 * Manages dual-list transfer state and operations.
    66	 */
    67	export function useTransfer(options: UseTransferOptions): UseTransferReturn {
    68	  const { source, modelValue } = options
    69	
    70	  const sourceSearch = ref('')
    71	  const targetSearch = ref('')
    72	  const sourceSelected = ref<Set<string>>(new Set())
    73	  const targetSelected = ref<Set<string>>(new Set())
    74	
    75	  /** Source items: those NOT in model (not transferred) */
    76	  const sourceItems = computed(() =>
    77	    source.value.filter(item => !modelValue.value.includes(item.key)),
    78	  )
    79	
    80	  /** Target items: those IN model (transferred) */
    81	  const targetItems = computed(() =>
    82	    source.value.filter(item => modelValue.value.includes(item.key)),
    83	  )
    84	
    85	  /** Filtered source items by search */
    86	  const filteredSourceItems = computed(() => {
    87	    if (!sourceSearch.value)
    88	      return sourceItems.value
    89	    const q = sourceSearch.value.toLowerCase()
    90	    return sourceItems.value.filter(item =>
    91	      item.label.toLowerCase().includes(q),
    92	    )
    93	  })
    94	
    95	  /** Filtered target items by search */
    96	  const filteredTargetItems = computed(() => {
    97	    if (!targetSearch.value)
    98	      return targetItems.value
    99	    const q = targetSearch.value.toLowerCase()
   100	    return targetItems.value.filter(item =>
   101	      item.label.toLowerCase().includes(q),
   102	    )
   103	  })
   104	
   105	  function toggleSourceItem(item: TransferItem): void {
   106	    if (item.disabled)
   107	      return
   108	    const set = new Set(sourceSelected.value)
   109	    if (set.has(item.key)) {
   110	      set.delete(item.key)
   111	    }
   112	    else {
   113	      set.add(item.key)
   114	    }
   115	    sourceSelected.value = set
   116	  }
   117	
   118	  function toggleTargetItem(item: TransferItem): void {
   119	    if (item.disabled)
   120	      return
   121	    const set = new Set(targetSelected.value)
   122	    if (set.has(item.key)) {
   123	      set.delete(item.key)
   124	    }
   125	    else {
   126	      set.add(item.key)
   127	    }
   128	    targetSelected.value = set
   129	  }
   130	
   131	  /** Move selected source items to target. Returns new model value. */
   132	  function moveToTarget(): string[] {
   133	    const newModel = [...modelValue.value, ...sourceSelected.value]
   134	    sourceSelected.value = new Set()
   135	    return newModel
   136	  }
   137	
   138	  /** Move selected target items back to source. Returns new model value. */
   139	  function moveToSource(): string[] {
   140	    const toRemove = targetSelected.value
   141	    const newModel = modelValue.value.filter(key => !toRemove.has(key))
   142	    targetSelected.value = new Set()
   143	    return newModel
   144	  }
   145	
   146	  return {
   147	    sourceSearch,
   148	    targetSearch,
   149	    sourceSelected,
   150	    targetSelected,
   151	    sourceItems,
   152	    targetItems,
   153	    filteredSourceItems,
   154	    filteredTargetItems,
   155	    toggleSourceItem,
   156	    toggleTargetItem,
   157	    moveToTarget,
   158	    moveToSource,
   159	  }
   160	}

    18	
    19	/** modelValue = array of keys currently in the target list */

    21	
    22	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzTransferProps>(), {
    23	  target: undefined,
    24	  searchable: false,
    25	  disabled: false,
    26	  size: 'md',
    27	  searchPlaceholder: 'Search...',
    28	  invalid: false,
    29	  error: undefined,
    30	  required: false,
    31	  id: undefined,
    32	  ariaLabel: 'Transfer list',
    33	  ariaLabelledby: undefined,
    34	  ariaDescribedby: undefined,
    35	  ariaInvalid: undefined,
    36	})
    37	
    38	const emit = defineEmits<DzTransferEmits>()
    39	defineSlots<DzTransferSlots>()
    40	
    41	const attrs = useAttrs()
    42	const autoId = useId()
    43	const fieldContext = useFormFieldContext()
    44	
    45	/** Resolved element ID — prop overrides field context, falls back to auto-generated */
    46	const resolvedId = computed(() => props.id ?? fieldContext?.fieldId ?? autoId)
    47	
    48	const resolvedDisabled = computed(
    49	  () => props.disabled || (fieldContext?.isDisabled.value ?? false),
    50	)
    51	
    52	const styles = computed(() =>
    53	  transferVariants({
    54	    size: props.size,
    55	    disabled: resolvedDisabled.value || undefined,
    56	  }),
    57	)
    58	
    59	const rootClasses = computed(() =>
    60	  cn(styles.value.root(), attrs.class as string | undefined),
    61	)
    62	
    63	const {
    64	  sourceSearch,
    65	  targetSearch,
    66	  sourceSelected,
    67	  targetSelected,
    68	  sourceItems,
    69	  targetItems,
    70	  filteredSourceItems,
    71	  filteredTargetItems,
    72	  toggleSourceItem,
    73	  toggleTargetItem,
    74	  moveToTarget: transferMoveToTarget,
    75	  moveToSource: transferMoveToSource,
    76	} = useTransfer({
    77	  source: toRef(() => props.source),
    78	  modelValue: model,
    79	  searchable: toRef(() => props.searchable),
    80	})
    81	
    82	function emitChange(targetKeys: string[]): void {
    83	  const sourceKeys = props.source
    84	    .map(i => i.key)
    85	    .filter(k => !targetKeys.includes(k))
    86	  emit('change', { source: sourceKeys, target: targetKeys })
    87	}
    88	
    89	function moveToTarget(): void {
    90	  const newModel = transferMoveToTarget()
    91	  model.value = newModel
    92	  emitChange(newModel)
    93	}
    94	
    95	function moveToSource(): void {
    96	  const newModel = transferMoveToSource()
    97	  model.value = newModel
    98	  emitChange(newModel)
    99	}
   100	
   101	function handleFocus(event: FocusEvent): void {
   102	  emit('focus', event)
   103	}
   104	
   105	function handleBlur(event: FocusEvent): void {
   106	  emit('blur', event)
   107	}
   108	</script>
   109	
   110	<script lang="ts">

   112	  inheritAttrs: false,
   113	}
   114	</script>
   115	
   116	<template>

   133	      <div :class="styles.listHeader()">
   134	        <slot name="source-header">
   135	          <span>Source</span>
   136	        </slot>

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	<script setup lang="ts">
     2	import type { DzTableContext, DzTableProps, DzTableSlots } from './DzTable.types.ts'
     3	/**
     4	 * DzTable — Compound semantic table root component.
     5	 *
     6	 * Simple styled table wrapper. For advanced features (sorting, pagination,
     7	 * selection), use DzDataGrid instead.
     8	 *
     9	 * Provides context to DzTableHeader, DzTableBody, DzTableRow, DzTableCell
    10	 * children via provide/inject (ADR-08).
    11	 *
    12	 * @example
    13	 * ``\`vue
    14	 * <DzTable hoverable>
    15	 *   <DzTableHeader>
    16	 *     <DzTableRow>
    17	 *       <DzTableCell header>Name</DzTableCell>
    18	 *       <DzTableCell header>Email</DzTableCell>
    19	 *     </DzTableRow>
    20	 *   </DzTableHeader>
    21	 *   <DzTableBody>
    22	 *     <DzTableRow>
    23	 *       <DzTableCell>Alice</DzTableCell>
    24	 *       <DzTableCell>alice@example.com</DzTableCell>
    25	 *     </DzTableRow>
    26	 *   </DzTableBody>
    27	 * </DzTable>
    28	 * ``\`
    29	 */
    30	import { computed, provide, toRef, useAttrs } from 'vue'
    31	import { cn } from '../../utilities/cn.ts'
    32	import { DZ_TABLE_KEY } from './DzTable.types.ts'
    33	import { tableVariants } from './DzTable.variants.ts'
    34	
    35	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzTableProps>(), {
    36	  size: 'md',
    37	  variant: 'default',
    38	  striped: false,
    39	  hoverable: false,
    40	  density: 'default',
    41	  loading: false,
    42	})
    43	
    44	defineSlots<DzTableSlots>()
    45	
    46	const attrs = useAttrs()
    47	
    48	const context: DzTableContext = {
    49	  size: toRef(() => props.size),
    50	  striped: toRef(() => props.striped),
    51	  hoverable: toRef(() => props.hoverable),
    52	  density: toRef(() => props.density),
    53	}
    54	
    55	provide(DZ_TABLE_KEY, context)
    56	
    57	const styles = computed(() =>
    58	  tableVariants({
    59	    variant: props.variant,
    60	    size: props.size,
    61	    density: props.density,
    62	    hoverable: props.hoverable,
    63	  }),
    64	)
    65	
    66	const rootClasses = computed(() =>
    67	  cn('relative overflow-auto', attrs.class as string | undefined),
    68	)
    69	
    70	const tableClasses = computed(() => styles.value.root())
    71	</script>
    72	
    73	<script lang="ts">
    74	export default {
    75	  inheritAttrs: false,
    76	}
    77	</script>
    78	
    79	<template>
    80	  <div
    81	    :class="rootClasses"
    82	    :data-state="loading ? 'loading' : 'ready'"
    83	    :data-loading="loading ? '' : undefined"
    84	    style="contain: layout style"
    85	    v-bind="{ ...$attrs, class: undefined }"
    86	  >
    87	    <table
    88	      :id="id"
    89	      :class="tableClasses"
    90	      :aria-label="ariaLabel"
    91	      :aria-labelledby="ariaLabelledby"
    92	      :aria-describedby="ariaDescribedby"
    93	      :aria-busy="loading || undefined"
    94	      role="table"
    95	    >
    96	      <caption v-if="$slots.caption" class="sr-only">
    97	        <slot name="caption" />
    98	      </caption>
    99	      <slot />
   100	    </table>
   101	  </div>
   102	</template>

     1	/**
     2	 * useFloating — Composable wrapping @floating-ui/vue for consistent positioning.
     3	 *
     4	 * Provides a unified API for floating element positioning used by
     5	 * DzTooltip, DzPopover, DzDropdownMenu and other overlay components.
     6	 * SSR-safe: positioning only runs in the browser.
     7	 *
     8	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/composables/useFloating
     9	 */
    10	
    11	import type { Placement } from '@floating-ui/vue'
    12	import type { ComputedRef, Ref } from 'vue'
    13	import {
    14	  flip as flipMiddleware,
    15	  offset as offsetMiddleware,
    16	  shift as shiftMiddleware,
    17	  useFloating as useFloatingUI,
    18	} from '@floating-ui/vue'
    19	import { computed, ref } from 'vue'
    20	
    21	/** Placement options for the floating element */
    22	export type FloatingPlacement
    23	  = | 'top'
    24	    | 'bottom'
    25	    | 'left'
    26	    | 'right'
    27	    | 'top-start'
    28	    | 'top-end'
    29	    | 'bottom-start'
    30	    | 'bottom-end'
    31	    | 'left-start'
    32	    | 'left-end'
    33	    | 'right-start'
    34	    | 'right-end'
    35	
    36	/** Options for the useFloating composable */
    37	export interface UseFloatingOptions {
    38	  /** Where to place the floating element relative to the reference */
    39	  placement?: FloatingPlacement
    40	  /** Offset distance in pixels from the reference element */
    41	  offset?: number
    42	  /** Whether to flip placement when insufficient space */
    43	  flip?: boolean
    44	  /** Whether to shift along the axis to stay in view */
    45	  shift?: boolean
    46	}
    47	
    48	/** Return value of the useFloating composable */
    49	export interface UseFloatingReturn {
    50	  /** Ref to bind to the reference (trigger) element */
    51	  referenceRef: Ref<HTMLElement | null>
    52	  /** Ref to bind to the floating element */
    53	  floatingRef: Ref<HTMLElement | null>
    54	  /** Computed CSS styles to apply to the floating element */
    55	  floatingStyles: ComputedRef<Record<string, string>>
    56	  /** The resolved placement after middleware adjustments */
    57	  placement: Ref<string>
    58	  /** Manually trigger a position recalculation */
    59	  update: () => void
    60	}
    61	
    62	/**
    63	 * Wraps `@floating-ui/vue` with sensible defaults for dzup-ui overlay components.
    64	 *
    65	 * @param options - Positioning configuration
    66	 * @returns Refs, styles, and controls for the floating element
    67	 */
    68	export function useFloating(options?: UseFloatingOptions): UseFloatingReturn {
    69	  const {
    70	    placement: initialPlacement = 'bottom',
    71	    offset: offsetValue = 8,
    72	    flip: enableFlip = true,
    73	    shift: enableShift = true,
    74	  } = options ?? {}
    75	
    76	  const referenceRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
    77	  const floatingRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
    78	
    79	  // Build middleware array based on options
    80	  const middleware = [
    81	    offsetMiddleware(offsetValue),
    82	    ...(enableFlip ? [flipMiddleware()] : []),
    83	    ...(enableShift ? [shiftMiddleware()] : []),
    84	  ]
    85	
    86	  const { floatingStyles: rawStyles, placement: resolvedPlacement, update } = useFloatingUI(
    87	    referenceRef,
    88	    floatingRef,
    89	    {
    90	      placement: initialPlacement as Placement,
    91	      middleware,
    92	    },
    93	  )
    94	
    95	  // Convert CSSProperties to Record<string, string> for consistent typing
    96	  const floatingStyles = computed<Record<string, string>>(() => {
    97	    const styles = rawStyles.value
    98	    const result: Record<string, string> = {}
    99	    if (typeof styles === 'object' && styles !== null) {
   100	      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(styles)) {
   101	        if (typeof value === 'string') {
   102	          result[key] = value
   103	        }
   104	        else if (typeof value === 'number') {
   105	          result[key] = `${value}px`
   106	        }
   107	      }
   108	    }
   109	    return result
   110	  })
   111	
   112	  // Expose placement as a string ref
   113	  const placementRef = computed(() => resolvedPlacement.value as string)
   114	
   115	  return {
   116	    referenceRef,
   117	    floatingRef,
   118	    floatingStyles,
   119	    placement: placementRef as unknown as Ref<string>,
   120	    update,
   121	  }
   122	}

codex
I validated there’s effectively no backend/queue/streaming path in this repo (only UI and tooling), so backend findings will be explicitly “not applicable” with supporting scans. I’m doing one more pass on state-heavy composables like sidebar/dialog/search input for responsiveness and listener lifecycle risks.

     1	/**
     2	 * useSidebar — Composable for sidebar layout behavior.
     3	 *
     4	 * Manages collapsed/expanded state, mobile overlay, responsive breakpoint
     5	 * detection, localStorage persistence, and keyboard shortcut (Ctrl/Cmd+B).
     6	 *
     7	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/composables/useSidebar
     8	 */
     9	
    10	import type { ComputedRef, Ref } from 'vue'
    11	import {
    12	  computed,
    13	  onMounted,
    14	  onUnmounted,
    15	  ref,
    16	  watch,
    17	} from 'vue'
    18	
    19	/** Options for the useSidebar composable */
    20	export interface UseSidebarOptions {
    21	  /** Start in collapsed state (default: false) */
    22	  defaultCollapsed?: boolean
    23	  /** Start with mobile overlay open (default: false) */
    24	  defaultMobileOpen?: boolean
    25	  /** Width when collapsed (default: '4rem') */
    26	  collapsedWidth?: string
    27	  /** Width when expanded (default: '16rem') */
    28	  expandedWidth?: string
    29	  /** Pixel breakpoint for mobile mode (default: 768) */
    30	  mobileBreakpoint?: number
    31	  /** localStorage key for persisting collapsed state */
    32	  storageKey?: string
    33	}
    34	
    35	/** Return value of the useSidebar composable */
    36	export interface UseSidebarReturn {
    37	  /** Whether the sidebar is collapsed */
    38	  collapsed: Ref<boolean>
    39	  /** Whether the mobile overlay is open */
    40	  mobileOpen: Ref<boolean>
    41	  /** Whether the viewport is at or below the mobile breakpoint */
    42	  isMobile: ComputedRef<boolean>
    43	  /** Current sidebar width based on collapsed state */
    44	  sidebarWidth: ComputedRef<string>
    45	  /** Toggle collapsed state */
    46	  toggle: () => void
    47	  /** Expand the sidebar */
    48	  expand: () => void
    49	  /** Collapse the sidebar */
    50	  collapse: () => void
    51	  /** Toggle mobile overlay */
    52	  toggleMobile: () => void
    53	  /** Open mobile overlay */
    54	  openMobile: () => void
    55	  /** Close mobile overlay */
    56	  closeMobile: () => void
    57	}
    58	
    59	/**
    60	 * Read a boolean value from localStorage.
    61	 * Returns `fallback` when storage is unavailable or key is absent.
    62	 *
    63	 * @internal

    65	function readStoredBoolean(key: string, fallback: boolean): boolean {
    66	  if (typeof window === 'undefined')
    67	    return fallback
    68	  try {
    69	    const raw = localStorage.getItem(key)
    70	    if (raw === null)
    71	      return fallback
    72	    return raw === 'true'
    73	  }
    74	  catch {
    75	    return fallback
    76	  }
    77	}
    78	
    79	/**
    80	 * Write a boolean value to localStorage.
    81	 * Silently no-ops when storage is unavailable.
    82	 *
    83	 * @internal
    84	 */
    85	function writeStoredBoolean(key: string, value: boolean): void {
    86	  if (typeof window === 'undefined')
    87	    return
    88	  try {
    89	    localStorage.setItem(key, String(value))
    90	  }
    91	  catch {
    92	    // Storage full or unavailable — silently ignore
    93	  }
    94	}
    95	
    96	/**
    97	 * Manages sidebar layout behavior including collapsed/expanded state,
    98	 * mobile overlay, responsive breakpoint detection via matchMedia,
    99	 * localStorage persistence, and Ctrl/Cmd+B keyboard shortcut.
   100	 *
   101	 * @param options - Configuration for the sidebar behavior
   102	 * @returns Refs, computed values, and methods to control the sidebar
   103	 *
   104	 * @example
   105	 * ``\`ts
   106	 * const {
   107	 *   collapsed,
   108	 *   mobileOpen,
   109	 *   isMobile,
   110	 *   sidebarWidth,
   111	 *   toggle,
   112	 *   toggleMobile,
   113	 * } = useSidebar({ storageKey: 'app-sidebar' })
   114	 * ``\`
   115	 */
   116	export function useSidebar(options: UseSidebarOptions = {}): UseSidebarReturn {
   117	  const {
   118	    defaultCollapsed = false,
   119	    defaultMobileOpen = false,
   120	    collapsedWidth = '4rem',
   121	    expandedWidth = '16rem',
   122	    mobileBreakpoint = 768,
   123	    storageKey,
   124	  } = options
   125	
   126	  // ---- State ----
   127	
   128	  const initialCollapsed = storageKey
   129	    ? readStoredBoolean(storageKey, defaultCollapsed)
   130	    : defaultCollapsed
   131	
   132	  const collapsed = ref(initialCollapsed)
   133	  const mobileOpen = ref(defaultMobileOpen)
   134	  const mobileMatch = ref(false)
   135	
   136	  // ---- Computed ----
   137	
   138	  const isMobile: ComputedRef<boolean> = computed(() => mobileMatch.value)
   139	
   140	  const sidebarWidth: ComputedRef<string> = computed(() =>
   141	    collapsed.value ? collapsedWidth : expandedWidth,
   142	  )
   143	
   144	  // ---- Actions ----
   145	
   146	  /** Toggle collapsed state */
   147	  function toggle(): void {
   148	    collapsed.value = !collapsed.value
   149	  }
   150	
   151	  /** Expand the sidebar */
   152	  function expand(): void {
   153	    collapsed.value = false
   154	  }
   155	
   156	  /** Collapse the sidebar */
   157	  function collapse(): void {
   158	    collapsed.value = true
   159	  }
   160	
   161	  /** Toggle mobile overlay */
   162	  function toggleMobile(): void {
   163	    mobileOpen.value = !mobileOpen.value
   164	  }
   165	
   166	  /** Open mobile overlay */
   167	  function openMobile(): void {
   168	    mobileOpen.value = true
   169	  }
   170	
   171	  /** Close mobile overlay */
   172	  function closeMobile(): void {
   173	    mobileOpen.value = false
   174	  }
   175	
   176	  // ---- Persistence ----
   177	
   178	  if (storageKey) {
   179	    watch(collapsed, (value) => {
   180	      writeStoredBoolean(storageKey, value)
   181	    })
   182	  }
   183	
   184	  // ---- matchMedia for mobile detection ----
   185	
   186	  let mediaQuery: MediaQueryList | null = null
   187	
   188	  function handleMediaChange(event: MediaQueryListEvent | MediaQueryList): void {
   189	    mobileMatch.value = event.matches
   190	  }
   191	
   192	  function setupMediaQuery(): void {
   193	    if (typeof window === 'undefined')
   194	      return
   195	    mediaQuery = window.matchMedia(`(max-width: ${mobileBreakpoint}px)`)
   196	    mobileMatch.value = mediaQuery.matches
   197	    mediaQuery.addEventListener('change', handleMediaChange as (e: MediaQueryListEvent) => void)
   198	  }
   199	
   200	  function teardownMediaQuery(): void {
   201	    if (mediaQuery) {
   202	      mediaQuery.removeEventListener('change', handleMediaChange as (e: MediaQueryListEvent) => void)
   203	      mediaQuery = null
   204	    }
   205	  }
   206	
   207	  // ---- Close mobile sidebar on route change ----
   208	
   209	  // Watch mobileMatch: when entering mobile mode, auto-close overlay;
   210	  // this also acts as a proxy for viewport changes that a route change triggers.
   211	  watch(isMobile, () => {
   212	    if (mobileOpen.value) {
   213	      closeMobile()
   214	    }
   215	  })
   216	
   217	  // ---- Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+B / Cmd+B ----
   218	
   219	  function handleKeydown(event: KeyboardEvent): void {
   220	    const isModifier = event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey
   221	    if (isModifier && event.key === 'b') {
   222	      event.preventDefault()
   223	      if (isMobile.value) {
   224	        toggleMobile()
   225	      }
   226	      else {
   227	        toggle()
   228	      }
   229	    }
   230	  }
   231	
   232	  function setupKeyboard(): void {
   233	    if (typeof document === 'undefined')
   234	      return
   235	    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown)
   236	  }
   237	
   238	  function teardownKeyboard(): void {
   239	    if (typeof document === 'undefined')
   240	      return
   241	    document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown)
   242	  }
   243	
   244	  // ---- Lifecycle ----
   245	
   246	  onMounted(() => {
   247	    setupMediaQuery()
   248	    setupKeyboard()
   249	  })
   250	
   251	  onUnmounted(() => {
   252	    teardownMediaQuery()
   253	    teardownKeyboard()
   254	  })
   255	
   256	  return {
   257	    collapsed,
   258	    mobileOpen,
   259	    isMobile,
   260	    sidebarWidth,
   261	    toggle,
   262	    expand,
   263	    collapse,
   264	    toggleMobile,
   265	    openMobile,
   266	    closeMobile,
   267	  }
   268	}

     7	/**
     8	 * DzSearchInput — Search input with search icon and clear button.
     9	 *
    10	 * Provides a search-specific input with built-in search icon prefix,
    11	 * clear button, and Enter key submission.

    21	
    22	const model = defineModel<string>({ default: '' })
    23	
    24	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DzSearchInputProps>(), {
    25	  variant: 'outline',
    26	  size: 'md',
    27	  tone: undefined,
    28	  disabled: false,
    29	  readonly: false,
    30	  loading: false,
    31	  invalid: false,
    32	  required: false,

    36	
    37	const emit = defineEmits<DzSearchInputEmits>()

    41	const inputRef = ref<HTMLInputElement | null>(null)

    44	const resolvedId = computed(() => props.id ?? autoId)
    45	const isInvalid = computed(() => props.invalid || !!props.error)
    46	
    47	const wrapperClasses = computed(() =>
    48	  cn(
    49	    inputWrapperVariants({
    50	      variant: props.variant,
    51	      size: props.size,
    52	      invalid: isInvalid.value,
    53	    }),
    54	    attrs.class as string | undefined,
    55	  ),
    56	)
    57	
    58	const inputClasses = computed(() => inputElementVariants())
    59	
    60	function handleChange(): void {
    61	  emit('change', model.value, { source: 'user' })
    62	}
    63	
    64	function handleFocus(event: FocusEvent): void {
    65	  emit('focus', event)
    66	}
    67	
    68	function handleBlur(event: FocusEvent): void {
    69	  emit('blur', event)
    70	}
    71	
    72	// Debounced auto-search on input change
    73	let debounceTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | undefined

    75	function cancelDebounce(): void {

    77	    clearTimeout(debounceTimer)

    79	  }
    80	}
    81	
    82	if (props.debounce > 0) {

    89	  })
    90	}
    91	
    92	onBeforeUnmount(cancelDebounce)

    94	function handleKeydown(event: KeyboardEvent): void {
    95	  if (event.key === 'Enter') {
    96	    cancelDebounce()
    97	    emit('search', model.value)
    98	  }
    99	}
   100	
   101	function handleClear(): void {
   102	  cancelDebounce()
   103	  model.value = ''
   104	  emit('clear')

   109	defineExpose({ inputRef })

   112	<script lang="ts">

     1	/**
     2	 * useDialog — Composable for modal dialog behavior.
     3	 *
     4	 * Manages focus trap, scroll lock, escape-to-close, click-outside-to-close,
     5	 * focus restoration, and aria-hidden on sibling elements.
     6	 *
     7	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/composables/useDialog
     8	 */
     9	
    10	import type { MaybeRef, Ref } from 'vue'
    11	import {
    12	  onUnmounted,
    13	  ref,
    14	  toValue,
    15	  useId,
    16	  watch,
    17	} from 'vue'
    18	
    19	/** Options for the useDialog composable */
    20	export interface UseDialogOptions {
    21	  /** Reactive or static initial open state */
    22	  open?: MaybeRef<boolean>
    23	  /** Callback fired when the open state changes */
    24	  onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void
    25	  /** Whether the dialog behaves as a modal (default: true) */
    26	  modal?: boolean
    27	  /** Prevent closing via Escape or click-outside (default: false) */
    28	  preventClose?: boolean
    29	}
    30	
    31	/** Return value of the useDialog composable */
    32	export interface UseDialogReturn {
    33	  /** Whether the dialog is currently open */
    34	  isOpen: Ref<boolean>
    35	  /** Open the dialog */
    36	  open: () => void
    37	  /** Close the dialog */
    38	  close: () => void
    39	  /** Toggle the dialog open/closed */
    40	  toggle: () => void
    41	  /** Ref to bind to the trigger element (for focus restoration) */
    42	  triggerRef: Ref<HTMLElement | null>
    43	  /** Ref to bind to the dialog content element (for focus trap) */
    44	  contentRef: Ref<HTMLElement | null>
    45	  /** Generated ID for the dialog title (aria-labelledby) */
    46	  titleId: string
    47	  /** Generated ID for the dialog description (aria-describedby) */
    48	  descriptionId: string
    49	}
    50	
    51	const FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR = [
    52	  'a[href]',
    53	  'button:not([disabled])',
    54	  'input:not([disabled])',
    55	  'select:not([disabled])',
    56	  'textarea:not([disabled])',
    57	  '[tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])',
    58	].join(', ')
    59	
    60	/** @internal */
    61	function getFocusableElements(container: HTMLElement): HTMLElement[] {
    62	  return Array.from(container.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR))
    63	}
    64	
    65	/**
    66	 * Manages modal dialog behavior including focus trap, scroll lock,
    67	 * escape key handling, click-outside dismissal, and ARIA attributes.
    68	 *
    69	 * @param options - Configuration for the dialog behavior
    70	 * @returns Refs, IDs, and methods to control the dialog
    71	 *
    72	 * @example
    73	 * ``\`ts
    74	 * const { isOpen, open, close, triggerRef, contentRef, titleId, descriptionId } = useDialog()
    75	 * ``\`
    76	 */
    77	export function useDialog(options: UseDialogOptions = {}): UseDialogReturn {
    78	  const {
    79	    onOpenChange,
    80	    modal = true,
    81	    preventClose = false,
    82	  } = options
    83	
    84	  const baseId = useId()
    85	  const titleId = `${baseId}-dialog-title`
    86	  const descriptionId = `${baseId}-dialog-description`
    87	
    88	  const isOpen = ref(toValue(options.open) ?? false)
    89	  const triggerRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
    90	  const contentRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
    91	
    92	  let previousActiveElement: HTMLElement | null = null
    93	  let cleanupFns: Array<() => void> = []
    94	  let hiddenSiblings: HTMLElement[] = []
    95	
    96	  function setOpen(value: boolean): void {
    97	    if (isOpen.value === value)
    98	      return
    99	    isOpen.value = value
   100	    onOpenChange?.(value)
   101	  }
   102	
   103	  /** Open the dialog */
   104	  function open(): void {
   105	    setOpen(true)
   106	  }
   107	
   108	  /** Close the dialog */
   109	  function close(): void {
   110	    setOpen(false)
   111	  }
   112	
   113	  /** Toggle the dialog open/closed */
   114	  function toggle(): void {
   115	    setOpen(!isOpen.value)
   116	  }
   117	
   118	  function setupSideEffects(): void {
   119	    if (typeof document === 'undefined')
   120	      return
   121	    const contentEl = contentRef.value
   122	    if (!contentEl)
   123	      return
   124	
   125	    previousActiveElement = (document.activeElement as HTMLElement) ?? null
   126	
   127	    // Scroll lock (modal only)
   128	    if (modal) {
   129	      const originalOverflow = document.body.style.overflow
   130	      const originalPaddingRight = document.body.style.paddingRight
   131	      const scrollbarWidth = window.innerWidth - document.documentElement.clientWidth
   132	      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'
   133	      if (scrollbarWidth > 0) {
   134	        document.body.style.paddingRight = `${scrollbarWidth}px`
   135	      }
   136	      cleanupFns.push(() => {
   137	        document.body.style.overflow = originalOverflow
   138	        document.body.style.paddingRight = originalPaddingRight
   139	      })
   140	    }
   141	
   142	    // aria-hidden on siblings (modal only)
   143	    if (modal && contentEl.parentElement) {
   144	      const siblings = Array.from(contentEl.parentElement.children) as HTMLElement[]
   145	      for (const sibling of siblings) {
   146	        if (sibling === contentEl)
   147	          continue
   148	        if (sibling.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true')
   149	          continue
   150	        sibling.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
   151	        hiddenSiblings.push(sibling)
   152	      }
   153	      cleanupFns.push(() => {
   154	        for (const sibling of hiddenSiblings) {
   155	          sibling.removeAttribute('aria-hidden')
   156	        }
   157	        hiddenSiblings = []
   158	      })
   159	    }
   160	
   161	    // Escape key handler
   162	    function handleKeydown(event: KeyboardEvent): void {
   163	      if (event.key === 'Escape' && !preventClose) {
   164	        event.stopPropagation()
   165	        close()
   166	      }
   167	    }
   168	    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown)
   169	    cleanupFns.push(() => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown))
   170	
   171	    // Click outside handler
   172	    function handleClickOutside(event: MouseEvent): void {
   173	      if (preventClose)
   174	        return
   175	      if (!contentEl)
   176	        return
   177	      const target = event.target as Node
   178	      if (!contentEl.contains(target)) {
   179	        close()
   180	      }
   181	    }
   182	    const clickTimer = setTimeout(() => {
   183	      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
   184	    }, 0)
   185	    cleanupFns.push(() => {
   186	      clearTimeout(clickTimer)
   187	      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
   188	    })
   189	
   190	    // Focus trap (modal only)
   191	    if (modal) {
   192	      function handleTabKey(event: KeyboardEvent): void {
   193	        if (event.key !== 'Tab')
   194	          return
   195	        if (!contentEl)
   196	          return
   197	
   198	        const focusable = getFocusableElements(contentEl)
   199	        if (focusable.length === 0) {
   200	          event.preventDefault()
   201	          return
   202	        }
   203	
   204	        const first = focusable[0] as HTMLElement
   205	        const last = focusable[focusable.length - 1] as HTMLElement
   206	
   207	        if (event.shiftKey) {
   208	          if (document.activeElement === first) {
   209	            event.preventDefault()
   210	            last.focus()
   211	          }
   212	        }
   213	        else {
   214	          if (document.activeElement === last) {
   215	            event.preventDefault()
   216	            first.focus()
   217	          }
   218	        }
   219	      }
   220	      document.addEventListener('keydown', handleTabKey)
   221	      cleanupFns.push(() => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleTabKey))
   222	    }
   223	
   224	    // Move focus into the dialog content
   225	    const raf = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   226	      if (!contentEl)
   227	        return
   228	      const focusable = getFocusableElements(contentEl)
   229	      if (focusable.length > 0) {
   230	        (focusable[0] as HTMLElement).focus()
   231	      }
   232	      else {
   233	        contentEl.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
   234	        contentEl.focus()
   235	      }
   236	    })
   237	    cleanupFns.push(() => cancelAnimationFrame(raf))
   238	  }
   239	
   240	  function teardownSideEffects(): void {
   241	    for (let i = cleanupFns.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
   242	      const fn = cleanupFns[i]
   243	      if (fn)
   244	        fn()
   245	    }
   246	    cleanupFns = []
   247	
   248	    if (typeof document !== 'undefined') {
   249	      const restoreTarget = triggerRef.value ?? previousActiveElement
   250	      if (restoreTarget && typeof restoreTarget.focus === 'function') {
   251	        restoreTarget.focus()
   252	      }
   253	      previousActiveElement = null
   254	    }
   255	  }
   256	
   257	  watch(isOpen, (newOpen) => {
   258	    if (newOpen) {
   259	      if (typeof requestAnimationFrame !== 'undefined') {
   260	        requestAnimationFrame(() => setupSideEffects())
   261	      }
   262	    }
   263	    else {
   264	      teardownSideEffects()
   265	    }
   266	  })
   267	
   268	  watch(
   269	    () => toValue(options.open),
   270	    (externalOpen) => {
   271	      if (externalOpen !== undefined && externalOpen !== isOpen.value) {
   272	        isOpen.value = externalOpen
   273	      }
   274	    },
   275	  )
   276	
   277	  onUnmounted(() => {
   278	    teardownSideEffects()
   279	  })
   280	
   281	  return {
   282	    isOpen,
   283	    open,
   284	    close,
   285	    toggle,
   286	    triggerRef,
   287	    contentRef,
   288	    titleId,
   289	    descriptionId,
   290	  }
   291	}

for(const c of Object.values(m.exports.composables||{})) composables += (c.exports||[]).length;

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba packages/tooling/src/component-size-report.ts | sed -n '1,320p'" in /media/ninel/Second/code/datazup/ai-internal-dev/ui/dzup-ui
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/* eslint-disable no-console */
     2	/**
     3	 * Per-Component Bundle Size Report
     4	 *
     5	 * Analyzes the built dist/ artifacts to report individual component sizes.
     6	 * Helps developers identify which components contribute most to bundle size
     7	 * and track size changes across versions.
     8	 *
     9	 * Usage:
    10	 *   npx tsx packages/tooling/src/component-size-report.ts
    11	 *   npx tsx packages/tooling/src/component-size-report.ts --ci
    12	 *   npx tsx packages/tooling/src/component-size-report.ts --top=20
    13	 *
    14	 * @module @dzup-ui/tooling/component-size-report
    15	 */
    16	
    17	import type { Buffer } from 'node:buffer'
    18	import { existsSync, readdirSync, readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    19	import { join, resolve } from 'node:path'
    20	import process from 'node:process'
    21	import { gzipSync } from 'node:zlib'
    22	
    23	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24	// Types
    25	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26	
    27	export interface ComponentSizeEntry {
    28	  name: string
    29	  family: string
    30	  package: 'core'
    31	  rawBytes: number
    32	  gzipBytes: number
    33	  files: string[]
    34	}
    35	
    36	export interface SizeReport {
    37	  generated: string
    38	  components: ComponentSizeEntry[]
    39	  totals: {
    40	    core: { raw: number, gzip: number, count: number }
    41	  }
    42	}
    43	
    44	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45	// Size Helpers
    46	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    47	
    48	function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
    49	  if (bytes < 1024)
    50	    return `${bytes} B`
    51	  if (bytes < 1024 * 1024)
    52	    return `${(bytes / 1024).toFixed(2)} kB`
    53	  return `${(bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2)} MB`
    54	}
    55	
    56	function getGzipSize(content: Buffer): number {
    57	  return gzipSync(content, { level: 9 }).length
    58	}
    59	
    60	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61	// Component Discovery
    62	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63	
    64	function discoverComponents(distDir: string, pkg: 'core'): ComponentSizeEntry[] {
    65	  const componentsDir = join(distDir, 'components')
    66	  if (!existsSync(componentsDir))
    67	    return []
    68	
    69	  const entries: ComponentSizeEntry[] = []
    70	  const families = readdirSync(componentsDir).filter(f =>
    71	    statSync(join(componentsDir, f)).isDirectory(),
    72	  )
    73	
    74	  for (const family of families) {
    75	    const familyDir = join(componentsDir, family)
    76	    const files = readdirSync(familyDir).filter(f => f.endsWith('.js'))
    77	
    78	    // Group files by component name (e.g., DzButton.vue.js, DzButton.variants.js → DzButton)
    79	    const componentMap = new Map<string, string[]>()
    80	
    81	    for (const file of files) {
    82	      // Extract component name: DzButton.vue.js → DzButton, DzButton.variants.js → DzButton
    83	      const match = /^(Dz[A-Za-z]+)\./.exec(file)
    84	      if (!match?.[1])
    85	        continue
    86	
    87	      const componentName = match[1]
    88	      const existing = componentMap.get(componentName) ?? []
    89	      existing.push(file)
    90	      componentMap.set(componentName, existing)
    91	    }
    92	
    93	    for (const [name, componentFiles] of componentMap) {
    94	      let rawBytes = 0
    95	      let gzipBytes = 0
    96	
    97	      for (const file of componentFiles) {
    98	        const filePath = join(familyDir, file)
    99	        const content = readFileSync(filePath)
   100	        rawBytes += content.length
   101	        gzipBytes += getGzipSize(content)
   102	      }
   103	
   104	      entries.push({
   105	        name,
   106	        family,
   107	        package: pkg,
   108	        rawBytes,
   109	        gzipBytes,
   110	        files: componentFiles,
   111	      })
   112	    }
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  return entries.sort((a, b) => b.gzipBytes - a.gzipBytes)
   116	}
   117	
   118	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   119	// Report Generation
   120	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   121	
   122	export function generateSizeReport(rootDir: string): SizeReport {
   123	  const coreDistDir = join(rootDir, 'packages/core/dist')
   124	
   125	  const coreComponents = discoverComponents(coreDistDir, 'core')
   126	  const components = [...coreComponents].sort((a, b) => b.gzipBytes - a.gzipBytes)
   127	
   128	  const coreTotals = coreComponents.reduce(
   129	    (acc, c) => ({ raw: acc.raw + c.rawBytes, gzip: acc.gzip + c.gzipBytes, count: acc.count + 1 }),
   130	    { raw: 0, gzip: 0, count: 0 },
   131	  )
   132	
   133	  return {
   134	    generated: new Date().toISOString(),
   135	    components,
   136	    totals: { core: coreTotals },
   137	  }
   138	}
   139	
   140	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   141	// Output
   142	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   143	
   144	function printHumanReport(report: SizeReport, topN: number): void {
   145	  console.log('\n=== Per-Component Bundle Size Report ===\n')
   146	
   147	  const shown = topN > 0 ? report.components.slice(0, topN) : report.components
   148	  const maxNameLen = Math.max(...shown.map(c => c.name.length), 15)
   149	
   150	  console.log(
   151	    `${'Component'.padEnd(maxNameLen + 2)}${'Family'.padEnd(16)}${'Pkg'.padEnd(6)}${'Raw'.padStart(10)}${'Gzip'.padStart(10)}${'Files'.padStart(6)}`,
   152	  )
   153	  console.log('─'.repeat(maxNameLen + 50))
   154	
   155	  for (const component of shown) {
   156	    console.log(
   157	      `${component.name.padEnd(maxNameLen + 2)}${component.family.padEnd(16)}${component.package.padEnd(6)}${formatBytes(component.rawBytes).padStart(10)}${formatBytes(component.gzipBytes).padStart(10)}${String(component.files.length).padStart(6)}`,
   158	    )
   159	  }
   160	
   161	  if (topN > 0 && report.components.length > topN) {
   162	    console.log(`\n  ... and ${report.components.length - topN} more components`)
   163	  }
   164	
   165	  console.log(`\n${'─'.repeat(maxNameLen + 50)}`)
   166	  console.log(
   167	    `Core:  ${report.totals.core.count} components, ${formatBytes(report.totals.core.raw)} raw, ${formatBytes(report.totals.core.gzip)} gzip`,
   168	  )
   169	}
   170	
   171	function printCiReport(report: SizeReport): void {
   172	  const output = {
   173	    generated: report.generated,
   174	    totals: {
   175	      core: {
   176	        count: report.totals.core.count,
   177	        rawBytes: report.totals.core.raw,
   178	        gzipBytes: report.totals.core.gzip,
   179	        rawLabel: formatBytes(report.totals.core.raw),
   180	        gzipLabel: formatBytes(report.totals.core.gzip),
   181	      },
   182	    },
   183	    components: report.components.map(c => ({
   184	      name: c.name,
   185	      family: c.family,
   186	      package: c.package,
   187	      rawBytes: c.rawBytes,
   188	      gzipBytes: c.gzipBytes,
   189	      rawLabel: formatBytes(c.rawBytes),
   190	      gzipLabel: formatBytes(c.gzipBytes),
   191	    })),
   192	  }
   193	  console.log(JSON.stringify(output, null, 2))
   194	}
   195	
   196	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   197	// CLI
   198	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   199	
   200	function main(): void {
   201	  const args = process.argv.slice(2)
   202	  const ciMode = args.includes('--ci')
   203	  const topArg = args.find(a => a.startsWith('--top='))
   204	  const topN = topArg ? Number.parseInt(topArg.split('=')[1] ?? '0', 10) : 30
   205	  const rootDir = resolve(import.meta.dirname, '..', '..', '..')
   206	
   207	  const report = generateSizeReport(rootDir)
   208	
   209	  if (ciMode) {
   210	    printCiReport(report)
   211	  }
   212	  else {
   213	    printHumanReport(report, topN)
   214	  }
   215	}
   216	
   217	const isDirectRun = process.argv[1]?.includes('component-size-report')
   218	if (isDirectRun) {
   219	  main()
   220	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	/**
     2	 * DzDataGrid — type definitions for the compound DataGrid family.
     3	 *
     4	 * DzDataGrid is the most complex core component. Phase 1 scope:
     5	 * sorting, pagination, and row selection.
     6	 *
     7	 * Context injection via DZ_DATA_GRID_KEY (ADR-08).
     8	 *
     9	 * @module @dzup-ui/core/components/data/DzDataGrid
    10	 */
    11	
    12	import type {
    13	  BaseAccessibilityProps,
    14	  CanonicalSize,
    15	} from '@dzup-ui/contracts'
    16	import type { Component, InjectionKey, Ref } from 'vue'
    17	
    18	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19	// Column definition
    20	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21	
    22	/** Column definition for the data grid */
    23	export interface ColumnDef<T> {
    24	  /** Field key to access the data from the row */
    25	  field: keyof T & string
    26	  /** Header label text */
    27	  header: string
    28	  /** Column width (number = px, string = CSS value) */
    29	  width?: number | string
    30	  /** Whether this column is sortable */
    31	  sortable?: boolean
    32	  /** Whether this column is filterable */
    33	  filterable?: boolean
    34	  /** Filter type for this column */
    35	  filterType?: FilterType
    36	  /** Filter options for select type filter */
    37	  filterOptions?: string[]
    38	  /** Custom cell renderer component */
    39	  cellRenderer?: Component
    40	  /** Custom header renderer component */
    41	  headerRenderer?: Component
    42	  /** Text alignment */
    43	  align?: 'left' | 'center' | 'right'
    44	  /** Pin column to left or right */
    45	  pinned?: 'left' | 'right'
    46	}
    47	
    48	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    49	// Filter types
    50	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    51	
    52	/** Filter type for column filtering */
    53	export type FilterType = 'text' | 'number' | 'select'
    54	
    55	/** Filter comparison operator */
    56	export type FilterOperator = 'contains' | 'equals' | 'gt' | 'lt' | 'gte' | 'lte'
    57	
    58	/** Filter state for a single column */
    59	export interface DzDataGridFilter {
    60	  /** Column field key being filtered */
    61	  column: string
    62	  /** Filter value */
    63	  value: string | number
    64	  /** Comparison operator */
    65	  operator: FilterOperator
    66	}
    67	
    68	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    69	// Sort model
    70	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    71	
    72	/** Sort direction */
    73	export type SortDirection = 'asc' | 'desc'
    74	
    75	/** Sort model for a single column */
    76	export interface SortModel {
    77	  /** Field key being sorted */
    78	  field: string
    79	  /** Sort direction */
    80	  direction: SortDirection
    81	}
    82	
    83	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    84	// Pagination config
    85	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    86	
    87	/** Pagination configuration */
    88	export interface PaginationConfig {
    89	  /** Number of items per page */
    90	  pageSize: number
    91	  /** Available page size options */
    92	  pageSizeOptions?: number[]
    93	}
    94	
    95	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    96	// Grid density
    97	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    98	
    99	/** Grid row density */
   100	export type GridDensity = 'compact' | 'default' | 'comfortable'
   101	
   102	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   103	// Context (ADR-08)
   104	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   105	
   106	/** Context provided to DzDataGrid sub-parts via inject */
   107	export interface DzDataGridContext<T = Record<string, unknown>> {
   108	  /** Column definitions */
   109	  columns: Ref<ColumnDef<T>[]>
   110	  /** Current data rows */
   111	  data: Ref<T[]>
   112	  /** Row density */
   113	  density: Ref<GridDensity>
   114	  /** Size */
   115	  size: Ref<CanonicalSize>
   116	  /** Whether sorting is enabled */
   117	  sortable: Ref<boolean>
   118	  /** Current sort model */
   119	  sortModel: Ref<SortModel[]>
   120	  /** Whether filtering is enabled */
   121	  filterable: Ref<boolean>
   122	  /** Current filter state */
   123	  filters: Ref<DzDataGridFilter[]>
   124	  /** Whether selection is enabled */
   125	  selectable: Ref<boolean | 'single' | 'multiple'>
   126	  /** Currently selected rows */
   127	  selectedRows: Ref<T[]>
   128	  /** Loading state */
   129	  loading: Ref<boolean>
   130	  /** Sort a column */
   131	  sort: (field: string) => void
   132	  /** Set a filter on a column */
   133	  setFilter: (column: string, filter: DzDataGridFilter) => void
   134	  /** Clear a filter on a column */
   135	  clearFilter: (column: string) => void
   136	  /** Clear all filters */
   137	  clearAllFilters: () => void
   138	  /** Toggle row selection */
   139	  toggleRowSelection: (row: T) => void
   140	  /** Toggle all row selection */
   141	  toggleAllSelection: () => void
   142	  /** Check if a row is selected */
   143	  isRowSelected: (row: T) => boolean
   144	  /** Check if all rows are selected */
   145	  isAllSelected: Ref<boolean>
   146	  /** Check if some rows are selected (indeterminate) */
   147	  isSomeSelected: Ref<boolean>
   148	}
   149	
   150	/** Typed injection key for DzDataGrid context (ADR-08, SCREAMING_SNAKE) */
   151	export const DZ_DATA_GRID_KEY: InjectionKey<DzDataGridContext> = Symbol('dz-data-grid')
   152	
   153	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   154	// DzDataGrid Props
   155	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   156	
   157	/** Props for the DzDataGrid root component */
   158	export interface DzDataGridProps<T = Record<string, unknown>> extends BaseAccessibilityProps {
   159	  /** Data rows to display */
   160	  data: T[]
   161	  /** Column definitions */
   162	  columns: ColumnDef<T>[]
   163	  /** Loading state */
   164	  loading?: boolean
   165	  /** Whether sorting is enabled */
   166	  sortable?: boolean
   167	  /** Current sort model (controlled) */
   168	  sortModel?: SortModel[]
   169	  /** Whether column filtering is enabled */
   170	  filterable?: boolean
   171	  /** Current filter state (controlled) */
   172	  filters?: DzDataGridFilter[]
   173	  /** Whether pagination is enabled */
   174	  pagination?: boolean | PaginationConfig
   175	  /** Selection mode */
   176	  selectable?: boolean | 'single' | 'multiple'
   177	  /** Currently selected rows */
   178	  selectedRows?: T[]
   179	  /** Row density */
   180	  density?: GridDensity
   181	  /** Component size */
   182	  size?: CanonicalSize
   183	  /** Function to get unique row key */
   184	  rowKey?: keyof T & string
   185	}
   186	
   187	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   188	// DzDataGrid Emits
   189	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   190	
   191	/** Events emitted by DzDataGrid */
   192	export interface DzDataGridEmits<T = Record<string, unknown>> {
   193	  /** Sort model changed */
   194	  'update:sortModel': [value: SortModel[]]
   195	  /** Filter state changed */
   196	  'update:filters': [value: DzDataGridFilter[]]
   197	  /** Selected rows changed */
   198	  'update:selectedRows': [value: T[]]
   199	  /** A row was clicked */
   200	  'rowClick': [row: T, index: number]
   201	  /** Sort changed (convenience alias) */
   202	  'sort': [sortModel: SortModel[]]
   203	  /** Filter changed (convenience alias) */
   204	  'filter': [filters: DzDataGridFilter[]]
   205	  /** Page changed */
   206	  'pageChange': [page: number]
   207	  /** Page size changed */
   208	  'pageSizeChange': [pageSize: number]
   209	}
   210	
   211	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   212	// DzDataGrid Slots
   213	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   214	
   215	/** Slot definitions for DzDataGrid */
   216	export interface DzDataGridSlots<T = Record<string, unknown>> {
   217	  /** Custom header content */
   218	  header?: () => unknown
   219	  /** Custom body content */
   220	  body?: () => unknown
   221	  /** Custom cell content */
   222	  cell?: (props: { row: T, column: ColumnDef<T>, value: unknown }) => unknown
   223	  /** Content shown when data is empty */
   224	  empty?: () => unknown
   225	  /** Custom loading indicator */
   226	  loading?: () => unknown
   227	  /** Custom pagination content */
   228	  pagination?: () => unknown
   229	}
   230	
   231	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   232	// Sub-part types
   233	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   234	
   235	/** Props for DzDataGridHeader */
   236	export interface DzDataGridHeaderProps {
   237	  /** Additional class name */
   238	  class?: string
   239	}
   240	
   241	/** Slot definitions for DzDataGridHeader */
   242	export interface DzDataGridHeaderSlots {
   243	  /** Header cell content */
   244	  default?: () => unknown
   245	}
   246	
   247	/** Props for DzDataGridBody */
   248	export interface DzDataGridBodyProps {
   249	  /** Additional class name */
   250	  class?: string
   251	}
   252	
   253	/** Slot definitions for DzDataGridBody */
   254	export interface DzDataGridBodySlots {
   255	  /** Body row content */
   256	  default?: () => unknown
   257	}
   258	
   259	/** Props for DzDataGridRow */
   260	export interface DzDataGridRowProps<T = Record<string, unknown>> {
   261	  /** The data row */
   262	  row: T
   263	  /** Row index */
   264	  index: number
   265	}
   266	
   267	/** Slot definitions for DzDataGridRow */
   268	export interface DzDataGridRowSlots {
   269	  /** Row cell content */
   270	  default?: () => unknown
   271	}
   272	
   273	/** Props for DzDataGridCell */
   274	export interface DzDataGridCellProps<T = Record<string, unknown>> {
   275	  /** The data row */
   276	  row: T
   277	  /** Column definition */
   278	  column: ColumnDef<T>
   279	}
   280	
   281	/** Slot definitions for DzDataGridCell */
   282	export interface DzDataGridCellSlots {
   283	  /** Cell content */
   284	  default?: () => unknown
   285	}
   286	
   287	/** Props for DzDataGridPagination */
   288	export interface DzDataGridPaginationProps {
   289	  /** Current page (1-based) */
   290	  page: number
   291	  /** Items per page */
   292	  pageSize: number
   293	  /** Total number of items */
   294	  total: number
   295	  /** Available page size options */
   296	  pageSizeOptions?: number[]
   297	}
   298	
   299	/** Events emitted by DzDataGridPagination */
   300	export interface DzDataGridPaginationEmits {
   301	  /** Page changed */
   302	  'update:page': [page: number]
   303	  /** Page size changed */
   304	  'update:pageSize': [pageSize: number]
   305	}
   306	
   307	/** Slot definitions for DzDataGridPagination */
   308	export interface DzDataGridPaginationSlots {
   309	  /** Custom pagination content */
   310	  default?: () => unknown
   311	}
